subject: (FWD) executive order to END vote by mail >>>

body:
Hopefully we’re mistaken...
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS**

We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their response to our time-sensitive poll about Trump’s plan to BAN mail-in voting.

**This could completely derail our chances for 2026!_While Trump tries to RIG the midterms, we need to know where you stand:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before the deadline: DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre)

**⬇️ READ OUR ORIGINAL MESSAGE BELOW ⬇️**
**PLEASE DON’T LOOK AWAY:**

→ Donald Trump wants REVENGE on mail-in voting after it handed him a HUGE DEFEAT in 2020.

→ His executive order is one of the worst attacks on voting rights in HISTORY.

→ **If we don’t show MASSIVE support for vote-by-mail, MILLIONS of Americans risk having their ballots _thrown in the TRASH!!!_**
[**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre)

If we don’t receive 5,000 responses by midnight, our momentum to save vote-by-mail will be lost. **Please respond ASAP!**

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21115%2E878179%2EcIarre)

name: John James
subject: I have two words to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot, I want to start with two words: **thank you.** Your support means more to me than you know. Without patriots like you, I wouldn’t even have the chance to run this race, much less fight to win it. _Let me share something personal._ I grew up in Detroit, the son of parents who came from the Jim Crow South to make their American Dream possible here in Michigan. My father started a trucking company from nothing, and my parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work matter more than anything else.
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke8_jZemuX2oxsh7Tf8VzEjOC6qnwzvjcEI7I4aWaSw_TB3ThWIFX-v2r4-RUh5-8YyARVC7aATG_bHs4N8Yj7JPRhJQNnzMMlmaZj3hlMXParinna9twboCIqDbXQo9Gjoib_ZRjqkd-JYE9jrO7VmC4V6SFGtHfz3qrLFxByiLJuPHJxcrKxBGEvY39ZHq02Vlqp7Wi_lFngX_EowJMB0HgGhm8Sh9RtzyjAQPjSbdCW25cFqLSNlgRne2LHizmbDeUNtJhqoUPUZAw1a6wQLgIkNHtwSXqU1dhlFvmLGtoan8cC7ASP_V51kzkDF2ojZk%3D)
---
That’s why I went to West Point. That’s why I chose to fly Apache helicopters into combat. And that’s why, after serving in Iraq, I came home determined to create jobs and give back to the community that raised me. I’ve spent my whole life in the fight. Whether it was in uniform overseas, building a business here at home, or defending our values on the campaign trail.
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke89xfKQMO7EvbUqPKpSB1q_TTZJUmhykWqBibKUNPJrw8_KHrOVUgeeRD1RjHtez3L7QsLhk8XsxsRrwuYEubhToreSqffTfd9YrDmnHfHXiCmVH1D643JZoiDzgSP4TWjjFXVSzQ589exP9ncVoW4_LboOTeTQS7dmijAZrt39cARdZtYhkT7J4gHCfeCQVFqDu4R8qhNFKzAd8Qw0Iw3ORPEsPryuTpbBsYnh60awdDizNqOzb3WvAzFfgHk3glLNyTwffLzauB5NakYoMSO_rUokTJk4rX16XrcH_XFv3sGlf9uiSpVmTCw5zXQNLOj8%3D)
---
[ **STAND WITH ME** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke8_e71Agar3_knwoMAdkRMZpZTXJB1lsHdGne9oJQrY57zOzUhF-1PspHVx8qgtxiFmLtOmPtUFY2uXOxmnMY0We7iIfkHdfgj8Y5EkF0hpkXACvR54zFRnjL5aCYSHM9JF-pPIBIbdF4F_1LlgBBxR-XWI5ZZB6n91m38vYKJkmIvsMzfzBjUF68pR6frrP0BVEHYlmjuZc_jtmLTsAHTuTRxL1HWYl9et2cAeUDiw4UBUEZxwK0eQCVOd0C1OKv5k1jo3v4nV_5hOxo5WToQWxBrGELcy3xGOLAnzj-qwtO149-k8HiN5V393eSTy6m5g%3D)
---
**This race is no different.** The media has tried to write me off from day one. The Left is pouring millions into Michigan. And too many weak Republicans would rather cave than fight. But here’s the truth: Michigan is the deciding ground for America’s future. If we win here, we can secure the America First agenda. If we lose, the Left will lock down this country for years to come. **Patriot, I won’t quit. But I can’t do it alone.** That’s why I’m asking: will you add your name to my supporter list before the books close this month? **[It’s a small step, but it shows the strength of our movement. It tells the world that you’re in the fight with me.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke89xdjOIwJY8pLbXICBI9Zxqdpx7xmjOSnS-eg7IWZvy6toM6JIByI-Zk6-FYhn0lrIzxtOR8Q0N18Wi0ZR-ow6n710DtJx00b5WDY5mmUiXr3_6hg9NspX_KOox9MuN05UugXLP1E8gY4nlaYCMzqdU_M8m4qq6MV7GU9YKk3bgB79dSZRY953QKj2yrxlozri2SxCa4mKnii5rSH4b2dqz1qNpR2NFeLtf8D04hUlPExoRazEpWO1s6zwXJSQVt-TKe1NfIkeowkiFXYr-Fm4jW9hnnZv7T4Iqvm0jHZVu248GRs6uNh94fRngFl5jWcg%3D)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke88ACAReWVvlmiIUlAQuCosSYH_z-sLT-qkAlnc1XK6Nu8zSskwXpIF_7Cu93tIqCbvWE7wja9dDgtPlHwiYjT9sFadVxd9CwD6fwDJSWoXC9gV5ufxrj79ED-pXOJcj2eQJw_LMhazesU-6iCqITi29riA02dUGykgb8Buz-eR6CFND-RqzF3jiH497CfUyn7g8qCfW3uJHiXtNDkTxw0a3utBsi8bejRc1cPRvDtGotlaz5yJHt8oIlsAeDnnYCHixqXIqQ1Rco-moPB6YiOkyvM3-xRqjRd1lQ_0wbMriH6DBXY6RVy_7y1i2Jpfxizg%3D)

From the cockpit of an Apache helicopter to this moment, I’ve always relied on my co-pilots. Today, I’m asking you to fly with me. For faith, for family, for freedom. — John James
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a478b3de061c4729b67470eb20a4d4f8&_e=xz7gbuRatSCLTgsdWA4vDzZLiVPFbZyuzpTbdSRvAPV-Md5zR02lQ1aXqjaIwwhLmqq4N1YOpOp5VGvQ0oFaLwb5CutI2D6cqaUtf2cke8-CeMdq8w8J3YKZxoNODrBcVPFMnu9VB_C-1_NsPsBIh5DQesRL3pHYd0BjNCnzTza4Bfe3fUgVtzl0pYV3kiGE6Ivk4QfVKSU7UrVSfW_jm4uMzJVliyJMm1RQGXN0OwFTBIiG8TsExkYiFRcbG93Y4gc-K1Fl8EOSZ1CIOMdz5dr7R1qnG9FB3PY3cfLay7hzOOFzHwZjwqD1Zh1TL73chmIGfygQcR-M_PG1Qp7FHDhJlO3p-I1lT-T_cIuoEIzf1_23a_LEmzMeQqenR-e2-26fCv3uZpsN5xrVqZAPMqd-WAjSIhcqXf9MY8NSTM4%3D)

**[Add your name: STOP the Trump cover-up>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114750021/568050345/-1957785870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTVkZTY2MC04MzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HPWxt6uSpzkF8qyx4qi0eM1OuOPnuz1zDwkVpw4lxf4=&emci=95074516-838b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f15de660-838b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
Here's what we know:
* Donald Trump and the DOJ have the power to fully release the Epstein Files – but they’ve refused to do it.
* Many of the documents they have released were already in the public domain.
* It is crucial, not just for transparency, but for the survivors, to see these files.

**Here’s the bottom line: This is Donald Trump’s cover-up. Once he found out he was in the files, he blocked the release.**
_We will NOT let him get away with this._ We will keep the pressure on and demand the release of these files. The American people have the right to know. No one – not even the President – is above the law.
**[So we need you by our side. Will you add your name today to stand with me in the fight for accountability and justice – to demand the release of the Epstein Files and the end of Trump's cover-up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114750022/568050346/-1957785870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTVkZTY2MC04MzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HPWxt6uSpzkF8qyx4qi0eM1OuOPnuz1zDwkVpw4lxf4=&emci=95074516-838b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f15de660-838b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**

Here's what we know: Donald Trump and the DOJ have the power to fully release the Epstein Files – but they’ve refused to do it. Many of the documents they have released were already in the public domain. It is crucial, not just for transparency, but for the survivors, to see these files. Here’s the bottom line: This is Donald Trump’s cover-up. Once he found out he was in the files, he blocked the release. We will NOT let him get away with this. We will keep the pressure on and demand the release of these files. The American people have the right to know. No one – not even the President – is above the law. Thanks for making your voice heard, Robert Garcia = = Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znm8ls0co6uaqdibm6rmemkts9u4con9tn98luv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj7clh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp2h110mhg423qmfe39gshqvkdocne6ehioqa6b8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj7clh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6f82p18lreqkj3kvjaviq3p5ldak7u0pr168di8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj7clh2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztl0qg67cj97ur81osg4sgs631ialjii6duhinmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj7clh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr86udb6u4sj1liqr93h5t04vq3o49tm6ap5mn00_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj7clh2bs)

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrahflpsrsurmd0fd9f91realjfa2up62hf4ui90_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb0q16lbps8i7aef5lmcp4rprqob1kcktgf5qkgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcrjeadlhvomp4oc3t82e7c831uv1k8krslhm0h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsi92gi53qhtistvbrmpc0lhnu4h7ol2mjn2f8c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi5t4tc7d1bucapkt66beer0t4gjniurmte020a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z81stsn8vovhq9ih41f7r867mcdhfhpl85354d10_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq94hd8h22ifvck6m4de47nr6uodgb2hbjmrbr98_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuiuqadd0t0obsbs0pnncuknui2iubss6336807o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq3bbde0u1p668l8c45l2jv2qgjg8cjsir0acono_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3gkmtd4cv2pequf9qtapl8qmmd0dedvag2827p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zffvlo8o12hjfbo94974ts0fqb42tnkq6qhgoaog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9j69oj6c3h2bs)

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlkkjdai5hgqlrdvnev9shplmtk74spakb1jj06o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sjmmj56u7lo9m9dr2ijjlno2i4e5lovdt94i28_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zejk1hagj44l74viiecg961a87mpdfp0k4f26m98_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlp7qvb0f2qapmo6d2693gim19vi1m51uffksl9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoiqs9mc8ol8b916dmp441jup4oo7if262bc5ti8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
[DONATE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zci7i33rmin31u1328t4n9ioa0bujba7suo1lobo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
[DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvce3je72m5c541sus3kgk6f2jf03el4hd66ce68_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctl8os9i7m2b5dd2vtr38ba46nnlechd659j608_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zojqlbk9bo7bjgejuuf58j9rnvljju9q1gr7jt8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0v8b70h6tglrk5bpp9f6uqniu6654tneufm3rig_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.

name: Brandon Gill
subject: The most dangerous leftist judge just made a stunning decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
We can’t afford to be silent.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrr0sfjd75gt9hqc4k11po319lf50nqdjmegr4k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)
---
Friend, A SHOCKING ruling just released the lunatic who threatened Trump’s life! If there’s one thing you can do for Trump’s agenda right now, I’m asking that you read this grave update: Months ago, a deranged New York leftist blasted her gruesome desire to “sacrificially K*ll” TRUMP across social media. She was imprisoned for her threats. But now, she’s walking free. That’s because a leftist judge just quietly ordered her release behind your back. _**[And if we don’t take action to stop him, it will mean MORE than just would-be Trump attackers walking FREE. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze530iac5td5kir0e47s8osgg2q4g81c97op3loo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)**_ **You see, the man that released her is Obama-appointed Judge James Boasberg. ** Judge Boasberg is a deranged radical-leftist activist that is fueled entirely by a pure **HATRED for MAGA. ** Judge Boasberg has formed a blockade undermining MAGA policies with nationwide injunctions to THWART Trump’s power as the Commander in Chief at every turn. The moment President Trump ordered the DEPORTATION of dangerous gang members, Judge Boasberg BLOCKED their removal and ordered that these criminals be RETURNED to the U.S. Now, he’s released a violent Trump-deranged leftist back onto the streets. Across the country, leftist judges are ruling from the bench in an attempt to OVERRULE MAGA and tear down President Trump's agenda at will. _**My name is Congressman Brandon Gill and I’ve been sounding the alarm bells for MONTHS in the charge to REMOVE & IMPEACH these rogue judges attempting to undermine President Trump’s agenda with lawfare. **_ Months ago, I was one of the first to immediately CALL FOR articles of impeachment against Judge Boasberg. Now I’m pleading with you to join me. Radical judges like Boasberg will continue to find ways to abandon the Constitution to RULE against MAGA until they’re stopped. _**[That’s why we can't afford to be silent. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjssjhuheogskdo1p5kbut5su8eco66humv7tlv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)**_ Every second we wait is another second the MAGA agenda is being ripped to shreds. Every second we wait is another second a deranged lunatic threatening Trump goes unpunished. **You didn’t turn your back when they dragged Trump to jail for a mugshot. ** **So why would you be silent now when they let the lunatics threatening him walk away FREE?** _**[I’m calling on 10,000 patriots to sign the petition to impeach Judge Boasberg.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5tr0elbff949r4ven1lkq7bdr1v5o31md4m7oo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs)**_ I’m PLEADING with you: _**END THE LAWFARE. **_ [_**Please, all we need from you is a RESPONSE TODAY BEFORE MIDNIGHT.**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhrpift6fjgun1ccor3hg8r866cc7oded4grdtco_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm0p36cth2bs) Sincerely,

name: Mark, NRCC
subject: My stomach turned over when I heard this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I can’t wait for another second to tell you about this crucial update.

Friend, it's Mark. I wish I were reaching out with better news.
There's no silver lining to this.
You see, we entered this year with a STRONG majority - but as time has passed, our House Majority has shrunk, little by little.
We're down to one of the thinnest majorities in modern history.
And that's cranking up the pressure on the mid-terms like never before.
There is NO margin for error this year, and the Democrats know it.
I'm not going to waste your time overwhelming you with fear tactics.
I'm just going to say this:
[If there's ever been a time for you to step up, it's right now, ahead of our critical September fundraising deadline.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4merdg1mc1lni2gk0mp53s8rdffsa14vu07vei8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)

[You can donate $13 - one $ to help us take out EVERY Red-District Democrat in America.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5rcp6jnvrqf3evnpujkll30t4ku63rfenj4pbd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
[You can donate $26 - one $ for every vulnerable, battleground Republican we're defending from RUTHLESS Democrat lies and smears.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrm2s9k2pe6jiqhc3e4fmbltoqjcvm9fnu461ah0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
Or you can donate ANY amount - and I mean ANY amount - to show your support for the MASSIVE list of accomplishments we've already secured this year. [DONATE ANY AMOUNT NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh1viaskj0qf4s4lof3sdrkb9utlcikv7upr4428_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)Thank you in advance for your consideration and support, Friend.
Sincerely,

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqg5icpkg52d6gg5rfp0rl2caqe1eognlesa3gp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zekrsnnvlhltsg5fk2r5sh4kjl0nr3l153f7m6k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ehij3pmg4r9c7mfq4ifn30guf6i19ccf0fpm3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhm62buavbj77r61540pij28qclf5v5ffo1ngmag_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znvjdharp49u23kdnre8k6itgphvbh86j9p6kf7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaje06pib9g58d27p3jip3kc502enqvvmq0k1cqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeca0che3ms018i4s94ef7jots927usdpc4t7a38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdbsp5vjgg4m2v3d9fqmmb3andqovjfohikd16so_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5oirbjg8qgv13mvtccbdodtnc6f2cdrs9e3e3ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl801927pr50ubrp5fbtimqrc2me7fsalccp2ve8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)

# **[LIVE UPDATES: Canonization of Carlo Acutis and Pier Giorgio Frassati, the first saints of Pope Leo XIV](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Blessed Carlo Acutis (left) and Blessed Pier Giorgio Frassati. / Credit: Diocese of Assisi/Public domain via Wikimedia Commons Vatican City, Sep 6, 2025 / 05:00 am (CNA). subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious

| |
---
| | | | | | | My back is against the wall, Friend.

The Left has too much influence, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now, their sights are set on me:
---
| | **[**Jeffries super PAC looks deep into GOP territory for 2026 map**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z36ne2ptgpkhgnhctq0gfk1aec3eqo98erp4e0u0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)**
---

---
| | If I don't catch up, I'll be handing the keys to the radical Left and surrendering our Republican majority to the same forces hell-bent on destroying our country.
---
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's first Secretary of the Interior and was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**

**I 'm also desperately trying to hold on to the most critical seat in Congress. **
---
And if Schumer and Jeffries can take me down, then I can guarantee you no other Republican will stand a chance.
a new paragraph block.
---
**In 2022 and 2024, I led the team of Navy SEALs that held onto the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I 'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington, D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. **
---
So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[I _f you chip in just $5 right now_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbpd5p1ifnjjb03o7srie0qgj2mtqcnr0t49aqh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)** __, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Left 's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrd4125tl8dtt1adruils6fne56tfih1ci7vqgr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm4o71c9h2bs)
---
You have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke
---

name: Brandon Gill
subject: The most dangerous leftist judge just made a stunning decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
We can’t afford to be silent.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpp1un53qlv0sf35si3c59mbk22vmk3agggo0gi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gmcpr2c1h2bs)
---
Friend, A SHOCKING ruling just released the lunatic who threatened Trump’s life! If there’s one thing you can do for Trump’s agenda right now, I’m asking that you read this grave update: Months ago, a deranged New York leftist blasted her gruesome desire to “sacrificially K*ll” TRUMP across social media. She was imprisoned for her threats. But now, she’s walking free. That’s because a leftist judge just quietly ordered her release behind your back. _**[And if we don’t take action to stop him, it will mean MORE than just would-be Trump attackers walking FREE. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpog4mc6d6avp7r5r7q7neq6t1td86g58dfm9pio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gmcpr2c1h2bs)**_ **You see, the man that released her is Obama-appointed Judge James Boasberg. ** Judge Boasberg is a deranged radical-leftist activist that is fueled entirely by a pure **HATRED for MAGA. ** Judge Boasberg has formed a blockade undermining MAGA policies with nationwide injunctions to THWART Trump’s power as the Commander in Chief at every turn. The moment President Trump ordered the DEPORTATION of dangerous gang members, Judge Boasberg BLOCKED their removal and ordered that these criminals be RETURNED to the U.S. Now, he’s released a violent Trump-deranged leftist back onto the streets. Across the country, leftist judges are ruling from the bench in an attempt to OVERRULE MAGA and tear down President Trump's agenda at will. _**My name is Congressman Brandon Gill and I’ve been sounding the alarm bells for MONTHS in the charge to REMOVE & IMPEACH these rogue judges attempting to undermine President Trump’s agenda with lawfare. **_ Months ago, I was one of the first to immediately CALL FOR articles of impeachment against Judge Boasberg. Now I’m pleading with you to join me. Radical judges like Boasberg will continue to find ways to abandon the Constitution to RULE against MAGA until they’re stopped. _**[That’s why we can't afford to be silent. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48hu76bll112pf9aarqb37f1flinbej9pabdpgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gmcpr2c1h2bs)**_ Every second we wait is another second the MAGA agenda is being ripped to shreds. Every second we wait is another second a deranged lunatic threatening Trump goes unpunished. **You didn’t turn your back when they dragged Trump to jail for a mugshot. ** **So why would you be silent now when they let the lunatics threatening him walk away FREE?** _**[I’m calling on 10,000 patriots to sign the petition to impeach Judge Boasberg.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0bcj43v8nqtnjk1a36c9etagvbcgbnf587mfn68_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gmcpr2c1h2bs)**_ I’m PLEADING with you: _**END THE LAWFARE. **_ [_**Please, all we need from you is a RESPONSE TODAY BEFORE MIDNIGHT.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjhp1flu42p7433ootpftg2js61p8eu2g5fi5npo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gmcpr2c1h2bs) Sincerely,

name: John James
subject: I have two words to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
I want to start with two words: thank you.

| | | Patriot, I want to start with two words: **thank you.** Your support means more to me than you know. Without patriots like you, I wouldn’t even have the chance to run this race, much less fight to win it. _Let me share something personal._ I grew up in Detroit, the son of parents who came from the Jim Crow South to make their American Dream possible here in Michigan. My father started a trucking company from nothing, and my parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work matter more than anything else.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7qqgd5mntl662lcgp90el91ahac1bgjfcsp7ekg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)
---
That’s why I went to West Point. That’s why I chose to fly Apache helicopters into combat. And that’s why, after serving in Iraq, I came home determined to create jobs and give back to the community that raised me. I’ve spent my whole life in the fight. Whether it was in uniform overseas, building a business here at home, or defending our values on the campaign trail.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoeu70pf7fe8r6plcpaq3emdmk0k5as9jnsdnrf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)
---
[ **STAND WITH ME** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zig3c1n35gq6menov1b2eit2o3qna8n7qrcq62ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)
---
**This race is no different.** The media has tried to write me off from day one. The Left is pouring millions into Michigan. And too many weak Republicans would rather cave than fight. But here’s the truth: Michigan is the deciding ground for America’s future. If we win here, we can secure the America First agenda. If we lose, the Left will lock down this country for years to come. **Patriot, I won’t quit. But I can’t do it alone.** That’s why I’m asking: will you add your name to my supporter list before the books close this month? **[It’s a small step, but it shows the strength of our movement. It tells the world that you’re in the fight with me.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z456lilc1r2ra86stl27t2mkfrav9pn564glj680_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo05lslm349hd759cjjq5a4binpfijkedk95ba8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)
---
From the cockpit of an Apache helicopter to this moment, I’ve always relied on my co-pilots. Today, I’m asking you to fly with me. For faith, for family, for freedom. — John James
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgeuinadf52l8agojp9gdduvh5cscjho0jkv9100_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c9gm6ob6c3h2bs)

For faith, for family, for freedom. — John James | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Conor Lamb
subject: War, what is it good for?
body:
Sunday thoughts against murder at sea, war in Chicago, and bad metaphors.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..BAGhnutGoLqD6ARmim-Nx3uMrfANXrtiDk6abzK4xKE?) for more
---
# [War, what is it good for? ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=172968822&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTY4ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTcyMzM1MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1OTgyNTUxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Yzv7Wbb-yoxlNcgZ9Bl-oqpAzxMNJcYmVSVNhubmB_w)
### Sunday thoughts against murder at sea, war in Chicago, and bad metaphors.
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---
| Sep 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=172968822&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTY4ODIyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzIzMzUxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzU5ODI1NTEyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIzMzM1MiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yqPSORlbUYvAvhbC5O79oTj_pJo8d75mCqvdcBCNDgo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=172968822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTY4ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTcyMzM1MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1OTgyNTUxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Yzv7Wbb-yoxlNcgZ9Bl-oqpAzxMNJcYmVSVNhubmB_w&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=172968822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTY4ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTcyMzM1MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1OTgyNTUxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Yzv7Wbb-yoxlNcgZ9Bl-oqpAzxMNJcYmVSVNhubmB_w)
---
| | [](https://substack..ox60H6FzvXJkFBS49etEfOXXYcz7gtzhKBCVDa-9GZE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/conorlambpa/p/war-what-is-it-good-for?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

On Friday I guest-authored a [piece](https://substack.com/redirect/8c9fb7b8-fc6f-42dc-a067-3de9972459f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Meidas about how Trump's bombing of a boat from Venezuela was illegal and stupid. In response, a lot of people wrote to say how happy they were for our government to go to war against drug traffickers. (What drug were they trafficking? Who were they? We don't know.) Then yesterday our President posted this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57e55bf5-e25e-4d11-a2b6-05bb3a2d7fbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"War" is fast becoming the metaphor for everything he does. He's at war with drug traffickers, at war with immigrants, at war with trade deficits, and at war with liberal politicians in places like Chicago. The mentality of war just isn't healthy for domestic politics, because in war, you never work with the other side. That's probably why his trade policy has been such a [disaster](https://substack.com/redirect/be25c219-7d1f-41df-87f7-e285b17de7b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There are no common interests in war. There are enemies, and enemies have to be beaten. Which raises a question about the [elimination](https://substack.com/redirect/4192c0b9-af24-41c3-9428-d7f118108937?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of vaccine requirements for children. When those children become infected with measles and diphtheria again, are they soldiers in Trump's army, bearing the burden of his march to power? Or are they his innocent victims?
The readings this week for Catholics include a parable in which Jesus talks about planning ahead, and asks, "what king marching into battle would not first sit down and decide whether with ten thousand troops he can successfully oppose another king advancing upon him with twenty thousand troops?" That might be a good question for Trump now, as it's been two months since we reached the [highest](https://substack.com/redirect/60139431-6d32-4697-a233-876f4315bedb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) number of measles cases after it was declared eradicated in the United States in the year 2000. It's an enemy Trump is not prepared to fight.
The reason I point out this parable is that, in the first year of his papacy, Pope Francis said the [following](https://substack.com/redirect/3a87909c-c17a-4674-a8e1-ff5e3687b839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about it, giving us a radically different usage of "war" as a metaphor:
_This word of the Lord ... essentially tells us: there is a more profound war that we must all fight! It is the firm and courageous decision to renounce evil and its enticements and to choose the good. . . . What is the use of waging war, so many wars, if you aren't capable of waging this profound war against evil? It is pointless! It doesn't work.... **Among other things this war against evil entails saying "no" to the fratricidal hatred and falsehood that are used**. (...) **These are the enemies to fight, united and consistent, following no other interests than those of peace and of the common good**._
It's worth remembering now that both political parties were thrilled to host Pope Francis at the Capitol a decade ago, and had he said these words in front of the U.S. Congress -- had he exhorted them against the lying and fratricidal hatred so common in politics -- he'd have received a standing ovation from both sides of the aisle.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5bd2399d-aead-4d20-bb40-0a419105973e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Today, those problems are far worse. The more Trump lies and declares his hatred for other Americans, or other human beings present in America, the more attached his followers are to that same attitude. Which is why I think Pope Francis's words are worth another look. His point is much more than "kumbaya." He's drawing on a passage in which Jesus tells the crowd, "anyone of you who does not renounce all his possessions cannot be my disciple." It's about sacrifice.
Trump's thirst for war could easily provoke a warlike reaction from those of us who oppose him. If we allowed it to. But we can let that reaction pass, or sacrifice it. In doing so we light a candle rather than curse the darkness. We keep alive the possibility of a country dedicated to the rule of law, in which politics actually could be about being "_**united and consistent, following no other interests than those of peace and of the common good**."_ It feels a long way off, but worth planning for.
Conor Lamb is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Conor Lamb that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.

# Sunday, September 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1813, [the U.S. was ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2unDAUxfHVmM7IGIyhcJGGbtKmRP64DDcxNrLvDGL30Ty9Hbz6Jx0d_f881ofFiOn52x5gaMtrgqtGIIKyBjhtoQMS5e2yxe8YQ4FkyyqFVFzMXOg1WIz3OjTBbAAS-gZMp5WW_aykbnazjapzs5rCNg1eCedn5aaxG61XAYTTDZrPmpiF7oRQcmwnMcgeeuXcNjs_9GwQEJByaf9mTLTDFu_8htL6fDTR7ERnZf0vJhcml-u62h0r5XJ_nMmFdqw82Jtj4t_C5FLhJDgcFK6ZXF4JCQKvZAkqT-j_JXtA4K_kI_Bqj6aYcF4YI9ZRs0E8D4vx6wD9qNrbyP8BAAD__x4Tg4c)[nicknamed Uncle Sam](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2unDAUxfHVmM7IGIyhcJGGbtKmRP64DDcxNrLvDGL30Ty9Hbz6Jx0d_f881ofFiOn52x5gaMtrgqtGIIKyBjhtoQMS5e2yxe8YQ4FkyyqFVFzMXOg1WIz3OjTBbAAS-gZMp5WW_aykbnazjapzs5rCNg1eCedn5aaxG61XAYTTDZrPmpiF7oRQcmwnMcgeeuXcNjs_9GwQEJByaf9mTLTDFu_8htL6fDTR7ERnZf0vJhcml-u62h0r5XJ_nMmFdqw82Jtj4t_C5FLhJDgcFK6ZXF4JCQKvZAkqT-j_JXtA4K_kI_Bqj6aYcF4YI9ZRs0E8D4vx6wD9qNrbyP8BAAD__x4Tg4c), after Samuel Wilson, a New York meat packer who supplied beef to the Army during the War of 1812. In today's _Whatever Happened To_ section, _The Flyover_ revisits the once-thriving [drive-in industry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpSAUQL8GOwyCylBQbGM3225pUC4DG4SXy30S_36z8wvTnuLk5Pz53D9dyql8_XYXWAp1L9BbBiLA3cPLIV1QqIbu8Iwpe4TicJdCLlwYLvTuXcrPPg_eBgAJagA76UVLZRaph2iVMh9aS2_UoaZTLZNYJ2EgHOu5uNmoIdn_NmGEnoRY5Dp-iFkqUMtxBHOcs2KzAJ-o4vi3pkIRQn7qDTie9RqyjUSvxtQvJjcmt977WJ7gRvBvJrdGbw-FOEKrbzyhMblRBB5To4oPr4F7TDfwVPhV7wScIjgCbNwVz3sE_EYPdwi81M7kNqD1r55yTm3VbBZfl0v5O4Z-dPC28l8AAAD__2ivhvE), while a _Podcast Extra_ [spotlights a couple](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAURE8DHStjbIwLF2m227QpkeGPF0cGI_OzaG8fkSukHI00mve-HuPDxxS356df4TjkccN5JDCjjITdF16xcQ6nL_MSExVsvoxSSN0I2wgzko_pPaqaXAAkuhquNdrIzmpp6sXZGdRbGQYbjBHCWBq0lmRgaJoIvo7uWhNWmFYILfvbIJTs0OlpCnaaVVcpAYqcy-07x40XhPTOL5TbnNc6uYV5P6ruo5L3St79fgFc1RUKxzmhkncq8YW4NbzAM0qTE-HgZs4_e0KTzw3laKxq-6G1gw7eQhkBrywMZjOR7Xut6uJoP2NK8ehNpcRz9TH9veB_qXs5-RsAAP__s3uCjQ) keeping the world's oldest drive-in alive.
Today, we are sponsored by [Nimi Skincare](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOozAQRL_G3IKatgnh4MNKCafNrrSHHc0JGbsdesbGkXGC8vcj5hfm-qpUJb2363g1HHi5_TGRdPFpXGhbA5VCeXR0N7lEWkrym8l25uAyLSaPCNgeoD9ANzrD4TWqymlPhCQr0k3Xdij7Frtq1s4a7410HhSCUidAahove7TtZCzYivW-Bj10DUCLx_oECiXJdpp8P1klhQJyXFKuPxIvZSYfXulJubYpVkHPpdxXIX8JHAQO27bVC0deP3mxJtNe2hM5PEoc1_TIloQ8D7_f__6__BN43HEkx48o5PkSDYcqa3ffOARej51QcNvh91n5kaGnxq8AAAD__7Lhevs), offering better-for-you skincare products that are Made In America! ## Defense Department Gets Additional Name
President Trump signed an executive order on Friday, renaming the Department of Defense [the Department of War](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZmRaeMBBw5OOpHN6bILkcEN9MnYyPQOmr9fscl-wMYllerVv-f49BQprX_8jo6XPCa8zojMWMaAhy-8Y-K8XL7MG8VQMPkyggIjlZWqG4On-B7bKrgFEVBX6JrOdKCtga7anEUdvAWwum_R9kEZ6O20zIsxpmlnU5G725RVXaOUgUfdqxY0ajNNi53mVotWYSDOpf6fKfGGS3znF5Z6znsV3cZ8nEL_EjAIGPw034J6zXcsYPibIzHNp4CBy8d-yJPWJHMJWOSN2Smt8sDEfs1JfpPl5YuA4eRc3kIPFIT-3YCBzqjGVsWF46IY6Xx0olXr7il-7eEfnfhy8BkAAP__sKqGfw). The executive order will allow the DOD to use the term Department of War as a "[secondary title](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu9CAUhJ8Gd1hnjy-sC4q_cbd_m9LiclgTYbAwa7RvHzlNpLRpZzQz-ubjsTyUDz4-_6uNZHFpiVSPQKVQXiztKpeNYkmuqmxWH2ymqPKCgAOHiYNYrPLhvfSNlY4IqWtI3sQgsJsGFM0q0Rk7aEdAI7r7qG8aUQDcSRsz2l43Xl5tMIG4AQw4tnfosaNu0NpN2vQd64GsLym3n8nHspIL73RSbk3amiDXUvaDdf8YzgznWmtr9HFRXD7DOfiT-Gu3qtDBcC75te38B40nx6vKXMWYXtHQpR38V6jJ0u7Vh-CPUbAenpvy4Xu__Om0U-JXAAAA__9eG4QQ)" and will let Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth use the title Secretary of War. The rebrand traces to [the original Department of War](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAURVeDOyKCwYSC4jfu8tsprWfzCIwwWPAUy7sfZbYw9dU9Rzpfz-UJKafy-g87Ogp1KXj2jETYFo8HNNqxUA0ntC2m7BsWaIsUUnNhuTCLh5SvRQ3eBUSJ44DubrSRo9XSDNF5s4IGfNjJBjmtwqhwV2CUErBpMHpI7kMTVpi7EFpOt4dQcsRRr2uw66ZGpgT6RLXdvmsqFDHkq76x3ba6D9lFoqOz8R-TM5MzRYwp58_G5HzUnLaLydljwNKRyVmrh9VK8YivjhR5Kp0g5847bg0J2sVr4Cc0XmDHIwN9XkNz_jhTzqlPhinx2iH9Sgb6U7W3kz8BAAD__wVAgbY) established under President George Washington in 1789. The Department of Defense was established in 1949. A [video Hegseth posted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFy6yAQgOHToM6eZQFhCorXqPNrUrjUrGBlkUHCg4gV3z7jXCHtX3zFf7uOV0o5bff_tLJvcxk3PvbMrXEdIz-otpW3VuaDalhSjpU3qiMCmhO4E9gxUsqvUXfRz8zIqmMvrbGonEHbLV5G3U9WGzkhz0QQItlgTGDjWFlJXfJvDRxYCWCwP19Ao2Jlpml2U9BKaOCYWqnnz5K2tvCcX-XJ9RzK2mW_tPbYhfoncBA4fL-rwOGDw42qwGFv1L52gYN0vQYrtb04Y0Bhr3RXfXwcKee091ZouK-U8i_b_vTi6fEnAAD__x91cAw) to the social media platform X shows the nameplate on his office door being swapped out to one that reads "Secretary of War."
## Unemployment Rate Moves Higher
The U.S. economy added 22,000 new jobs in August, and [the unemployment rate inched up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGumzAQRb_G7CZyBghhwSJSxarvbdsdGuwhODE2socg_r6i_YSuRpqre6Sj--tr-CLnXXh-08KdTHEIvGfPIpwGyyslWThInHZKZnbeJg6UBtRYg25BN4Ml54-hKmw3MSOXBXfXpm6wbGtsirmj0XBlGkSsqvpmJzR3Q_qmsb3WjS7vhetOmm51c9W6xtvlrissuazHcWpHU5Wq0mydxHR5RRdk5skf8cPpYuJS-G4WWbMqHwp7hf2-75clhzNT2HOALSvslxj4OC-lN8v52SDDFnhZfTxOQ0gkDK9tWTNIhMCU_AEVHEwJZvecYWd6AyJorcEFk5gygwtA23PLAq84Zki8xiQgzBm2FSa2_7hmE4U9JXg8rj9_u-9ZlX00zqryx-QCBcPw4STzWWGbi9TZdXfeu3xrVKWfCzn_V1f-a6NPh38CAAD__5G5qDQ) to 4.3% from 4.2%, reaching the highest level since late 2021. The rise in the jobless rate, however, stemmed largely from more people entering the labor force last month in search of employment as schools reopened and educational employees returned to work. While few businesses are laying off workers, hiring has slipped [below the pre-pandemic average](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykULGupDAQ-5rQgWYnCYEixTV0e-2VaCCTJatAUMgu4u9PvF94je3Csi3_e45PCjFsr7-0si0-jRufR-RSOI-Od8pl5a0kf1KelxBd5o3yiIC6hr4GMzoK8RpV5axnRpYV24fRBmWv0VSLVa0xpHoA3SrvtWcnZ0WTlIQGH2SqYO806ME8ADS2TQcKJUs9Tb6fZiWFAnahpNy8U9jKwj5e6cu5mdNaRbuUsh9C_hE4CBzO82w-B5Xk6LoNAoejpHwJHNa08c13ncAB-htuRZ_X5yj1O01HnXlPudSOCgkcOt13ykAHYAQOVbZuP0OM4WiNUPBaKcSfFeVX130t_g8AAP__ood_aA). The public sector lost 16,000 jobs, including 15,000 by the federal government under the Trump administration's federal layoffs. The weak jobs numbers make it [a near certainty that the Fed will cut interest rates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUQNHVQEeEH2DsguI37vLbKS0wz4EMhghwoux-lNnC1Fc6xf26rlcbU8y3__ZA0_eyZny1hL1jXT0-bO0H5l72l61biMlXzLauwEExPjOuV29jeq-SerMjAgqKZtBKg5gVaBoMTNvkZo1WaKW0Bb55jwMoPY0KhHA0mo_GZ64HzhWMl4lLECiUc_vsNimI5OhjL_VyLzH3gHt6lyfWy1YOmkzo_dGI-EdgIbD0gCGm9GkEFne2mLE1AouS0zQOkp2N4VZyOd7Met8YwDe7F9eYPW9n6wQWWo1_vGJKsY2aSH47bPwFaf_ToaeBnwAAAP__boh5VA) at its meeting later this month. Rate cuts boost profits, which makes companies more likely to expand operations and hire new employees.
## List: Ranking the Best Places to Retire
Orlando, Florida, was ranked [the best place to retire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMRvInMGUwUMXtnTtiM74HFwdGJlLUN6-Sl-h8y99w_99m2-YOO33L9zISczzTtfJJEJlDnRgkY12yfHCsqyJQ6Edywwa-lqPtR7mgIlfc1cFF4mATEWuHfoBzNjDUK0OoIsaYzTGBG_NaD1iu7Q-0mgRjKmSe2t61EOrdQ-2-dAdGDK993H0S2dUpykkyaX5yWmXlSK_8pNKs-StYreKHKcynwomBdOFzCTrw7-rgonCQ8Hk6ZT6YFzorCXXhSQVUjDZ1vZVceG4EnM67aA6fd8w8Z8t_xrydPAbAAD__3SNdIQ) in the United States for the second year in a row, according to WalletHub. The survey was [based on four metrics:](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u7CAURleDOyzMz2AKite4m9emtDBcj4muwcI3Y83uo0mWkPr7dI50Pu7zPWTM5fE_7OBprXOB60QggjYnOEKjHQrV9QotbhlTgxLaLIU0XDgu7JxCxtesu-RXAAmqAz9YY6VyRtpu88Es2qnknBuMjaPWUY-jsepmhHSrNl32b5pwwg5CGHnrR6GlAmWWZXVL1IppASlTbf1nzYU2WPFVn9D6WPcO_UZ0nEz9Y3Jicrquq4-FWngC_l6YnB4BEdqLyYk24AucxA8MEU5OlTeg3IDnwt_j18mHrvl0XBkxnzfLtHjsIeOPjf6U6OnldwAAAP__LmV6zQ) affordability, activities, quality of life, and health care. Orlando earned the top spot thanks to an abundance of quiet communities, great restaurants, and independent stores. Scottsdale, Minneapolis, Miami, and Tampa round out the top five. The bottom five locations in the 182-city survey were Newark, N.J, followed by four California cities: Bakersfield, Rancho Cucamonga, Stockton, and San Bernardino.

**Whatever happened to Drive-In Movies?** Drive-in movies were once a staple of American life, peaking in the late 1950s with over 4,000 screens across the country, complete with concession stands, staticky window speakers, and often a playground for pajama-clad kids to use before the movie started. Today, they're at best a niche business. [Drive-ins were buried under an avalanche of problems,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpSAUQL8GOwyCylBQbGM3225pUC4DG4SXy30S_36z8wvTnuLk5Pz53D9dyql8_XYXWAp1L9BbBiLA3cPLIV1QqIbu8Iwpe4TicJdCLlwYLvTuXcrPPg_eBgAJagA76UVLZRaph2iVMh9aS2_UoaZTLZNYJ2EgHOu5uNmoIdn_NmGEnoRY5Dp-iFkqUMtxBHOcs2KzAJ-o4vi3pkIRQn7qDTie9RqyjUSvxtQvJjcmt977WJ7gRvBvJrdGbw-FOEKrbzyhMblRBB5To4oPr4F7TDfwVPhV7wScIjgCbNwVz3sE_EYPdwi81M7kNqD1r55yTm3VbBZfl0v5O4Z-dPC28l8AAAD__2ivhvE) starting with a change in land economics. Theaters needed at least five and up to 50+ acres of land for one screen, and by the 1970s, that land was worth far more for housing, malls, or warehouses. Additionally, new competition arrived, first in the form of multiplex theaters featuring many movies in one location, and later with the rise of TV, followed by color TV, VCR/DVDs, and finally home streaming. By 2008, only about 400 drive-ins had survived, and the number is probably half that now. Today, the few hundred drive-in screens still existing are used mainly for nostalgia programming and community events. _Do you have a fond memory of going to the drive-in? Let us know by replying to this email._

On this day in 1813, , after Samuel Wilson, a New York meat packer who supplied beef to the Army during the War of 1812. In today's Whatever Happened To section, The Flyover revisits the once-thriving , while a Podcast Extra keeping the world's oldest drive-in alive. Today, we are sponsored by , offering better-for-you skincare products that are Made In America! Their clean and effective products are made with Faith, Family, and Freedom in mind. Flyover readers get 15% off their first order with code at checkout! | Defense Department Gets Additional Name President Trump signed an executive order on Friday, renaming the Department of Defense . The executive order will allow the DOD to use the term Department of War as a "" and will let Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth use the title Secretary of War. The rebrand traces to established under President George Washington in 1789. The Department of Defense was established in 1949. A to the social media platform X shows the nameplate on his office door being swapped out to one that reads "Secretary of War." Unemployment Rate Moves Higher The U.S. economy added 22,000 new jobs in August, and to 4.3% from 4.2%, reaching the highest level since late 2021. The rise in the jobless rate, however, stemmed largely from more people entering the labor force last month in search of employment as schools reopened and educational employees returned to work. While few businesses are laying off workers, hiring has slipped . The public sector lost 16,000 jobs, including 15,000 by the federal government under the Trump administration's federal layoffs. The weak jobs numbers make it at its meeting later this month. Rate cuts boost profits, which makes companies more likely to expand operations and hire new employees. List: Ranking the Best Places to Retire Orlando, Florida, was ranked in the United States for the second year in a row, according to WalletHub. The survey was affordability, activities, quality of life, and health care. Orlando earned the top spot thanks to an abundance of quiet communities, great restaurants, and independent stores. Scottsdale, Minneapolis, Miami, and Tampa round out the top five. The bottom five locations in the 182-city survey were Newark, N.J, followed by four California cities: Bakersfield, Rancho Cucamonga, Stockton, and San Bernardino. Backed by Harvard scientists, this simple method was tested on 347 people with swollen feet and showed rapid results in flushing out fluid buildup. Just seconds a day helped participants walk freely, stand longer, and reduce pain. to see how easily you can regain comfort and mobility. | Whatever happened to Drive-In Movies? Drive-in movies were once a staple of American life, peaking in the late 1950s with over 4,000 screens across the country, complete with concession stands, staticky window speakers, and often a playground for pajama-clad kids to use before the movie started. Today, they're at best a niche business. starting with a change in land economics. Theaters needed at least five and up to 50+ acres of land for one screen, and by the 1970s, that land was worth far more for housing, malls, or warehouses. Additionally, new competition arrived, first in the form of multiplex theaters featuring many movies in one location, and later with the rise of TV, followed by color TV, VCR/DVDs, and finally home streaming. By 2008, only about 400 drive-ins had survived, and the number is probably half that now. Today, the few hundred drive-in screens still existing are used mainly for nostalgia programming and community events. Do you have a fond memory of going to the drive-in? ## City of Austin Blasted Over $1.1 Million Rebrand
The City of [Austin faced backlash](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3SAQRb8GdzzB2F6vC4oXRW6ilxQpUlqYGdsjYXgCdtn9-4j9he2uNJqre86_x_qw7Dkcv-1FpnzscQ1Us6dSKLXo4xF3ttlFH8NxxhRyom0FBaNUs1TTipb95zp0aDaFs-7I6GmcYIBZjd1pRoR-m2e9O8IXxIF63GZ0uDmN-7zpjk0rU7OatFZ66G8A2rrXEfpXAD2NKAZFyCWmWzmp0IfNu_-M75RuLl6dN2cpzyz6u4BFwFJrvV05tJuAhYJ8ywKWBiVg-cr2LRcOWQaqsuFJTLZm6RIXdpwv2bolUuYjSBtQFr44HO0zyftdP9Sf8kv0S3SMov_5o9mjmv9SenbJ4LOy95xfJjGo47Lsv2aW78l9N_A_AAD__2pLkKM) after unveiling a $1.1 million logo redesign to replace its 1916 seal, which officials said no longer reflects the city's values and mission. The redesign, announced two months before a proposed property tax hike amid a record deficit, followed the City Council's approval of a $564,000 contract with design firm Pentagram. The remainder of the $1.1 million allocated for the rebrand will pay for advertising, branded materials, and new staff to manage the branding. Among the redesign critics was U.S. Rep. Chip Roy, who criticized the city's move in light of the recent Cracker Barrel rebranding effort. You can see the new logo unveiled by Austin [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu7CAMRb-GdIyMh7wKitukm9ueMiLBSSwxMALmkb8_Yn7hNJYly0t77Z_bfLPsOez_7Z1M-WxxDvTOnkqhVFcf97ixzWv0MexHTCEnWmYEbCWMEvrZWfbnrBtnFnCjasiovu1R4whtcxiEYXAIrR6pG1y3bNSpdd2s7hbUgNCwqTAYoVcKlL5eEJVdhxavA6LqWyc0kOMS06UcVOhj8-bP-KJ0WeO98eYo5ZHF9Z_ASeAUzkfMpZ4ETpUscIKxjk7g9Myy-gmc7DMXDvLLk8_wIvZZJnKUeQ9y5XLK6i4Xmw9ycjllosyOQqnfTTLu8WbvOXe90LDfLftvnvK3Fl8GfwMAAP__SauGRA).
## Texas Bracing For Flash Flooding
Gov. Greg Abbott mobilized [Texas emergency management resources](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnjAQhJ8GOiN7MQcULtLQXdqUaMFrsGRYZG-4-98-4s8jXPdJMxrNzJ_P-RNjiuf2Gw9y8h14PumrJBKh_GDijUPEsnLic9s5nyXTMoOGTulR6X72GNNrtrV3i_ajqcmZvuvBwqi7endDaxbUg0Fvw2IHGxby_gO6sLZkeu3r6J4wPereGG1s2wAYXIcO2gHA9J2vrCYfhXMjOwl9YwnpxTflZuWjTm4XuUrV_qpgqmDa-G7epmbju4LpmVPBdHGR_yrlk7PCZWERhavEG4WKKoJCig7KG53rS2UqF5-FHuC_eaWicCf0ioMKidkr2TOh1Nn56yumFMtHX1m9HRjTu5n87M_bwb8AAAD__9drjk4) Saturday as moisture from Hurricane Lorena was expected to bring dangerous flash flooding across parts of the state. Lorena and a stalled front will converge over Texas this weekend into early next week, leading to possible rainfall rates of 2-3 inches per hour. Downpours capable of producing flash flooding will be most common in West and South Texas. The Texas Hill Country, lying within the higher-risk zone for this event, is especially vulnerable to flash flooding. Texans are encouraged to follow instructions from local officials, make an emergency plan, and build a kit containing emergency supplies. You can see a map of the projected trajectory of the storm [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpyAQxp8GOwyMKFpQXGO3115pZmVAcggbwHX37S_-9xGum8xMfr8v35-37Q1DDMn_xpNM-3J5S3TXSK1RecaYfXYB655jTv7IJdVC7xsIGLlYuNCbxRC_N9VZ8y7sIjsyUo8aFCxi7A4jLc5gtZikHCaHVqACNZOeCDQsirpgHphYhJZSSDX0ABL3eYRhBpB6tEwJsqHl0reDGn1hdfE7f1Lp93x20RytfVQ2_GKwMljv--5x36-bsB0_PwxWSs_pZ8VdLrRjbZXBajF5Kvmq3EWsB3cxZxuS5yXUvzwk_hJyrNxf0fFIrj1qHnOhhPzMobarEPcvNINVzhLmRXfF2I87xBjqpJkS_sQQX4Hb_9X8aeBfAAAA__9NkZRG).
## Houston Company Faces Dumping Charges
A Houston-based company faces [felony charges](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0TD2A6hoNjG3dt2SwsDttFixoLxS_L3q-wvvO5KVzo6On--5i-Xcirbb3dEy6-V5hKfLUfmWD8z00Zrcs1TprLtVEurcZkRcJRgJOg5uJTf89AFu0AwqotW6VHjgAbGbrdqCQijQTBg7uvyiCsChgHWXo0jDtAl-4GBAa0UqKG_ISrnHyP2D0SlxyAGiCEx1RvvkePLtTW_6TvWm6ejy3ZnPpvofwmcBE5u8ar_PAKnkxoLnHa6GlORntoROXl5uHKtzvNVY5V-d3WLQYbrOFPZpAKQm8uZSpOePJWLZSZOVORzTxwlub9ycW-6BE5K66GHuxE4ddWG85lyTu2uxQDb4VL-r8g_C_tt8V8AAAD__9PyjQs) for pollution after being accused of dumping 100 gallons of coconut moisturizer into the White Oak Bayou. Immacule Lab Corporation, a cosmetics manufacturer, was investigated by the office of Harris County Constable Pct. 1 after area residents reported their findings of a strange substance in the Harris County bayou. Investigators found the same substance from the bayou inside a nearby facility, and confirmed with the facility manager that a bad batch of the substance was discharged into the bayou without a permit. The Constable's office claimed the maximum punishment for the offense is a $10,000 fine and 10 years in prison. You can see a photo of the coconut lotion in the White Oak Bayou [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL8GMyy4KmhA8BKzeemGFsJVqUXulOA48_db7i9s1kFXd53z9ZgeNsSQ1v92R1PeC00JrxyxFDzuGGmlJdjsKFJaNzpSPnCeQEDHxcCFnrwN8TO1lTez8IOs0EjdaWhhEF21GQtK2x4AWg9CO40KGjc0QyOU6mepqmDuMTEILaWQbVMDSOv6DpoeQOrOs1agD4WOumxY8G3zEj_0wqN2tFfRbKU8M2v-MRgZjNd11Qu9QW105kLpLjEYbyoGoyNH6Sw8UgmUuD_3J3p-baEgJ_vNZ_uhk4d9t-6MyKOdq8P45xViDFlp1op1tyH-Ppe_-XoZ-AkAAP___ciAYQ).

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | City of Austin Blasted Over $1.1 Million Rebrand The City of after unveiling a $1.1 million logo redesign to replace its 1916 seal, which officials said no longer reflects the city's values and mission. The redesign, announced two months before a proposed property tax hike amid a record deficit, followed the City Council's approval of a $564,000 contract with design firm Pentagram. The remainder of the $1.1 million allocated for the rebrand will pay for advertising, branded materials, and new staff to manage the branding. Among the redesign critics was U.S. Rep. Chip Roy, who criticized the city's move in light of the recent Cracker Barrel rebranding effort. You can see the new logo unveiled by Austin . Texas Bracing For Flash Flooding Gov. Greg Abbott mobilized Saturday as moisture from Hurricane Lorena was expected to bring dangerous flash flooding across parts of the state. Lorena and a stalled front will converge over Texas this weekend into early next week, leading to possible rainfall rates of 2-3 inches per hour. Downpours capable of producing flash flooding will be most common in West and South Texas. The Texas Hill Country, lying within the higher-risk zone for this event, is especially vulnerable to flash flooding. Texans are encouraged to follow instructions from local officials, make an emergency plan, and build a kit containing emergency supplies. You can see a map of the projected trajectory of the storm . Houston Company Faces Dumping Charges A Houston-based company faces for pollution after being accused of dumping 100 gallons of coconut moisturizer into the White Oak Bayou. Immacule Lab Corporation, a cosmetics manufacturer, was investigated by the office of Harris County Constable Pct. 1 after area residents reported their findings of a strange substance in the Harris County bayou. Investigators found the same substance from the bayou inside a nearby facility, and confirmed with the facility manager that a bad batch of the substance was discharged into the bayou without a permit. The Constable's office claimed the maximum punishment for the offense is a $10,000 fine and 10 years in prison. You can see a photo of the coconut lotion in the White Oak Bayou . | Flying together with our sponsor I never realized how much my old shoes were holding me back until I tried . Now hear me: _WE’RE GOING TO DO IT ANYWAY._
This isn’t a political thing; We have the right to do it because I HAVE AN OBLIGATION TO KEEP AMERICA SAFE!

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. | 15 Days Until Early Voting
---
| |
---
| Common Sense Over Nonsense
---
| Team,
Please remind friends early voting begins in just 15 days. FYI all House Democrats in Washington D.C. voted against the Working Family Tax Cut Act. This bill codifies 28 Trump Executive Orders, prevented the largest tax increase on the middle class in history, supports safe cities, and adds jet fuel to our economy.
My fellow Republicans and I stand for God, Family, the Constitution, Freedom, a good business environment, and common sense. Democrat policies championed by Spanberger are nonsense, such as boys in girls bathrooms, boys in girls sports, gender surgery on minors, open borders, releasing dangerous criminals on to our streets, and defunding the police are obviously not Christian and obviously not moral. We are not supposed to accept evil as good. Why do democrats continue to support criminals over law abiding citizens? Please ask friends to vote Republican.
We've been working hard to inform as many people as possible about all Republican candidates. All three statewide offices and all 100 House of Delegates seats are on the ballot this November. We have been knocking doors, writing checks, putting up signs, and [waving good morning](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vCZisH01SfB85oPkui04nxNrKdLfUrKl3XOFOvq36RT3LN8_N6lf2246gHaTF5ahk5HcM31IMnNbTpBaYatx0naSzOKoIvrupDTvRh9d0-4nczUu-h9NITB2BkCWov0-uSWCB8oCSpNB9uFvi2PuJh-T7jM0HiCjX8RcJgkYvvRkzbxCml9YMlXODHCd7kkw&c=qccW3Hi8EN4PUWNFGcLPTFfqVFAKOqjYCMwcVzW08cDEYh8DVchHpQ==&ch=zFK9d-v8OA_gaW9XJwyW1jI8dgtcQaQbFxGXQf0nPqLSp67mDcnpmw==) all over the 5th congressional district.
I recommend you vote early on September 19th so then you can focus your time on helping us get your family, friends, and others to vote. Winsome Sears and the rest of the Republican ticket are right on the issues, but it won't matter unless we can turnout the vote.
Here are some photos from around the district and some of what we have been up to:

Thank you President Trump and Governor Youngkin for working with me and others to bring good jobs and manufacturing to our district. I am pleased to announce Hitachi is investing $1 billion into the USA including $437 million in South Boston that will bring us 800 good paying jobs. We have been talking with seven CEO's about bringing their factories to our district for over 8 months now. I know for sure we are going to get at least three of those along with many more good paying jobs. Hitachi's invest is all part of President's Trump's plan to become energy dominant, America First! body:
#

Team -- we're asking you to donate $3 today.
No, that’s not a typo — just $3.
There are three Democrats running for the U.S. Senate in the most competitive seats that GIFFORDS has already endorsed, and the outcome of these three races will help decide which party holds the Senate majority.
_We’re officially endorsing Democrats Jon Ossoff in Georgia, Roy Cooper in North Carolina, and Sherrod Brown in Ohio._
Democrats need to flip four seats to retake the Senate majority. National Republicans are going to spend whatever it takes to flood the airwaves with negative attacks against Democrats like these, so we have to fight back.
**That’s why we’re asking you to chip in $3 to help us support Democrats like these three and elect gun safety champions across the country.**
[**So what do you say? Chip in $3 or more so GIFFORDS PAC can reach voters in swing states >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250907-1-b&t=1&akid=10850%2E3935704%2E5QHKqh)

body:
This is all part of Trump’s authoritarian takeover:
| Team, this is ALL part of Trump’s authoritarian takeover: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93605?t=6&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t) _We’re heartbroken:_ Trump cut over a BILLION dollars from public broadcasting, and now stations across the country — especially in rural and red areas! — are suffering.

**Republican or Democrat, young or old — this hurts ALL of us.**

[**Folks, we will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for DESTROYING public media. The Corporation for Public Broadcasting enriched all of our lives and this is a devastating loss. We’re sending them a letter to thank them for DECADES of service and to show our support in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93605?t=7&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t) | [**Stand with the Corporation for Public Broadcasting: Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93605?t=8&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t)
---
TO: The Corporation for Public Broadcasting
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To the Corporation for Public Broadcasting,

Thank you. Thank you for enriching all of our lives — in rural and urban areas, and everywhere in between — with your various news and educational programs.

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93605?t=9&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93605?t=10&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21112%2E878179%2E-8EO1t) to request fewer emails.
