name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: If SEPTA is sacred, it must be deal-worthy
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de9b4cee54&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[A turning point for local journalism — welcome to Fideri News Network](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d070f99e8e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Terry Tracy_
From the founding of our republic, the health of our civic life has rested upon a simple but profound truth: a free and independent press is not merely a feature of democracy — it is one of its chief guarantors. The framers understood that liberty is not self-perpetuating; it must be renewed through informed citizens, accountable institutions, and a shared commitment to truth that transcends partisan preferences.

It is with that conviction that I share news of a significant milestone. _Broad + Liberty_ has acquired Access Network, bringing together two of the fastest-growing media organizations in our region under one banner: the Fideri News Network.

With this step, we are creating one of the largest native digital media audiences in Pennsylvania, serving communities from Harrisburg to Philadelphia to the Jersey Shore, and beyond.

**Why It Matters.** The choice of the name Fideri — from the Latin “to trust” or “to be faithful” — is deliberate. Trust is not an entitlement of the press; it is a covenant with the reader, earned through consistency, rigor, and moral courage. In Latin, fideri means more than personal reliability—it means fidelity to the bonds of trust that uphold institutions, civic life, and the public good.

Fidelity in journalism is to recognize that our work does more than record events — it shapes our civic conscience. It reflects the lived realities of our neighbors and provides the compass by which communities chart their collective future.

In this work, we see ourselves as stewards, not proprietors, of a tradition that predates us and will outlast us if we tend to it faithfully. The press is, in the words of Alexis de Tocqueville, the “chief democratic instrument of freedom,”— a moral instrument for the advancement of the public good.

As Fideri News Network grows, so too does our obligation to the citizens we serve. We will continue to inform with clarity, challenge with civility, and hold power to account without fear or favor. In doing so, we hope to not only chronicle the events of our time but to help secure the conditions for liberty in its own cradle.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e04d82f01d&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[If SEPTA is sacred, then it must be deal-worthy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=50495c5049&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_

Who knew that SEPTA was so sacred?

Growing up in South Philly and having lived in Paoli for decades, after years as a public policy advocate and then a governmental official, [I wrote a column on the SEPTA “funding crisis.”](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ba7d888a13&e=b7b3eddce2) A lifetime rider of SEPTA — subways, buses, and regional rail — my straightforward column pointed out that: 84 percent of SEPTA’s budget comes from taxpayers (among the highest on the east coast), the share contributed by riders is falling, ridership is only 72 percent of pre-Covid levels, routes haven’t been restructured in 60 years, and crime is so bad that the legislature actually created a “special prosecutor” just for SEPTA.

So, maybe SEPTA ought to get its house in order and develop a plan of action before Governor Shapiro and the legislature just toss in more taxpayer money.

Why It Matters. SEPTA is apparently so special that it deserves whatever funding it wants, no oversight — no accountability, even when it loses customers and quality. There’s nothing like it.

SEPTA (like public education) has a fanbase that romanticizes about what mass transit is and what it means, like in a novel about a European vacation — having nothing to do with SEPTA’s reality.
But if, in fact, SEPTA is that special and truly needs money, as a SEPTA rider, I’ll offer a suggestion — so the “trains can run on time.”

One option is for Team SEPTA to offer to do something important to those legislators who are skeptical of giving more taxpayer money to SEPTA.
Yes, _quid pro quo._

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43751c2805&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Broad + Liberty unites with Access Network in strategic acquisition, creating one of PA’s largest native digital media audiences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7031e57b3c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Claim: Shapiro had no ‘need to know’ about harassment claims against cabinet-level director](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=52f63897ee&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: NEA’s ‘Everyone Is Welcome’ toolkit pushes politics, not academics](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4ee208dba&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Fitzpatrick, Perry join bipartisan group with bill to ban congressional stock trading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=991342d007&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Safe and secure? Don’t bet on it.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0bf60f1a67&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Deadlier than the O.K. Corral — South Philly’s modern-day shootout](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e1d24785b8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Questions at the font — journalists visit the Mormon Temple](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43dde4b417&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Reel: Grassroots and astroturf](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cf3bdf5c95&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
"Butler is not a true-crime book and it is not a campaign chronicle. It is a report from a political realignment as it crests, a dispatch from what Zito argues is the decisive reshaping of Pennsylvania’s electorate and, by extension, the country’s.”

So writes [Oliver Bateman this week for _RealClear Pennsylvania_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6561e0098e&e=b7b3eddce2) in his review of [Salena Zito’s latest book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=82b5cc9266&e=b7b3eddce2). Zito has long chronicled the political landscape in western Pennsylvania, and by now many other observers of the political scene are noticing what she has been saying for years: the commonwealth is changing politically from the keystone of the late-20th-century Blue Wall to an increasingly red swing state. “Democrats can still win Pennsylvania,” Bateman says, “yet the default setting has flipped.”
---
|
# **5\. Football is back**
A fierce rivalry. A Super Bowl banner. A star player ejected before the first play of the game. Even a lightning storm. Thursday’s NFL season opener had everything. Read about it all in [Anthony SanFilippo’s rundown of the Eagles’ 24-20 win over the Cowboys](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=48c74cce42&e=b7b3eddce2) at OnPattison – now a part of the Fideri News Network.
---
|
# **6\. Download our app!**
If you’re reading this, you already know we’re the only place you can find certain stories in Pennsylvania—the ones other outlets won’t touch, the ones that dig deeper, and the straightforward political news that keeps you ahead of the spin. Now, we’re bringing that news straight to you — faster, clearer, and without the noise.

The _Broad + Liberty_ mobile app is here, and they’re the fastest way to get Pennsylvania’s real news. [Read all about it here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b6b4b0dd5e&e=b7b3eddce2)!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Terry Tracy From the founding of our republic, the health of our civic life has rested upon a simple but profound truth: a free and independent press is not merely a feature of democracy — it is one of its chief guarantors. The framers understood that liberty is not self-perpetuating; it must be renewed through informed citizens, accountable institutions, and a shared commitment to truth that transcends partisan preferences. It is with that conviction that I share news of a significant milestone. Broad + Liberty has acquired Access Network, bringing together two of the fastest-growing media organizations in our region under one banner: the Fideri News Network. With this step, we are creating one of the largest native digital media audiences in Pennsylvania, serving communities from Harrisburg to Philadelphia to the Jersey Shore, and beyond. Why It Matters. The choice of the name Fideri — from the Latin “to trust” or “to be faithful” — is deliberate. Trust is not an entitlement of the press; it is a covenant with the reader, earned through consistency, rigor, and moral courage. In Latin, fideri means more than personal reliability—it means fidelity to the bonds of trust that uphold institutions, civic life, and the public good. Fidelity in journalism is to recognize that our work does more than record events — it shapes our civic conscience. It reflects the lived realities of our neighbors and provides the compass by which communities chart their collective future. In this work, we see ourselves as stewards, not proprietors, of a tradition that predates us and will outlast us if we tend to it faithfully. The press is, in the words of Alexis de Tocqueville, the “chief democratic instrument of freedom,”— a moral instrument for the advancement of the public good. As Fideri News Network grows, so too does our obligation to the citizens we serve. We will continue to inform with clarity, challenge with civility, and hold power to account without fear or favor. 🎉 **Special Election Victory:_DLCC Spotlight Candidate flips a key seat in the Iowa Senate_ **
DLCC Spotlight Candidate Catelin Drey won her special election, flipping a seat in the Iowa Senate and breaking the GOP’s supermajority in the chamber. Her victory will give Democrats increased power and serve as a warning to the GOP that voters are rejecting their out-of-touch and extreme agendas. [Learn more about her special election victory here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pAec_R2GLLiyEObrvaZNygJ6CirUUxQnAkFPmSR6zPd_Z7_DgIzExnO-3TsoeR4jaCpfluVO6QYq-y1bRZ-C50gJd_t94kkTFjbeM-C8w1tSGfxX4iEqR0lmqtQIjByIBrszbJHsN9YMPihR3B2lxxI-USXTTxyTL6GIM9vnEiQ_E2X3g-PD23qr0UtIvOp7bYs_4bxzlO4hu-M0fdfXOPRj_AlT6DJsu2HixTrGQuLjw3V5J2Urmq-MhAPwgnn3chYIlJljKCRnfRKw7gbocUlY9hW5JQCggAcPqOlwFNjVrRiugLJG5F2kENHHr1V4NGJBkDjPHRQibHktkZg5KwH4x24UrVlRty5zpibU411G4PBFtx-98jeV_g-H2qboNCZi8ZE7mo0lsVy7pjBuSvlHQGsomdjNDigxMfTPuWpyVx3PU2cZum_BFAHar9pzUMeHCVXaa9k3ancGFBJ3ZYHKoZMInngMkKBnsZ-qs8CtfN14wfkQjqJjlNbSeHdeVK-ZgnKoRK5P2DHr-TccJA7JE3lGV5slF2t4S41lh3Aa3FmqyjgZftn13JRfYGVlNc/4jp/Z2a6z349QeaBLFlxB1mVIw/h1/h001._0VyLX2PcJfIPPPJ6iN7vCX5Smc3V33vGhyz56CO1HE)

Amid intensive redistricting fights in states like California and Texas, Missouri Republicans just started a special session where they will attempt to rig the maps that would allow them to cheat the system and protect their meager House majority. [Learn more here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3XQ6QQ9AGEEMz_7YC6wQDQUkpEtXESZ3ZeadHRlXCUAZ--ZQ-UBt3SUWoA_94oPjR3-RMT8MbY6PK5bLPAzEKEgyvenALysXlbu1ryLRtUFXsVfDTnFYjh0IjpwRZEPqNo0H9F5IvChHtj2Vb50Zr12-zFDFlNxFwSAdPb0tsFqAvR2JZ79I8WjFY5p-V1SkwbaUrBkjBa2I62vYcRp67LCYFWStwJVXNCop6O3N0KONMzxX6lo_LY6ng1AntBZA4GmFD7BR_I0VxmXuiDZb6UhgJC64DVMEwH-VmJr_c_oy6eE10gWAhSRs2bkmbgFgt_EzPwQlqNeKYsndV6GAn9aEkiRM_FnHnYV0j9KdeFklPkuieJ-4zzd4-NHJZa5XztRv0EdzU8p4egYYKnBoxuO8-AorCp8saw7BexHtqAHBBlob8CDrtn9DNIU_V9GsDfYym50bWiXhgyIGgmZBN72qxE98qt4DlWDKWOObkADs5wZBIaN2cvfvLbcikKu0kh2HVTGgpE52iUEHAQfIxC72yB2zgH0rak39uGnHQZDq9_eJZ83kRNkXYFb-MyrtLQ/4jp/Z2a6z349QeaBLFlxB1mVIw/h3/h001.q_BCIrQ7D39L96wXsc4cDXdxGR_FrXjz1GMXOZowcu4)
👥 **Gun Safety Fight:_Minnesota Democrats call for a special session on gun safety_ **
Democratic Governor Tim Walz is calling a special session for Minnesota lawmakers to vote on a package of gun safety measures, including a ban on assault weapons. This timely session is the Democrats' direct response to the devastating mass shooting the state experienced just over a week ago. [Read more here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVeKLIn3SKEOA_YBVly3TiSr3Z-6-gxhMAHZzhRDxGUCe-X62XQdl7VK8Ykg9-_zANDm2TtjFc8qkxPUJgMFw-e2fZRshRtzHMXDlD7ZJBH1JibT9up_VC5M3BaMKda_qs_Z9k0UHVf8oEmN19x39yCB8o0oGmCoy-J_73EHo62YoPCio4glPmDOUicg9SlbB0Rj4rj0Rbini_jAK-ogA1Sq8KQPpRal7jm3D2ZBwzMFrKhxjk8p7AxCnqxtwDgjBPYtjwQ1z12iu3Ca5TtqDHqGVtm9r0sbmHLdgBPOoXzv9hjeiQFGeqMffPPDkL8YwrdBXbHwDh_A2FP4lHFTq_RacTfFzaouasdHNy69zire0lIa00dTt1V8L2nHolU9D6QWJUp2PQnRJRVl-UOigL9OzJCA6xMFFS97GDKCuOwea7onkPd7rZvKs-Hb7RGJtQaIlUyYKhf6SBGIWvh69qdLAMPxztokWrwqaHJw86le_r5vbWB3YLzVIuLw3Df0vLgg_HPgk65RkJRHcrgp9vwmQE3Y-dmUDGcMmLuk7Y18Aqf_iH6aw_QdXQ4GAyWgFUOT9rV5CBrfAsgx_4Zt6Q7A2dGSPUilN9G05hqFH96R1w-Cp88kcds8UgV9KA9ADsOHrXZ_BAffaYvPi-9G0hdyPg7A6uRdlzjesMQ2PaHUYdeLdTVcDaqEzb0q8KpBlLBoSvNVHN0DmWDZVHAz07sKc1huJw9RkC4cxCff92Td_/4jp/Z2a6z349QeaBLFlxB1mVIw/h4/h001.6M2yLzCUwpcWZLjEyrykeiJWr4vp-aCW-Jtgryav5jk)

Her victory will give Democrats increased power and serve as a warning to the GOP that voters are rejecting their out-of-touch and extreme agendas. 🗺️ Missouri Redistricting Alert:Republicans call a special session on redistricting Amid intensive redistricting fights in states like California and Texas, Missouri Republicans just started a special session where they will attempt to rig the maps that would allow them to cheat the system and protect their meager House majority. 👥 Gun Safety Fight:Minnesota Democrats call for a special session on gun safety Democratic Governor Tim Walz is calling a special session for Minnesota lawmakers to vote on a package of gun safety measures, including a ban on assault weapons. This timely session is the Democrats' direct response to the devastating mass shooting the state experienced just over a week ago. 🗳️ Upcoming elections:Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing nearly 200 elections in the coming months, and a runoff election in less than three weeks. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: One quick way you can help today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
There is no reason for assault rifles to be on the streets, where they can fall into the hands of anyone capable of such horrific violence.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sep25-assault-weapons-ban/?source=em250907-1-180&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)
Team — I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll keep this quick.
On August 27th, a despicable human being used an assault rifle to open fire on the Annunciation Catholic Church here in Minneapolis as a group of school children were praying.
2 children were killed, and over a dozen more were injured.
**Team, there is no reason for assault rifles to be on the streets, where they can fall into the hands of anyone capable of such horrific violence.**
Polls show that a vast majority of Americans agree we should ban these weapons of war. It's long, long, long past time for politicians to act accordingly.
**[Please, add your name to my petition calling on my colleagues in Congress to put an assault weapons ban to a vote. Let’s put Republicans on record siding with the NRA and choosing more gun violence over the safety of our kids and the safety and peace of mind of everyone in this country.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sep25-assault-weapons-ban/?source=em250907-1-180&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)
**[Add your name](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sep25-assault-weapons-ban/?source=em250907-1-180&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)**
Thank you in advance for adding your name today.
In solidarity and in loving memory of everyone who has been taken from us by gun violence,
— Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1800_791427_DJk397&akid=1800%2E791427%2EDJk397)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

475B in waste cut. Should Americans get 5K back You decide.

Refund Survey results right now and just noticed something: _**You haven’t responded.**_ Only confirmed responses will be included in the final report to House GOP leadership, and _**unless you take 30 seconds right now to weigh in,**__**your name will be left off the list.**_ Let’s be clear: D.O.G.E. has already uncovered over **$475 BILLION** in waste and bloat. name: MTG
subject: I am giving away this M249 to celebrate our constitutional freedoms
body:
Enter for your chance today
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1655652/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQ25nQ3Z6VDN2cw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDc/LbmNsdlI0U2U0NA/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdjY2STE3NWxscw/gaL2HGg/s8o4a5384a7)
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**_The Second Amendment to the United States Constitution_****:**
**_A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed._**
Patriot, our Founding Fathers knew that the right to bear arms is fundamental to maintaining a free nation.
The same patriots that bravely declared American Independence and fought to win the Revolutionary War were well aware of the dangers of disarming citizens. They knew that only a nation comprised of citizens capable of defending themselves and their communities would be able to resist tyranny.
And after securing Independence and ratifying our nation’s constitution our Founders ratified the Bill of Rights, including the 2nd Amendment, to enshrine our liberty for future generations of Americans.
**Now it is up to us to secure these rights and pass them on to our children!**
The late, great Justice Antonin Scalia once cautioned at a Senate Judiciary hearing that every banana republic and dictatorship claims to protect the rights of their people but they are “just words on paper”, what the Framers would call a “parchment guarantee”.
Benjamin Franklin commented at the Constitutional Convention that we were given a republic “if you can keep it”.
**The reason America is a free country today is because for 250 years brave men and women like you stood up to defend our God-given freedoms from enemies both foreign and domestic.**
**_[To commemorate 250 years of American exceptionalism and commitment to protecting freedom I am offering my patriotic supporters a chance to win one of my favorite firearms](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_ :**

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[ENTER TODAY](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Patriot, there is so much to celebrate this year as we approach the 250th anniversary of our Declaration of Independence.
But not all of our fellow Americans appreciate the spirit of 1776.
**Right now, in the halls of Congress and throughout the Swamp, Deep State bureaucrats and power hungry politicians are working together to undermine the rights our ancestors have fought a quarter of a millennium to give to us.**
Both Democrats and RINO Republicans are working together to open our borders, implement the trans agenda, and impose gun control that would make it impossible for Americans to own a firearm like my M249.
That’s why I am working with President Donald Trump to protect **Faith** , **Family** , and **Freedom**. As Chairwoman of the DOGE subcommittee and one of the loudest conservative voices in the MAGA movement, I am fighting everyday for our America First agenda.
[STAND WITH MTG](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Patriot, I will always fight for your constitutional freedoms including the right to keep and bear arms no matter what the Swamp throws at me.
**_[I hope that you enter today for a chance to win my M249 and make a contribution of whatever you can to my America First campaign for Congress to help me continue defending our freedoms and values](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_****.**
I appreciate the support of every patriot that stands with me, with your support we will hold the line and give our posterity a free nation.

_For America,_

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

### **_[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1655652/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDc/LbmNsdlI0U2U0NA/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdjY2STE3NWxscw/gaL2HGg/s9v253decac)_**

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1655652/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDc/LbmNsdlI0U2U0NA/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdjY2STE3NWxscw/gaL2HGg/s9v253decac)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Peter, a humble request from VoteVets:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re asking you to make a donation to VoteVets as we gear up to defeat Trump’s push to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War.
#
Peter —
We’re asking you to make a donation to VoteVets as we gear up to defeat Trump’s push to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War.
If that’s all you need to hear, use this link: [**https://act.votevets.org/go/Stop-The-DOW**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250907-1-120&t=1&akid=34595%2E3013755%2EE9xKoN)
If you need more, please, let us explain:
What was the first thing Trump and Hegseth did to break the United States Military and rebuild it in their image?
They came for principled, respected, experienced leaders. They fired dozens of senior flag officers because they thought they might stand in their way.
Then they started broadcasting war plans on unsecured channels, putting American lives at risk.
Then they started deploying American Troops on American soil against American citizens.
And now, they want to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War.
They’re careless, they’re anti-American, they want unquestioned loyalty — and they want to direct the finest Military the world has ever known against the president’s political enemies.
Courts have stopped Trump before. They might again. But the only way to stop him for good is for Congress to step up to the plate and take action. Trump needs an act of Congress to turn our Department of Defense into his Department of War — and we can still stop him.
VoteVets is mobilizing our partners, our allies, and our resources to fight this tooth and nail. We can defeat this ridiculous re-brand in Congress, and start clawing back power from Trump and Hegseth.
It starts here. It starts with us. It starts with you.
[**We’re humbly asking you to make a donation to VoteVets and help us prevent Trump from completely bending the US Military to his will, and to keep Defense the number one priority of the Department of Defense. Please.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250907-1-120&t=2&akid=34595%2E3013755%2EE9xKoN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Gillibrand for Senate
subject: SURVEY: Is SCOTUS protecting democracy? Or protecting Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
The Supreme Court has a long history of making decisions that undermine our democracy. **In 2010,** _Citizens United_ cleared the path for unlimited corporate and wealthy donor spending, drowning out the voices of everyday Americans. **In 2013,** the Court struck down Section 5 of the _Voting Rights Act_ , removing a vital check on discriminatory voting laws. **In 2024,** _Trump v. United States_ , the Court granted former presidents broad immunity for official acts taken while in office, meaning Trump could be shielded from criminal prosecution. **Now in 2025,** the Supreme Court is packed with Trump’s far‐right judges who seem willing to throw away the Constitution to please Trump and give him more power. So we need to know: **Do you trust this Supreme Court to protect our democracy?** Take the survey to share your thoughts: | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114775945/568113517/1905927819?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.09.07_Trust_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjU2YTNkYy1lZjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Yy-sxXOomr1SMIYfvUfZ4E1xUSfYwre7UW6eEZONo=&emci=a2b7898e-5e8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e256a3dc-ef8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)
---
_**Why your opinion matters:**_
* _It will help inform Senator Gillibrand’s strategy for defending voting rights, regulating money in politics and protecting democratic institutions._
* _It strengthens our movement, showing that we see what’s at stake – and we’re ready to fight back._
* _It connects you with ways to make a difference, whether that’s advocating, organizing or sharing your voice with your community._

Your response will help guide Senator Gillibrand’s fight to hold the Court accountable and protect our rights from Trump’s far-right allies. [**_If you’re ready to take action – or if you simply want your voice counted – click below:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114775948/568113518/1905927819?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.09.07_Trust_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjU2YTNkYy1lZjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12Yy-sxXOomr1SMIYfvUfZ4E1xUSfYwre7UW6eEZONo=&emci=a2b7898e-5e8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e256a3dc-ef8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: The Supreme Court has a long history of making decisions that undermine our democracy. In 2010, Citizens United cleared the path for unlimited corporate and wealthy donor spending, drowning out the voices of everyday Americans. In 2013, the Court struck down Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act , removing a vital check on discriminatory voting laws. In 2024, Trump v. United States , the Court granted former presidents broad immunity for official acts taken while in office, meaning Trump could be shielded from criminal prosecution. Now in 2025, the Supreme Court is packed with Trump’s far‐right judges who seem willing to throw away the Constitution to please Trump and give him more power. So we need to know: Do you trust this Supreme Court to protect our democracy? Take the survey to share your thoughts: | | Why your opinion matters: It will help inform Senator Gillibrand’s strategy for defending voting rights, regulating money in politics and protecting democratic institutions. It strengthens our movement, showing that we see what’s at stake – and we’re ready to fight back. It connects you with ways to make a difference, whether that’s advocating, organizing or sharing your voice with your community. Your response will help guide Senator Gillibrand’s fight to hold the Court accountable and protect our rights from Trump’s far-right allies. | Thanks for adding your voice, Gillibrand for Senate =

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Can we put your name on our wall?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
This is Deb Haaland with some exciting news, Peter:
**We have officially opened the doors to our campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94532?refcode=em20250907-9387&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9387%2E614464%2EKMJSzF)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall,** a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall, Peter!
**We’re going to be adding the names of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. [Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today so we can put your name up there?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94532?refcode=em20250907-9387&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9387%2E614464%2EKMJSzF)**
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that you helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: **a people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please split a contribution of $15 or any amount today between my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94532?refcode=em20250907-9387&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9387%2E614464%2EKMJSzF)**
Be fierce,
Deb

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: D.O.G.E. Outreach Division
subject: URGENT: Confirm Your $5,000 D.O.G.E. Refund Eligibility.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207540lytofr3jyxb291nryx9kfvg520zxvn145ocdbd6e5p7qrcs7dnv9sjo6ghfwy83g5a1eqy1o3nltz&__stmp=t281lt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3mkuxamcl4f611gymgd1csnlcg6az0cg4cn5gsfvo4q6fqymwkdblk12t6ssm70rfyg0ky9pb974po0lgm1hj7h2a5zc93lubkbmmgmqbs1my8oqciha7w6kqg36jr4ud85z4n23jv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3mkuxamcl4f611gymgd1csnlcg6az0cg4cn5gsfvo4q6fqymwkdblk12t6ssm70rfyg0ky9pb974po0lgm1hj7h2a5zc93lubkbmmgmqbs1my8oqciha7w6kqg36jr4ud85z4n23jv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t281lt&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9c76031-125c-46bd-87ea-73df32cee86e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

I have been a regular and public opponent of [DEI](https://substack.com/redirect/3e38177a-07c6-4ff7-8c3d-3ac8ac140a9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [ESG](https://substack.com/redirect/0e66d426-12fe-47b5-aed0-ae7d13a7fd5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and anything [else](https://substack.com/redirect/44daedd8-bdb7-4ae7-8f26-3fae4cc17277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that leads to a misdirection or hijacking of corporate purpose. All these efforts, I believed, were part of the "Woke" movement that prioritized equality of outcomes over equality of opportunity, and demanded that capitalists be deprioritized, if not punished.
After the Bud Light fiasco and resulting backlash a couple of years ago, it was clear that the Woke fever (something I had likened to a mania and popular delusions I had studied during [my research in to financial bubbles](https://substack.com/redirect/341fc59d-c4fd-47bf-a05b-1a7dd3e8f616?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) had broken. The mania, which reminded me of the Salem Witch Trials and the Tulip Bubble, seemed to have reached its limits.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2f27b77e-8160-4c6f-a78e-141ce82a1812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Since then, there has been a steady drumbeat of other such cases and one company after another has changed direction, dumping DEI initiatives:
* [Meta ended its DEI programs](https://substack.com/redirect/c9827b85-9e2c-4d6e-ae1d-2104733a6c24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* Google [eliminated](https://substack.com/redirect/ee5302de-5e9b-4c38-b705-9d2d9ab763cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its diversity hiring goals.
* [Target ended its programs and also announced that it will not be participating in external diversity surveys, such as those from the Human Rights Campaign, a leading LGBTQ+ advocacy organization](https://substack.com/redirect/b36d0139-0cd7-485c-beea-5e2d5bcd7680?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* [Pepsi rid itself of its DEI hiring goals and transitioned its Chief Diversity Officer to a different role](https://substack.com/redirect/5d82dcf5-be5d-49ec-b2a1-b72195938f52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The list goes [on](https://substack.com/redirect/5ae62611-eb36-466d-8286-5c2c3e500b6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [on](https://substack.com/redirect/1f25987e-ca3a-423f-b7c2-b88c3f49195c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Last month, Cracker Barrel announced a new logo. Gone were "Uncle Herschel" and the barrel and the classic font, all ditched in favor of a sleek, imageless, modern design. The move pointed to a company embarrassed by itself and its customer base, one trying to remake its image to attract a more upscale clientele.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0zHK_1PP7xuJm231_Gwmck9EDOkr3M-Aasl6joB3H84?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172970690)
The backlash was swift - and massive. The new logo was unveiled on August 19. Customer traffic slowed to a trickle, with sales ["dead for a week"](https://substack.com/redirect/ee082fd3-87e0-42fa-9d05-c79a0d00da35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). By August 21, the company's stock tanked, losing [12 percent](https://substack.com/redirect/028edb51-c63d-4f84-be7a-8c600fc7b976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of its market value. On August 25, a [poll](https://substack.com/redirect/7b900e3c-964a-41f8-83c4-3c9272131c9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) showed that the share of the U.S. adult population with a negative view of the company jumped from 10 percent to 25 percent _in just two days_.
President Donald Trump even [weighed](https://substack.com/redirect/2e378ece-a737-4ca7-8ec2-50c4d9b2c931?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in. On August 26, a mere five days after the new logo was revealed, he posted an animated video in which he greets the old timer...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b593ec37-873b-4fb2-9a26-12722c71efa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
LINK TO TWEET: [https://x.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1963609005844017347/video/1](https://substack.com/redirect/2bd8a5da-839d-430f-b8ef-854629c52f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Online commentary exploded (including an [AI generated video of baby Trump addressing the matter](https://substack.com/redirect/a5c7d2d4-b62a-4799-891d-b69973208101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), and shortly thereafter, the company [announced](https://substack.com/redirect/4a59cd17-cf6c-46df-8b1c-29c3dfe676d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it was bringing back the old logo. Cracker Barrel reversed course so quickly that surely Uncle Herschel got whiplash.
I find it noteworthy that a company could make such an obvious social blunder at this stage of the social cycle. After all, we've had a few years and lots of examples that made it clear a cultural course correction was underway. The company's leaders seemed oblivious to this reality, suggesting they may be surrounding themselves people who think and feel the way they do. It leads to an obvious question: did the leaders even know anyone who eats at Cracker Barrel?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0zHK_1PP7xuJm231_Gwmck9EDOkr3M-Aasl6joB3H84?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172970690)
The logo redesign wasn't a standalone idea. It was part of an attempt to help fix an ailing business. Declaring that the company was ["just not as relevant"](https://substack.com/redirect/90b30cab-a91a-4517-aa9d-336d8d6900d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a new CEO launched an initiative to completely remake the company's image. $700 million was spent on [remodeling restaurants](https://substack.com/redirect/4482ea99-893c-41a2-a4f5-37aac10fecde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), disposing of the tchotchkes, kitsch, and "old-timey" feel in favor of a sleeker, more modern design; the wooden tables and chairs were replaced by booths. Long-time menu items were [ditched](https://substack.com/redirect/02680c8d-ea71-4a41-8b6a-6ee58af89c91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in favor of dishes like "premium savory chicken and rice" and TikTok influencers were [invited](https://substack.com/redirect/4d2dbaf3-e151-4b4a-bc1f-07684b56f2e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to taste the new menu. A year ago, its [annual report](https://substack.com/redirect/4c07bff0-4d5b-4698-a9fc-cfc80abd280b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) featured a Diversity and Inclusion section trumpeting seven "Business Resource Groups" dedicated to promoting diversity; the company had [previously](https://substack.com/redirect/ad99d066-5788-48eb-9fe9-8b36c9a57387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) put out rainbow-colored rockers to celebrate Pride Month.

[One of the real joys of being a global generalist is that I constantly interact with people from different backgrounds across varied industries and numerous geographies. In the past six months alone,...](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a8e8e5-a835-4ad8-9816-6c9d90888cb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
Throughout it all, they can't say they weren't warned. Sardar Biglari, a large investor in Cracker Barrel, repeatedly [sounded the alarm](https://substack.com/redirect/4c07bff0-4d5b-4698-a9fc-cfc80abd280b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the company's direction. He called the rebrand an "obvious folly", called for refocusing on the company's core business, and said it wasn't the brand but the board that was broken; he issued one [warning](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca2cd0a-a428-4796-8dc7-8fdd5312836f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after [another](https://substack.com/redirect/c0f5c474-24d0-4b7a-98db-598cb50469c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (after [another](https://substack.com/redirect/2101053b-5c4d-4f90-8752-e202fa759c70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). One commentator even [remarked](https://substack.com/redirect/4c07bff0-4d5b-4698-a9fc-cfc80abd280b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the company's diversity efforts were the result of feeling "compelled to atone for past sins" and they let their "eye off the ball".
This story particularly resonated with me because of my own experience. When I served on corporate boards, I always [advocated](https://substack.com/redirect/0e66d426-12fe-47b5-aed0-ae7d13a7fd5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the company to keep its eye on its core mission and not get distracted or waste resources on anything superfluous to that goal, including DEI and ESG initiatives. I've [argued](https://substack.com/redirect/6c82db35-4356-4e63-a13e-a02e8b24a330?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that management's only concern should be to maximize long-term shareholder value, and that initiatives such as Cracker Barrel's diversity-focused Business Resource Groups lead to inefficiencies, distractions, and lost profits, amounting to a "DEI Tax" that takes money out of everyone's pockets.

Now that I am running my own [company](https://substack.com/redirect/14a7779e-0123-48c1-982f-caff3c3bb2cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I have a chance to put into practice a lot of ideas that I advocated for in boardrooms. And that is why Goodwell Foods has a relentless focus on producing high quality pizzas at the lowest possible cost and getting them out the door and onto shelves as quickly as possible. Every decision, every goal, every discussion, must always be brought back to that simple yardstick.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/328f8c9d-6a81-43c0-ad2d-1059db3396ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/f7c668d2-f670-4465-8f8d-3b7bd077c32f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/fae424d7-83b3-4130-8bc9-7f893f513f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

clean_body: A reminder why the social responsibility of business is to focus on growing profits | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A reminder why the social responsibility of business is to focus on growing profits | | | Sep 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I have been a regular and public opponent of , , and anything that leads to a misdirection or hijacking of corporate purpose. All these efforts, I believed, were part of the "Woke" movement that prioritized equality of outcomes over equality of opportunity, and demanded that capitalists be deprioritized, if not punished. After the Bud Light fiasco and resulting backlash a couple of years ago, it was clear that the Woke fever (something I had likened to a mania and popular delusions I had studied during ) had broken. The mania, which reminded me of the Salem Witch Trials and the Tulip Bubble, seemed to have reached its limits. Since then, there has been a steady drumbeat of other such cases and one company after another has changed direction, dumping DEI initiatives: . Google its diversity hiring goals. . . The list goes and . Last month, Cracker Barrel announced a new logo. Gone were "Uncle Herschel" and the barrel and the classic font, all ditched in favor of a sleek, imageless, modern design. The move pointed to a company embarrassed by itself and its customer base, one trying to remake its image to attract a more upscale clientele. The backlash was swift - and massive. The new logo was unveiled on August 19. Customer traffic slowed to a trickle, with sales . By August 21, the company's stock tanked, losing of its market value. On August 25, a showed that the share of the U.S. adult population with a negative view of the company jumped from 10 percent to 25 percent in just two days. President Donald Trump even in. On August 26, a mere five days after the new logo was revealed, he posted an animated video in which he greets the old timer... | | ---|---|--- LINK TO TWEET: Online commentary exploded (including an ), and shortly thereafter, the company it was bringing back the old logo. Cracker Barrel reversed course so quickly that surely Uncle Herschel got whiplash. I find it noteworthy that a company could make such an obvious social blunder at this stage of the social cycle. After all, we've had a few years and lots of examples that made it clear a cultural course correction was underway. The company's leaders seemed oblivious to this reality, suggesting they may be surrounding themselves people who think and feel the way they do. It leads to an obvious question: did the leaders even know anyone who eats at Cracker Barrel? The logo redesign wasn't a standalone idea. It was part of an attempt to help fix an ailing business. Declaring that the company was , a new CEO launched an initiative to completely remake the company's image. $700 million was spent on , disposing of the tchotchkes, kitsch, and "old-timey" feel in favor of a sleeker, more modern design; the wooden tables and chairs were replaced by booths. Long-time menu items were in favor of dishes like "premium savory chicken and rice" and TikTok influencers were to taste the new menu. A year ago, its featured a Diversity and Inclusion section trumpeting seven "Business Resource Groups" dedicated to promoting diversity; the company had put out rainbow-colored rockers to celebrate Pride Month. | | | | ---|---|--- | February 27, 2024 | Throughout it all, they can't say they weren't warned. Sardar Biglari, a large investor in Cracker Barrel, repeatedly over the company's direction. He called the rebrand an "obvious folly", called for refocusing on the company's core business, and said it wasn't the brand but the board that was broken; he issued one after (after ). One commentator even that the company's diversity efforts were the result of feeling "compelled to atone for past sins" and they let their "eye off the ball". This story particularly resonated with me because of my own experience. When I served on corporate boards, I always for the company to keep its eye on its core mission and not get distracted or waste resources on anything superfluous to that goal, including DEI and ESG initiatives. I've that management's only concern should be to maximize long-term shareholder value, and that initiatives such as Cracker Barrel's diversity-focused Business Resource Groups lead to inefficiencies, distractions, and lost profits, amounting to a "DEI Tax" that takes money out of everyone's pockets. | | | | ---|---|--- | April 15, 2024 | I also sympathize with Bilgier, in large part because I too raised concerns about DEI and ESG efforts at a public company. My efforts generated some news, which you can read about and , and listen to on an of "What's Bugging Me" entitled "D.E.I. and E.S.G. Must D-I-E". | | | | ---|---|--- | Aug 18 | Now that I am running my own , I have a chance to put into practice a lot of ideas that I advocated for in boardrooms. And that is why Goodwell Foods has a relentless focus on producing high quality pizzas at the lowest possible cost and getting them out the door and onto shelves as quickly as possible. Every decision, every goal, every discussion, must always be brought back to that simple yardstick. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and **. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I’m disgusted, but not surprised.

Sadly, this is nothing new to me. I've borne _venomous_ insults and been called so many _horrible_ names throughout the years.
The "tolerant" Left will turn racist and ugly the instant a black woman decides to reject the Democrat party and embrace common sense. Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.
I'm the sitting Lieutenant Governor, second in command in the former Capitol of the Confederate States. I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. There is no place for this disgusting hatred in our nation. I won't let their insults define me, and I certainly won't let them slow me down!
I didn't become the first black, female Lt. Governor of Virginia by playing the victim. I did it by embracing my conservative values and trusting in God!
Leftists can spew whatever racist nonsense they like, but I will win the race for Governor of Virginia with you on my side.
Here's my call to action: [Can you chip in to help us spread our positive conservative message?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b6d4ecf669ca4466b94eb35aa574f561&_e=fR9876qlUZ6kTFuiugkWTbbH2Zc-FA_bppiWVvMCupW0oEqrog8xgDf6CdANuvRk6-QOaMpXyGsIyxNSoG19JI5nMzF_Cads0j7hH_ICwxuvh_T_WeaFSu4yir6DgYWzZcxbp9IBnrnEksQV5yOsKBsyF7lpbTm5VUcpFuq7rFsoPuDJEXqHSbuOTYOI4vRIQ_VKyU8OhGeyf6RfIn1bBojsyLPfUoBYCDxtYnFGa7yqJtHbWo9N8YRTbi0yoDRUiqo40cSt7zSwjXmeM7a6cXBwo17dter5FoFrSNDmvE_foQcpDf1xqrrqJ3Z0N2YunZNidUeUGE_VwdBnDwr7ToMis9Wf77i-r3fWJjoU3cuoBj9AMjL-CiH6IfCAFUqLcqTWTdPLcelAIj7s1bD4yjU9AG1NkfD7kS5hhSdvo9cVAcTWRSwMz2z-Cfa5qUougmWzUW7cs_1dFdC8Cgrp8NRZSOYvdIWHltIysZ9m5NNRllBMLLuTZqYz3SIQ_6tFYi1uo4OY9c89cgnb4OxrjlCdMUQy6U_Y7EQ-QoyysCqAt9aPv0Sq60FhLsgQqjVZb6k74zrYpfBZPvbP7cXIKV-X6Zu2rqMU2EuDKWiXuvr3ZC1DNgQmi7mVkkpZPYXTsrDz7WmdtwZZyrNaj2bKLQ2k5FXs7aT4w_hugMquj9FLi_LGY2FQUXgHxJ2EW6Ue)[ DONATE $18 OR MORE NOW >>

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Ding Dong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. Fellow Conservative,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=031f9a5566bd4804b27ceeba89e2b773&_e=YpvrDGxoyv6aeuxuDhw9aqmoHIkAdF4z7XCVJMRtZzFXC-U0TOJAQgt8pi5TgaSEXDy5BE2JvpVUUluKMqIfCX4SfcjsYpzdAWd8RRX2i12Jm9Mx59R9vBVN6CTqyzAZNezofUMblADLFaB4Sgfev2pvxK9hld0LM9pGh1FnIVrTZ8YLu7HM8dukisnoB-7MJnzYeWRPzdjc1CT5b7d4BqevY2vCmOEwEt6n-sRwm-gNAWw5rKZBpnesHFOSv3WHcTMeh9K7fKErbH6sDE6iUMPnUOofcw06N5P1NACb7tYWGj0Iw1hDYaA1K75KnF_cLQZ8Q-mCPMxB3tJBUoD_x9aEryhHK3vT64rnWoaB43q9-ErrIYYR7QQL6qzR2k3gsOX08nI_9qd8eVIe9NalSchanMcElSUCv3cxW_TNQKq6vPKSUs8zhZ865owNa8XfVTYuRYZ_bQkKy9DczvetDK5zXxFsHe6tWbE1rV8ZhjdVz8c7rqRKaHycE_bPzNxYxHrKm19PFA48T3lTYpfflVwjnOGmbbssA2Bs175mIGbhhCKwfqXtW2fE6HKlLFiVKKKnVb_YPzfde0fi1dWfZU4jBcYPJdtX24QfjeP4qvTqjhnzZu7ubMjxUJJPmo4iB7GCsxK0YUAzhLd-sx-33mdL_Ty5qkMw-XzlCJSOknPg0lgtYBiiV3Gqa-6aJVa0aN1cSx_w3lqnIlD3zW_5tH_45YUQ6g4zLb0OqNlQSWGMJTB8YfjIgUAmlUwKQGijiinxsN_86A4Fo_1ZmaG2eQ%3D%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=031f9a5566bd4804b27ceeba89e2b773&_e=YpvrDGxoyv6aeuxuDhw9aqmoHIkAdF4z7XCVJMRtZzFXC-U0TOJAQgt8pi5TgaSEXDy5BE2JvpVUUluKMqIfCX4SfcjsYpzdAWd8RRX2i12Jm9Mx59R9vBVN6CTqyzAZNezofUMblADLFaB4Sgfev2pvxK9hld0LM9pGh1FnIVrTZ8YLu7HM8dukisnoB-7MJnzYeWRPzdjc1CT5b7d4BqevY2vCmOEwEt6n-sRwm-gNAWw5rKZBpnesHFOSv3WHcTMeh9K7fKErbH6sDE6iUIJSCdCSLF70kZVWje9VIz9EIHEz0Ckcft36PJU8VhsyLoz1Q0tlMtOHgX01j4oUR-vUFAV8Lva4yOgd54JQ1AiuN4C0v5ZsM34Zkeipk_EZiTTwEORKbghkPVc8U2G1K6M_s-Cn6M8QGC19UHe9R7V0Pe_tLtSzLtHzGXXRgDYAzRGvlGldzHxXDHE3rwGY9VJb5yAibPKjnfuXT-WWmOQBG6phoMISGOTIuKRVS2Zyql_osLQtlG80kwTc1KZva5vxR2VKC4N3uJ0NCaICbwyggbHXc3wNZFiRNzW6nQ9kKN1n4uYwcbsx_qGga3oK69pcNkPftF8Vcvljf2F-Wuzd1xDt1ptP0NLOHaIhHG4hCYvs5_H-VLSqCk282y5C4nBI5rvAezaMdlMotVuEZMoT64Amn-Em73W1WEUmgMMaUTDqmIoeJP-s1-p9iwxfWVLWjeLp1knPoDDGl4YW2CcxGHKFT7czBMhiexrMIl8-vUIS-diHr284ohEkIkjLyQ%3D%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

clean_body: We Didn't Start the Fire | | | | | | | | Reader,For far too long the New York Times has dominated American journalism. It calls itself the "paper of record" and claims it publishes "all the news that's fit to print." But Americans know that the Times doesn't have their best interests at heart. The good news is that the Times' historic rival is back in business and quickly reclaiming market share. | | | | The New York Sun is a paper that fights for the American people and promises to "shine for all." Most of all, the Sun loves America and is fully committed to upholding the Constitution. We're not in the business of stoking the fires that plague our republic. We're in the business of putting them out. So if you're tired of the New York Times acting like the most important newspaper in America, it's time to join the Sun and our fast growing movement to save American journalism. For just 1c a day you can make a statement about which paper speaks for you. Please join us today. | | | | | | | Dovid Efune Publisher, The New York Sun | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States **** ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Flipping the U.S. Senate starts with flipping North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is the most competitive Senate race of 2026.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Roy Cooper is running for Senate in North Carolina and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between Roy's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-cooper.oMEak6&refcode=em250907-1-90&t=1&akid=6180%2E6688874%2EWdpBBo)
---
Hi there,
I will be the first to admit it: I’m no Mark Kelly. The closest I’ve been to the Space Station is the cheap seats at a Carolina Hurricanes game.
But Mark asked me to reach out today to tell you about my race for the U.S. Senate because there’s a lot we have in common, too — and he tells me that you share the priorities we’re both fighting for.
[**Before I introduce myself further, I have to let you know that our race here in North Carolina is expected to be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and it may become the most expensive U.S. Senate election ever. I’m reaching out because I’ll need as many supporters as possible to help take on the national GOP groups that are already trying to defeat me. Can you split a donation of any amount that fits in your budget between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help flip this seat from red to blue?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-cooper.oMEak6&refcode=em250907-1-90&t=2&akid=6180%2E6688874%2EWdpBBo)
I’m Roy Cooper. I was proud to serve for eight years as the Governor of North Carolina, where I took on extreme right-wing attacks on the rights of North Carolinians and stood up for our democratic values. **Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because so much of what’s happening in Washington is wrong, and when we take back the Senate, we can fight to stop it.**
I won’t sit by while extreme Republicans slash SNAP and Medicaid to give tax breaks to the rich — or while they attack anyone who doesn’t share their beliefs. As the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I’m committed to joining Mark and Senate Democrats in standing up for the rights of all Americans. I’m going to speak out against the Trump Administration and extreme Republicans when they threaten the most fundamental values of our democracy. **I’m ready to fight for a better nation for all of us.**
Like Mark, I have experience winning some of the most competitive races. I won my races for Governor in NC in 2016 and 2020 — both years Republicans carried the state in the presidential election. I’m humbled to have the support and trust of folks from every corner of North Carolina in our work to make our state better.
But this Senate election is unlike anything we’ve faced before.
[**The path to the Senate majority runs through North Carolina. It’s our best opportunity to flip a seat from red to blue. Republicans know that too, so all their attention is on us. National GOP groups have committed to spending hundreds of millions of dollars to defeat me. I’m grateful for Mark’s strong support, and I need yours, too. Anything you can split between Mark’s campaign and mine today will go a long way to help win this race and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-cooper.oMEak6&refcode=em250907-1-90&t=3&akid=6180%2E6688874%2EWdpBBo)

clean_body: This is the most competitive Senate race of 2026. Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Roy Cooper is running for Senate in North Carolina and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and Hi there, I will be the first to admit it: I’m no Mark Kelly. The closest I’ve been to the Space Station is the cheap seats at a Carolina Hurricanes game. But Mark asked me to reach out today to tell you about my race for the U.S. Senate because there’s a lot we have in common, too — and he tells me that you share the priorities we’re both fighting for. I’m Roy Cooper. I was proud to serve for eight years as the Governor of North Carolina, where I took on extreme right-wing attacks on the rights of North Carolinians and stood up for our democratic values. Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because so much of what’s happening in Washington is wrong, and when we take back the Senate, we can fight to stop it. I won’t sit by while extreme Republicans slash SNAP and Medicaid to give tax breaks to the rich — or while they attack anyone who doesn’t share their beliefs. As the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I’m committed to joining Mark and Senate Democrats in standing up for the rights of all Americans. I’m going to speak out against the Trump Administration and extreme Republicans when they threaten the most fundamental values of our democracy. I’m ready to fight for a better nation for all of us. Like Mark, I have experience winning some of the most competitive races. I won my races for Governor in NC in 2016 and 2020 — both years Republicans carried the state in the presidential election. I’m humbled to have the support and trust of folks from every corner of North Carolina in our work to make our state better. But this Senate election is unlike anything we’ve faced before. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Roy Cooper instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks so much, Roy Cooper Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.

I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.

One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

We just received BIG news--your free speech is SAFE against two draconian censorship laws out of California!

The laws censor political speech and even punish people for posting a simple, funny meme and then require online platforms to censor that speech--if the government deems the content "materially deceptive." So, The Babylon Bee, along with a California lawyer and video-sharing platform Rumble, challenged the laws for violating their free speech rights--**and today, a court agreed with them.**

This is an incredible win for free speech. And it's because friends like YOU stood by The Babylon Bee and helped them fight this egregious government overreach.

But it's not the end of the story. The Babylon Bee's battle to protect humor and free speech isn't over.

Their rights--and yours--are still under threat in Hawaii, thanks to a law that goes even further than California's.

Hawaii's law threatens fines, damages, and even _jail time_ if a person posts a political meme that government officials don't like. It's all part of a growing trend of censorship. Across the country and the globe, government officials and private actors alike are cracking down on speech in cases like this.

With your help, The Babylon Bee is fighting Hawaii's law--no one should face jail time because a politician doesn't get your joke.

This victory in California is promising, but your help is needed to keep up the fight for free speech. [Your gift now will be DOUBLED—while funds last—to fuel critical cases to protect YOUR free speech against a growing censorship crisis.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/jhgqsmH5sTljiIzKb6ZTaMPuOf_-WEbBvjnC4BOKa6cvlAEoKRXDV7x3ZczPFfbMNlIXHm1dZXITs25XoU1ciOjDrqXvcyLA7nA60uoL9P9OG2kCEAuZQdLr5NYC9P4IBNRmCHAPttdmNcjSrxQxZv563gH3AcDeB3IVc3SKzs6f32EPOe_1Lfk8QLg8aHg7v8tu-IiFExhcAIYouLOT-ZXV5jCHNpv208ITinYLyrTYY5H50yQ4c6F35ibQkAGaE8mbTry4WRDhEtoLS1D6qQfuQs4mOthmLxt7qVoqrAzjDycAztTy_w2FbyphrkC-5ovWcI_O8ZBw-S6Hm1F7JjWnoBns66b0HmSHVJPrZV8ym0fI2_Qv2lhTobSazMc6hPYihEc4nsf2KyIc9FdbuQEQWG4ZE5hkz8rlILXn01CyRGOtRijsm9exMlIAD7cUzEbP8aDaOOdD3l5QkY4Yab0UJHCq9nnjvQHvAQQYWLoPlrdoPjf0jYKpSbkErZdsnDgd_HKoymIKlUVIIUqt-mQjDjei6bW5cw4vrkZLgFclZY8X3O2LphZzVtH8mRXKPYY99BJaqWh9O4wWl4QJt0pJ-64A8GPOFdswurJUR_lmUay1nznXSipPtB1tkQg2HmUocz4x8DqcJ4OoLemnUGJG2BoiU-qEgZbE-yiL9esjmW6Xt16lVjnF8ywV1O8Q5pSjSBkVNniaSTRCjOOv/vDEMqEsL4jGogW6JKmG6yc1eh4uCYLuq/12)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Defy history
body:
. . . . . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=589bef2dec5c47eeb8ef01d7b9a63a42&_e=wQ3tlufrFuKugi4lExUhCrpbFif60lF9zV3k7XRe4_aK2Mj7U24mNtgWewXVx_LXI_VTBjaq8jcvLQCHVDcEQjNH0LSoqJXqPQs5efJ2Ii9MwpOGayYNyJ6P_DuXO7hXtqM6llP-bDIzFkFTig1vFRDy0D4iWCFXU7qxpX4Xp3SDAzTLABPXIoKMSCoTKZZ47FT8FrQVBGW_dQltKMXKSkOr6ase6aKxZ_aRlbLt5IsMWJQiMlqSRAs-gwI5dJqDCGTHC_lMbpD4fBFSs0cASywFFq3IKMrQcBf4ncWruWZyzcr-zXAilLhUq-XJ75N9zpPUGhhujru_p9pF3SbDoAJsjfDSQ69_tUsEG09CSC32NLgPuJO7kU5Y4uPf-3SNxiE46GVwZf-zzIQ6weckF5PJHIjHygp085F9xvTIQJnhc2a6Jt1kjYvffj3XbIAVk7CX4umGAiz9N3LWye8CCmEiCqEuDpAIC0iFczhxInt-q7k3wMzzdwRblVjw7xcBIMRH5cmx-0D46Br83uPS6QpuOu-ogUbLhl86mo3vbljzgg9czdSzyAgBw1tHvir2fEZYkHdrhe3KcyfHgMKKOw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
History says the party in the White House usually loses in the midterm elections.
---
But President Trump is not one to be _defined_ by history. Instead, we _DEFY_ history.
---
[_Just “months into his second term, the president is already hyper-engaged in the fight to keep the GOP’s majorities in Congress... he’s bullish about defying history and keeping Democrats away from committee gavels and subpoena powers”_
_-Source: POLITICO_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=589bef2dec5c47eeb8ef01d7b9a63a42&_e=wQ3tlufrFuKugi4lExUhCrpbFif60lF9zV3k7XRe4_aK2Mj7U24mNtgWewXVx_LXI_VTBjaq8jcvLQCHVDcEQjNH0LSoqJXqPQs5efJ2Ii9MwpOGayYNyJ6P_DuXO7hXtqM6llP-bDIzFkFTig1vFRDy0D4iWCFXU7qxpX4Xp3SDAzTLABPXIoKMSCoTKZZ4IeTfB2ECnS3oBV9lmMk6diUDkIkfmfFuF6TIe-9qwC7yAkwNj5-aUjABxH653vl3lFeE9na4-KfoHEYPb2PzHe0IuEGipbw7a-mAO9PWMgblVjskETTXAe81XYd684dqm-rHIMqDWd6CFTblTXevrZY1e5J3zLTjRdXFrFVxuHx-qYgmJluUDLOJ5nRG66rwIKYM3O_i-WnoqjpqYnbd9rYnB10F7igZ0_iqdrIZbowtfhOiOQjRi9DiJ9s8LRfKgAd6tiwNmZOtwf96-nvlQXLaKQLn3H2-oMTZQ251u0shFpdB_PBKkjB8C6oPZFK2X8yPJlGUUgIg8iG9qIxqMxGwxi4NvL4iPj0njsSl8ZpS3WUe9heKtIGdjmW7CRoVBIbsigxY2pC8NdR1nHJYmA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, we know what Obama’s Democrats will do if they seize the _“committee gavels and subpoena powers.”_
---
**One Democrat proposed rounding up ICE agents, bringing them to the floor of Congress, and _DOXXING_ them before the public!**
---
They’ll revive the old lawfare playbook of 2024 – only this time from the Speaker’s Chair.
---
_And all those Articles of Impeachment that have been STRUCK DOWN by our current Republican House Majority? They’ll come roaring back and get PASSED._
---
Here’s what’s worrisome... According to _Gallup_ , **Democrats now hold a 3-POINT LEAD in party identification.**
---
**But before you start scratching your head, that’s __not__ an approval rating. It’s just verified voters. They are getting more of their base registered, verified, and ready.**
---

clean_body: Before Congress, I ran a trucking company. Now I'm fighting for something even bigger: the future of the Supreme Court. President Trump is preparing his shortlist for the next vacancy, and The Left knows it too. That's why billionaire dark-money donors like George Soros are pouring MILLIONS into Georgia to save Jon Ossoff -- Obama's handpicked puppet and Schumer's rubber stamp. Judges like Boasberg and Chutkan , who've freed illegals, stripped away your rights, and declared open rebellion against President Trump, could be appointed to become deciding votes in the Court. The Radical Left will burn down everything in their way to stack the bench. You've seen it already: So I'll put it simply: If we lose Georgia, we lose the Senate. ** If we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And if we lose the Court, we lose the country we love. President Trump needs America First senators to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with him to: Defend the High Court from the Left's takeover and confirm bold constitutionalists in the mold of That 's why I'm in this fight. Because if we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And once the Left gets their slimy hands on it, they 'll never give it back. Will you join me? . Thank you, Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MAGA TO 70622** If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Retribution
