body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8959%2E5257348%2E2OK2B0)
Derek — There is no limit to what Donald Trump is willing to do to go after his perceived rivals.
He pulled funding from former Vice President Kamala Harris’s secret service detail.
He is using the military to police our cities in violation of the law, putting communities at risk, even as he is breaking up families.
Trump even ordered a bogus investigation into me and other political opponents, led by a January 6th denier with a track record of going after Trump’s opponents.
He’s dangerously unhinged. And getting worse. And Derek, we don’t know what is next.
**Here’s what we do know: There’s no agenda more important to Donald Trump than retribution.**
He feeds conspiracy theories to his followers.
Makes their targets more vulnerable.
Then pulls their security. Goes after them by name.
This is a dark road. And we have a President who is all too willing to drive us down it.
_We can’t let this continue. We need to respond._
**[I am asking for your support to help me stand up to Trump. Clearly, I’m viewed as one of his top enemies, and it’s uncertain where he’ll go next to attack me. But when he does, we need to be ready — and your grassroots support helps with that.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250907_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8959%2E5257348%2E2OK2B0)**

We need your signature to grow our grassroots effort to fight back »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114784582/568139320/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250907_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNjOWM1MS1mYjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiC5cf_RmrxNJUyP_UEW_WuJ8MZPBsrXh7hqNvY9VbY=&emci=6a5a2952-858a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9bcc9c51-fb8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)** | [SIGN NOW: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114784585/568139322/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250907_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNjOWM1MS1mYjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiC5cf_RmrxNJUyP_UEW_WuJ8MZPBsrXh7hqNvY9VbY=&emci=6a5a2952-858a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9bcc9c51-fb8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)

**Not only are his claims false, they’re dangerous.** This narrative is a key part of Trump and MAGA Republicans’ “Big Lie” conspiracy that Democrats “stole” the 2020 election.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: She’ll actually fight Trump’s fascism and mass deportations →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Fascism is rising in America,
Peter.

Families are being torn apart as Donald Trump deploys ICE to terrorize
immigrants with cruelty, chaos, and unchecked power. The National Guard is
being sent into cities to impose curfews and authoritarian rule. Giant
flags of Trump’s face are flying on the sides of federal buildings, while
his cabinet meetings have devolved into hours upon hours of fake, fawning
praise — live on national TV.

With too many spineless Democrats standing on the sidelines watching this
unfold in silence, we need more bold leaders in Congress who are unafraid
to stand up and speak up for their communities — no matter how chilling
the villain.

That’s why Justice Democrats just endorsed Angela Gonzales-Torres in
California’s 34th congressional district: because she’s exactly the kind
of leader we need to fight back right now.

Angela knows what this cruel, anti-immigrant agenda looks like firsthand.
When she was just 15 years old, her family lived through every immigrant
or mixed-status family’s worst nightmare: her father was deported, leaving
her mother to raise four daughters alone. Her mom worked two and three
jobs just to make ends meet for her daughters, but times were still tough,
and her family experienced housing insecurity, living in her mother’s car,
shelters, family members’ homes, and eventually a one-bedroom apartment.

Angela understands the gravity of this moment for her community and has
been organizing day in and day out with families to protect them from the
cruelty of the Trump administration. She knows her community deserves
better — not just real representation, but respect — and she won’t stop
fighting until they get it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250907-agt?refcode=em20250907-36996&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ ]Can you split a donation to Angela’s campaign and Justice Democrats
right now to help send her to Congress next year?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250907-agt?refcode=em20250907-36996&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ ]Donate

CA-34 has one of the largest immigrant populations in the country: about
one-third of Los Angeles residents are immigrants, and one-sixth are
likely undocumented. The city has been thrust into the national spotlight
with Trump’s cruel focus on ICE raids and his directive for the National
Guard to occupy the city and use local parks as training grounds.

While Trump makes an example out of her district for his fascist military
takeover, Angela has a clear and bold vision to fight back for her
community and families like hers. She believes immigration policy should
reflect the values of dignity, opportunity, and inclusion — that’s why she
supports:

* A clear pathway to citizenship for all, including the over 11 million
undocumented people living in the United States;
* Protections for mixed-status families and expanded access to social
services like healthcare, housing, and education;
* Increased federal funding for legal representation in immigration
courts, community integration programs, and modernized and humane
asylum processes.

Her incumbent opponent, on the other hand, has been more concerned with
gaining and retaining power at any cost. Instead of fighting back against
the special interests who got us here, Rep. Jimmy Gomez is bankrolled by
the same corporate PACs that helped elect Trump and enable this
militarized mass deportation effort.

He’s even taken contributions from CoreCivic — one of the key private
prison companies profiting from Trump’s cruel immigration crackdown. What
that means is, as his community members are terrorized, detained, and
denied their basic rights, Jimmy Gomez’s donors are profiting. It’s no
wonder his constituents don’t see him as a fighter for their community.

But Angela is already fighting back — and unlike Jimmy, she won’t take
checks from corporate PACs or private prisons. That means she’s going to
need ALL of us behind her to win this race.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250907-agt?refcode=em20250907-36996&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ ]If you’re with us in the fight against fascism and Trump’s mass
deportations, donate $5 between Justice Democrats and
Angela’s campaign to help her go to Washington and fight for immigrant
families and working people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250907-agt?refcode=em20250907-36996&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ ]Contribute $5

Immigrants are not a problem to be solved — they are part of the solution.
Angela’s vision for immigration is grounded in humanity, inclusion, and
shared prosperity.

Instead of focusing on climbing the political ladder, she’s ready to give
it her all to fight for policies that reflect the reality and dignity of
the people who call CA-34 home, and stop Trump’s fascism in its tracks.

At the end of the day, it’s simple: on one side, it’s Trump, Jimmy Gomez,
and his corporate PAC donors. On the other, it’s us, Angela, and her
commitment to protecting her community, every single day. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250907-agt?refcode=em20250907-36996&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ ]Will you
join us?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250907-36996-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36996_1203867_4d2HOJ&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36996%2E1203867%2E4d2HOJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: The Squad isn’t just resisting authoritarianism — we’re organizing to defeat it:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250907-1511-foote&t=1001&akid=1511%2E342411%2E-CMpM6 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad isn’t just resisting authoritarianism — we’re organizing to
defeat it.

Right now, MAGA extremists and far-right forces are ramping up their
attacks. They’re targeting Squad Members, spreading hate, and doing
everything they can to silence the movement we’re building together.

Why? Because we’re fighting for a democracy that actually works — for
working people, not the ultra-wealthy.

We don’t take corporate PAC money. We never have, and we never will. Our
work is fueled by everyday people like you — not billionaires, not special
interests, not lobbyists.

And together, we’re taking action:

✅ Holding Trump, his administration, and far-right extremists accountable;

✅ Organizing at the grassroots level to build real, people-powered
political strength;

✅ Supporting our progressive champions who are fighting for justice,
equity, and democracy for all.

That’s why your support today is so important. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250907-movement.Bzum2x&refcode=em20250907-1511&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1511%2E342411%2E-CMpM6 ]Will you chip in
$3 — or whatever you can afford — to the Squad Victory Fund
today?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250907-movement.Bzum2x&refcode=em20250907-1511&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1511%2E342411%2E-CMpM6 ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1511%2E342411%2E-CMpM6

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, The Squad isn’t just resisting authoritarianism — we’re organizing to defeat it. Right now, MAGA extremists and far-right forces are ramping up their attacks. They’re targeting Squad Members, spreading hate, and doing everything they can to silence the movement we’re building together. Why? Because we’re fighting for a democracy that actually works — for working people, not the ultra-wealthy. We don’t take corporate PAC money. We never have, and we never will. Our work is fueled by everyday people like you — not billionaires, not special interests, not lobbyists. And together, we’re taking action: ✅ Holding Trump, his administration, and far-right extremists accountable; ✅ Organizing at the grassroots level to build real, people-powered political strength; ✅ Supporting our progressive champions who are fighting for justice, equity, and democracy for all. That’s why your support today is so important. [ ]Will you chip in $3 — or whatever you can afford — to the Squad Victory Fund today? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: If everyone reading this email pitched in $3:
body:
Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose:
---
Derek, With so much happening right now, you may not think that $3, $5, or $25 could make a difference in checking Trump’s power. **But you’d be wrong.** Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose: laying the groundwork to take back Congress. Investing in our state parties. Holding Trump and congressional Republicans accountable in the courts, in their own districts, online, and in the media — and making sure voters are hearing that message loud and clear. We are able to do this work because thousands of grassroots supporters just like you have chipped in what they could, when they could, to support our mission. Today, we’re going to ask you to join them — but first, let us tell you why. **Here’s what our path forward looks like:** It’s clearer than ever that we need to take back Congress and elect more Democrats who will prevent Trump’s worst instincts from becoming our new reality. To win the Senate majority, we need to build strong, statewide organizing programs in at least eight states — places like Georgia, North Carolina, Maine, and New Hampshire. On top of that, we’ll need strong Democratic infrastructure in districts all over the map, to win in 35 vulnerable Republican House seats. As you can imagine, all of that will take a HUGE number of resources. **[That’s why we’re asking for a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025. If winning back Congress is important to you, can you make your first $3 contribution today to help us keep building the strongest possible Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250907_4538_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4538_22930333_MRZjA-&akid=4538%2E22930333%2EMRZjA-) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250907_4538_fr&refcode2=4538_22930333_MRZjA-&akid=4538%2E22930333%2EMRZjA-)**

Thank you for your support,
The Democrats
⛅To all Democrats: 🇺🇸
If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 right now, we’d be well on our way to building the resources we need to organize and reach voters all over the country.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how high the stakes are to step up in this moment.
[**Will you make your first contribution to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250907_4538_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4538_22930333_MRZjA-&akid=4538%2E22930333%2EMRZjA-)

name: John Fetterman
subject: 🏈 here we go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey yinz,
It’s the first Steelers game of the season today, so I had to flex my Pittsburgh pride and say: ** _Here we go!_**
**I 💛 Pittsburgh.** While I **may** have ended up on the wrong side of a friendly sports bet with Philly’s mayor last season – and was FORCED to make some out-of-character statements – I want to leave no doubt in people’s minds:
**Steelers > Eagles** 🤝 **Sheetz > Wawa **
I’m looking forward to seeing my team out on the field this afternoon. Hope you’ll tune in too, or even be there in person (jealous), waving your terrible towel.
John ❤️
P.S. On my team? **[Chip in a few bucks](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk225-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10294%2E434096%2EgQb15W)** and help me tell Republicans **Do Your Job** – or we’ll find a Democrat to do it for you 😉

subject: We're suing Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Chuck Schumer. I **_urgently_** need you to sign my petition to protect voting rights.

Donald Trump signed an executive order to undermine free and fair elections -- and it is _completely illegal._ **We're suing Trump,** and I need _your_ help to prove Democrats are against this unconstitutional power grab.

**Please, will you sign my petition to defend our sacred voting rights? body:
With a new round of updates that'll remind you why this fight is worth it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787579/568147987/1328794144?refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=&emci=8dc6d1cb-728a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

You're reading the September edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** — and last month brought some incredible wins that prove our grassroots movement is unstoppable! From JanePAC-endorsed candidates taking on Trump to major environmental victories in the courts, we're seeing real change happen when communities refuse to back down. Let’s dive in! 👇
* * *
**🏛️ ADELITA VS DONALD TRUMP** In a huge climate victory, the U.S. Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals **blocked** the Oak Flat land swap that would have handed sacred Apache land in southern Arizona to foreign-owned mining giant Resolution Copper. Donald Trump quickly fired back on Truth Social, recklessly demanding that copper mining begin immediately. But JanePAC-endorsed climate champion Adelita Grijalva, the Democratic nominee for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, boldly stood up to Trump and defended sacred lands from corporate greed: With leaders like Adelita in Congress, we can trust that tribal lands will be protected from corporate exploitation — no matter who’s in the White House.
* * *
**📰 JANE IN THE NEWS** Jane doesn't shy away from her values, no matter where she is, and that was on full display last month at BMO Stadium in Los Angeles. When the jumbotron panned to her during an Angel City FC game, she proudly lifted her _Immigrant City_ sweater to send a clear message the scoreboard couldn’t: **Immigrants belong.** It's a perfect example of Jane's approach to activism. There's no “off switch” when it comes to standing up for what's right.
* * *
**🌱 JANE WANTS TO HEAR FROM YOU: TAKE THE CLIMATE ACTION PLEDGE** The climate crisis can feel insurmountable, but renowned scientist David Suzuki reminds us that when individual actions are multiplied across millions of people, they become a force no one can ignore. The David Suzuki Foundation released 10 powerful ways each of us can reduce our environmental impact and drive climate progress:
1. Urge government to take bold, ambitious climate action now.
2. Use energy wisely — and save money too!
3. Get charged up with renewables.
4. Eat for a climate-stable planet.
5. Start a climate conversation.
6. Green your commute.
7. Consume less, waste less, enjoy life more.
8. Invest in renewables and divest from fossil fuels.
9. Mobilize for local climate action.
10. Get politically active and VOTE.

**Jane wants to know: Which of these actions resonates most with you?[We're asking supporters to commit to three specific actions from this list and join hundreds of others taking the climate pledge. Will you take a moment to join them?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787580/568147988/248480305?refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=&emci=8dc6d1cb-728a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE THE CLIMATE ACTION PLEDGE →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787581/568147989/248480305?refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=&emci=8dc6d1cb-728a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

**📞 JANE'S GRASSROOTS CABINET QUARTERLY DEBRIEF CALL**
Thank you to everyone who joined Jane for our quarterly debrief on August 20th!
Our supporters heard directly from JanePAC-endorsed candidates Jay Jones (Virginia Attorney General) and Kimberly Pope Adams (Virginia House of Delegates), got an inside look at our endorsement process, and dug into what’s at stake in Virginia this November.
These calls have become some of Jane's favorite conversations, and it's easy to see why. There's something powerful about connecting directly with the people who make this work possible.
**If you missed the call, don't worry![A $10 monthly contribution gets you into Jane's Grassroots Cabinet with exclusive access to these quarterly conversations throughout the year, plus early access to events, merchandise discounts, and the chance for a personal thank-you call from Jane.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787582/568147990/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=)**

* * *
**📋 JANEPAC ADVOCACY AND VOLUNTEER UPDATE**
The JanePAC team has been hard at work mobilizing people power to defend our democracy, hold the line against Trump and his Republican allies, and help elect the next wave of climate champions at the state and local level.
When we asked all of you if Democratic leaders should fight fire with fire to counteract the Texas GOP gerrymandering scheme, more than 94 percent said “yes”.
Jane conveyed the message and personally wrote to several Democratic governors, urging them to use every tool at their disposal to counteract Republicans’ redistricting schemes, and she thanked those who have already taken action.
Now we‘re calling on everyone to take another step to stop Trump’s latest assault on our democracy: send letters to Congress demanding they do everything possible to stop Trump’s reckless authoritarian National Guard deployments in American cities. **[Click here to take action.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787584/568147992/2006057854?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-national-guard-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413%26ms%3Dea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=&emci=8dc6d1cb-728a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)**
Meanwhile, our endorsed candidates are gearing up for the final stretch of their campaigns. Early voting begins soon in many states, and the outcome of these races will shape the future of climate leadership and democracy for years to come. **[Add your name to our volunteer list today so you don’t miss crucial opportunities to help reach voters in key races across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114787585/568147993/-1641872660?refcode=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MmIxNWI3LTAyOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M7_PceLyTMQ2WSUOVkFA4NHCoGWs4dM3pvmNkv8bfWs=&emci=8dc6d1cb-728a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=992b15b7-028c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: With a new round of updates that'll remind you why this fight is worth it. | You're reading the September edition of The JanePAC Monthly — and last month brought some incredible wins that prove our grassroots movement is unstoppable! From JanePAC-endorsed candidates taking on Trump to major environmental victories in the courts, we're seeing real change happen when communities refuse to back down. Let’s dive in! 👇 🏛️ ADELITA VS DONALD TRUMP In a huge climate victory, the U.S. Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals blocked the Oak Flat land swap that would have handed sacred Apache land in southern Arizona to foreign-owned mining giant Resolution Copper. Donald Trump quickly fired back on Truth Social, recklessly demanding that copper mining begin immediately. But JanePAC-endorsed climate champion Adelita Grijalva, the Democratic nominee for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, boldly stood up to Trump and defended sacred lands from corporate greed: With leaders like Adelita in Congress, we can trust that tribal lands will be protected from corporate exploitation — no matter who’s in the White House. 📰 JANE IN THE NEWS Jane doesn't shy away from her values, no matter where she is, and that was on full display last month at BMO Stadium in Los Angeles. When the jumbotron panned to her during an Angel City FC game, she proudly lifted her Immigrant City sweater to send a clear message the scoreboard couldn’t: Immigrants belong. It's a perfect example of Jane's approach to activism. There's no “off switch” when it comes to standing up for what's right. 🌱 JANE WANTS TO HEAR FROM YOU: TAKE THE CLIMATE ACTION PLEDGE The climate crisis can feel insurmountable, but renowned scientist David Suzuki reminds us that when individual actions are multiplied across millions of people, they become a force no one can ignore. The David Suzuki Foundation released 10 powerful ways each of us can reduce our environmental impact and drive climate progress: 1. Urge government to take bold, ambitious climate action now. 2. Use energy wisely — and save money too! 3. Get charged up with renewables. 4. Eat for a climate-stable planet. 5. Start a climate conversation. 6. Green your commute. 7. Consume less, waste less, enjoy life more. 8. Invest in renewables and divest from fossil fuels. 9. Mobilize for local climate action. 10. Get politically active and VOTE. Jane wants to know: Which of these actions resonates most with you? | 📞 JANE'S GRASSROOTS CABINET QUARTERLY DEBRIEF CALL Thank you to everyone who joined Jane for our quarterly debrief on August 20th! Our supporters heard directly from JanePAC-endorsed candidates Jay Jones (Virginia Attorney General) and Kimberly Pope Adams (Virginia House of Delegates), got an inside look at our endorsement process, and dug into what’s at stake in Virginia this November. These calls have become some of Jane's favorite conversations, and it's easy to see why. There's something powerful about connecting directly with the people who make this work possible. If you missed the call, don't worry = 📋 JANEPAC ADVOCACY AND VOLUNTEER UPDATE The JanePAC team has been hard at work mobilizing people power to defend our democracy, hold the line against Trump and his Republican allies, and help elect the next wave of climate champions at the state and local level. When we asked all of you if Democratic leaders should fight fire with fire to counteract the Texas GOP gerrymandering scheme, more than 94 percent said “yes”. Jane conveyed the message and personally wrote to several Democratic governors, urging them to use every tool at their disposal to counteract Republicans’ redistricting schemes, and she thanked those who have already taken action. Now we‘re calling on everyone to take another step to stop Trump’s latest assault on our democracy: send letters to Congress demanding they do everything possible to stop Trump’s reckless authoritarian National Guard deployments in American cities. Meanwhile, our endorsed candidates are gearing up for the final stretch of their campaigns. Early voting begins soon in many states, and the outcome of these races will shape the future of climate leadership and democracy for years to come. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Because while Trump and his allies rewrite rules from the top, it’s state-level leaders who will ensure every vote is counted, and certify the results.

subject: I'm not afraid to stand up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor

Like many of you, I've watched in horror as Donald Trump has taken a sledgehammer to our country and abused his power.

His decision to deploy the National Guard in Washington, D.C., is especially horrifying. **He is seizing control of the city to draw focus away from his unpopular and failing programs.**
And friend, if he can do this to Washington, D.C., there is no reason he can't do it to other cities – including cities right here in Colorado.

_In fact, Donald Trump is already lashing out against us by moving Space Command HQ out of Colorado because he doesn't like our mail-in voting system._

**It will be up to our next governor to stand up to Donald Trump and stop his abuses of power, and that's exactly what I plan to do.

That's why I'm running for governor of Colorado. Together, we can fight Trump's extreme agenda while building a better future for our kids and grandkids. [So please, will you chip in $5 or more to join my team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114788711/568152014/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk891-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmUwZmI2NC0wNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B64GHsc03EMuEYCgzq3-IpvT9YRBvZqVkWDazEcGkIE=)**

Coloradans need a governor who is ready to stand up to Trump from day one. A governor who can set an example for other states to follow of how to fight back and not just resist, but defeat, Trumpism.
Well, I've got a long history of serving our state at every level, from improving student achievement as superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, to balancing the city's budget as chief of staff to Denver’s mayor, to working to lower costs and protect our public lands as senator.
**Now, I'm ready to take that experience to the statehouse, where I will work tirelessly to rebuild our middle class in Colorado and build an economy that works for everyone, not just the people at the top.[But I need your help to get there, friend, so please: Will you give $5, or anything at all, to help me win this race for governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114788724/568152032/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk891-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmUwZmI2NC0wNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B64GHsc03EMuEYCgzq3-IpvT9YRBvZqVkWDazEcGkIE=)**

clean_body: | | | = Like many of you, I've watched in horror as Donald Trump has taken a sledgehammer to our country and abused his power. His decision to deploy the National Guard in Washington, D.C., is especially horrifying. He is seizing control of the city to draw focus away from his unpopular and failing programs. And friend, if he can do this to Washington, D.C., there is no reason he can't do it to other cities – including cities right here in Colorado. In fact, Donald Trump is already lashing out against us by moving Space Command HQ out of Colorado because he doesn't like our mail-in voting system. It will be up to our next governor to stand up to Donald Trump and stop his abuses of power, and that's exactly what I plan to do. That's why I'm running for governor of Colorado. Together, we can fight Trump's extreme agenda while building a better future for our kids and grandkids. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Coloradans need a governor who is ready to stand up to Trump from day one. A governor who can set an example for other states to follow of how to fight back and not just resist, but defeat, Trumpism. Well, I've got a long history of serving our state at every level, from improving student achievement as superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, to balancing the city's budget as chief of staff to Denver’s mayor, to working to lower costs and protect our public lands as senator. Now, I'm ready to take that experience to the statehouse, where I will work tirelessly to rebuild our middle class in Colorado and build an economy that works for everyone, not just the people at the top.= Thank you so much for being on my team and believing in the better future we can create together. – Michael | | = | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Here’s why I’m in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This is deeply personal to me.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
I’m going to share more about why I’m running for U.S. Senate, but if you’re already on board, [**please chip in $5 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250907_1_running?refcode=em20250907-2214&amount=5&refcode2=2214_582294_QMWt8g&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state — and one who is ready to lead on day one.
Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.
[**Can I count on you to back my campaign with a $5 contribution right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250907_1_running?refcode=em20250907-2214&amount=5&refcode2=2214_582294_QMWt8g&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away — and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.
I’m also happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** — a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.
I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant — seriously!)._ I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**
My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead — not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?
[**If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Show your support with a $5 donation now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250907_1_running?refcode=em20250907-2214&amount=5&refcode2=2214_582294_QMWt8g&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250907_1_running?amount=5&refcode=em20250907-2214&refcode2=2214_582294_QMWt8g&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)**
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250907-1?t=2&refcode2=2214_582294_QMWt8g&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2214%2E582294%2EQMWt8g)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

subject: Ban congressional stock trading

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=scPWwcv1iZGxSYdl5WGO41jNRaZE%2BpF1I0kiCIqv3HULOWE3cCzjw0tHIFibmW60nuiQ0%2FFUH3aCKwLIdIyvS4B6oPLC3Uxtjo7t3WTZiIV8rvGCbTAKKk5ztE%2FakXcNWJViilGp%2Bzc8rKkGwza74OL5e4ck2mPOkbHs7Q1ZUDFaQ7M5%2B0MAEQ3Nzhknm6O%2BLUczK5ly0zoLmc97nG78qXqvE5mowR9OGZCqsYlKGHupa6k07oouhq59rIK7Cr3%2B2d%2FUoZfDVQTQuVM1GujdQQ7ZEbekytkmMn6EnE7B83g%2FE8wSX6D%2FlKNuFBy32KgwVP3Zy4d5z8El51RBB89olSn7dRdHNr9Kz8j3dP09VCwX%2BkFvKWC%2BJmSOZ1nLefXyPS6g01ClkvXVxj5saS1z5Iaf6aXJSZPJQdN%2BiXPmYUOyP%2BTANLWJQE93Gwc5FEjp)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

**If you’re elected to Congress, your job is simple: serve the public. **

It’s not to trade stocks on the side. It’s not to use inside information to pad your investment account. And it’s certainly not to put your financial portfolio ahead of the people you represent.

As Democrats, we understand that when corruption reigns in Washington, it is the rich special interests who benefit and working people who get left behind. That is why we must be vocal about the need to end dark money in our elections, cryptocurrency being sold from the Oval Office, and stock trading by Members of Congress.

This week I announced that **I am co-leading a new bipartisan bill to ban stock trading by Members of Congress.** The _Restore Trust in Congress Act_ is our best chance yet to end the practice of insider trading in Congress once and for all.

The truth is, this ban is overwhelmingly popular. Democrats, Republicans, independents — _most Americans_ — agree it’s time to get this done. But in Washington, there are plenty of powerful voices who benefit from the current system and will do whatever it takes to stall reform.

That’s where you come in. I need grassroots supporters like you to stand with me and help build the pressure to pass this ban once and for all. **[Will you sign on today to show your support and help us keep fighting until we get this done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790150/568157372/-1895891262?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250907_EN_StockTrading_0_6MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTg3NTY4My0wNThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OpXI_yCsNPtsEIgD2NOuc7ic6a03raFHQCQeSMFbCU=&emci=30875683-058c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=45875683-058c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15384964)** | | [Sign On →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790151/568157373/-1895891262?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250907_EN_StockTrading_0_6MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTg3NTY4My0wNThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OpXI_yCsNPtsEIgD2NOuc7ic6a03raFHQCQeSMFbCU=&emci=30875683-058c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=45875683-058c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15384964)
---
If we want a government that works for the people, then we need rules that make it impossible for lawmakers to profit from the job. I’m not going to stop fighting until we pass this ban — but I need your support to get there.

Let’s get this done.

— Seth

clean_body: Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, If you’re elected to Congress, your job is simple: serve the public. It’s not to trade stocks on the side. It’s not to use inside information to pad your investment account. And it’s certainly not to put your financial portfolio ahead of the people you represent. As Democrats, we understand that when corruption reigns in Washington, it is the rich special interests who benefit and working people who get left behind. That is why we must be vocal about the need to end dark money in our elections, cryptocurrency being sold from the Oval Office, and stock trading by Members of Congress. This week I announced that I am co-leading a new bipartisan bill to ban stock trading by Members of Congress. The Restore Trust in Congress Act is our best chance yet to end the practice of insider trading in Congress once and for all. The truth is, this ban is overwhelmingly popular. Democrats, Republicans, independents — most Americans — agree it’s time to get this done. But in Washington, there are plenty of powerful voices who benefit from the current system and will do whatever it takes to stall reform. That’s where you come in. I need grassroots supporters like you to stand with me and help build the pressure to pass this ban once and for all. | | If we want a government that works for the people, then we need rules that make it impossible for lawmakers to profit from the job. I’m not going to stop fighting until we pass this ban — but I need your support to get there. Let’s get this done. — Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

Hey Everyone!
Following our incredible event with Congressman Louie Gohmert last month, we are excited to invite you to the Arapahoe Tea Party Regular Monthly Meeting for September.
This month, we will hear from Former Vice Chair of the Colorado GOP, Priscilla Rahn, on her new book, Restoring Education in America: An Inspirational Teacher Toolbox.
As you may know, Priscilla is a teacher in the Denver Public School system and has a front row seat to the disastrous policies our school boards are inflicting on our children.
We also invite candidates up for election in November 2025 to join us and share your message, so we can best support you.
This year, we will have critical elections for School Boards, City Councils, mayoral races, and other municipal offices that make a difference in our communities.
All politics are local, and we must support these individuals as best we can!
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting.

Fellow Hoosier,

**We knew this would happen.** Less than 30 days after Indiana banned DEI discrimination in state contracts, **the radical Left is mobilizing their legal army.** Woke activists are preparing to challenge Indiana's merit-first approach in court. They want to force us back to racial quotas and sex-based hiring mandates. **They can't stand that Indiana chose fairness over woke ideology.** Here's what we're up against: _🚨 Liberal legal groups with_** _MILLIONS_** _in dark money_ _🚨_** _Activist judges_** _who prioritize political correctness_ _🚨 Corporate pressure campaigns to_** _weaken_** _our resolve_

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: 🚨🚨🚨Trump’s illegal troop deployment ruled unconstitutional!
body:
Donald Trump’s attempt to use the U.S. military as his own personal police force just hit a major roadblock. A federal judge ruled that Trump’s deployment of the National Guard in Los Angeles violated the Posse Comitatus Act — a law that prevents presidents from sending troops into our communities for political gain. This is a MAJOR victory, and we need to make it clear RIGHT AWAY that the American people stand behind this ruling and expect the administration to follow it. That’s why we’re asking you to go on record immediately. Do you support the court’s ruling that Trump’s National Guard deployment in Los Angeles was illegal? name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Our national parks are under serious threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Oregonians know the quiet awe that comes from standing in a forest older than our country, feeling the salt spray along a wild coastline, or peering into the blue depths of a lake in a volcanic caldera.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790679/568159256/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBjYjlmZC0wOThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKtgG7uccA0_2saILhm49H4FLI7sme_4JWxfsSSySfI=&emci=6a7f181d-618b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=900cb9fd-098c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Oregonians know the quiet awe that comes from standing in a forest older than our country, feeling the salt spray along a wild coastline, or peering into the blue depths of a lake in a volcanic caldera.**Our national parks shape who we are — and they're under serious threat.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790680/568159257/-1474285354?contactdata=eW0MmUKrqpP1YdkQCBA4KURlSFiKkpvUVf+4E1/K/jabBTTz8pcP3BKhKoAvxbln8QQS8r5pYGtbs/1KW9OtBtAROtVovis/65hsJ3CB43j/G+62tNJ6UdUUY3PQ9tqCJFGWNzgp8vOqUq4RUQ0yQQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBjYjlmZC0wOThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKtgG7uccA0_2saILhm49H4FLI7sme_4JWxfsSSySfI=&emci=6a7f181d-618b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=900cb9fd-098c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215) National parks have lost 24 percent of their permanent employees since President Trump took office, according to data compiled by the nonprofit National Parks Conservation Association. The impacts here at home in Oregon could be especially cruel. Take Crater Lake National Park, Oregon's only full-fledged national park. It's a natural wonder, a place of deep cultural meaning and jaw-dropping beauty. Last year, over half a million people visited to experience nature and marvel at the deepest lake in the U.S., supporting local businesses in southern Oregon and generating over $80 million in economic output. **Make no mistake: Trump's budget slashing means reduced staffing, fewer ranger and family programs, closed facilities, trails, and campgrounds, and the end of critical wildfire prevention work** — in a region already hit hard by climate chaos. But the threat doesn't stop there. From Southern Oregon's Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument, which was specifically mentioned in Project 2025, to the windswept headlands of Lewis and Clark National Historical Park on the Oregon coast, these landscapes tell the story of our state's geology, history, and biodiversity. **Under Trump, the future of these iconic places is squarely on the chopping block.** That's why I'm fighting in the Senate to stop Trump's sabotage of our national parks. [**Add your name to stand up for our national parks and tell Trump to keep his hands off our public lands! Let's tell this administration that our national parks are not for sale.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790681/568159258/-1474285354?contactdata=eW0MmUKrqpP1YdkQCBA4KURlSFiKkpvUVf+4E1/K/jabBTTz8pcP3BKhKoAvxbln8QQS8r5pYGtbs/1KW9OtBtAROtVovis/65hsJ3CB43j/G+62tNJ6UdUUY3PQ9tqCJFGWNzgp8vOqUq4RUQ0yQQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBjYjlmZC0wOThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKtgG7uccA0_2saILhm49H4FLI7sme_4JWxfsSSySfI=&emci=6a7f181d-618b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=900cb9fd-098c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114790682/568159259/-1474285354?contactdata=eW0MmUKrqpP1YdkQCBA4KURlSFiKkpvUVf+4E1/K/jabBTTz8pcP3BKhKoAvxbln8QQS8r5pYGtbs/1KW9OtBtAROtVovis/65hsJ3CB43j/G+62tNJ6UdUUY3PQ9tqCJFGWNzgp8vOqUq4RUQ0yQQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDBjYjlmZC0wOThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKtgG7uccA0_2saILhm49H4FLI7sme_4JWxfsSSySfI=&emci=6a7f181d-618b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=900cb9fd-098c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Oregonians know the quiet awe that comes from standing in a forest older than our country, feeling the salt spray along a wild coastline, or peering into the blue depths of a lake in a volcanic caldera. | | | | Oregonians know the quiet awe that comes from standing in a forest older than our country, feeling the salt spray along a wild coastline, or peering into the blue depths of a lake in a volcanic caldera.Our national parks shape who we are — and they're under serious threat. National parks have lost 24 percent of their permanent employees since President Trump took office, according to data compiled by the nonprofit National Parks Conservation Association. The impacts here at home in Oregon could be especially cruel. Take Crater Lake National Park, Oregon's only full-fledged national park. It's a natural wonder, a place of deep cultural meaning and jaw-dropping beauty. Last year, over half a million people visited to experience nature and marvel at the deepest lake in the U.S., supporting local businesses in southern Oregon and generating over $80 million in economic output. Make no mistake: Trump's budget slashing means reduced staffing, fewer ranger and family programs, closed facilities, trails, and campgrounds, and the end of critical wildfire prevention work — in a region already hit hard by climate chaos. But the threat doesn't stop there. From Southern Oregon's Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument, which was specifically mentioned in Project 2025, to the windswept headlands of Lewis and Clark National Historical Park on the Oregon coast, these landscapes tell the story of our state's geology, history, and biodiversity. Under Trump, the future of these iconic places is squarely on the chopping block. That's why I'm fighting in the Senate to stop Trump's sabotage of our national parks. Onward! Republicans know what this means. Their donors are already lining up to flood this Central Valley district with attack ads to save incumbent Republican David Valadao. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s time to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The American people deserve representatives who serve their interests, not their own portfolios.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250907-5412-footer&t=1&akid=5412%2E420207%2EvQdPQU)
Peter,
For too long, Members of Congress have been allowed to trade individual stocks — with many influenced by the very policies they vote on. That needs to end.
**That’s why I just introduced a bipartisan bill to ban Members of Congress and their families from owning, buying, or selling individual stocks and other similar assets.**
At a time when only two in ten Americans trust government to do what’s right, the _Restore Trust in Congress Act_ is an important starting point for changing that.
But introducing the bill is only the first step. We need to make it clear to _all_ of our colleagues in Congress that the people are fed up with the status quo and it’s time to make public service about serving the public — not lining their own pockets.
**That means we need your voice, too.[Will you add your name to my petition demanding a ban on Members of Congress trading individual stocks?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250907-1-stock-trading-ban/?source=em20250907-5412&akid=5412%2E420207%2EvQdPQU)**
**[Sign The Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250907-1-stock-trading-ban/?source=em20250907-5412&akid=5412%2E420207%2EvQdPQU)**
The American people deserve representatives who serve their interests, not their own portfolios. Together, we can pass this bill and make sure that’s the case.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250907-5412-footer&t=2&refcode2=5412_420207_vQdPQU&akid=5412%2E420207%2EvQdPQU)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

subject: Donald Trump wants to turn Kansas into a one-party state. He’ll have to get through me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
They think Kansas Democrats don’t deserve a single seat in Congress

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792627/568165825/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVkY2I5Mi0wZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8y7C4h9HAyFE3-1xs90hmNA5F33IfZumBKVVrGbEdLE=) I want to tell you a story. Back in 2021, when extreme Republican politicians still believed my victories were a fluke, they redrew KS-03’s boundaries to make it more difficult for me to win. They moved thousands of people who previously voted for me to a neighboring district — all to give my opponent a significant advantage in the next election. It was gerrymandering, plain and simple. And after they did it, Republican politicians thought they finally had my number. **But they were wrong.** In the next election, we won by even more. By bringing folks together, focusing on the issues, and ignoring the political distractions, we built a campaign that welcomed Democrats, Republicans, and Unaffiliateds alike. **And that made GOP politicians _furious_.** They think Kansas Democrats don’t deserve a single seat in Congress. Instead, they want to turn Kansas into a one-party state. **So now, they’re coming back to try and finish the job.** Make no mistake: The latest scheme Republican politicians are pushing in Topeka goes so much further than their last gerrymander. They want to make _every_ Congressional district in Kansas a guaranteed win for the GOP. No more competitive elections _anywhere_. **But we’ve overcome their gerrymandering schemes before. And I know we can do it again.** [_**This team has had my back for so many years. And now, I’m leaning on you more than ever. Please, will you chip in whatever you can to help make sure KS-03 doesn’t fall into the hands of the National GOP?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792629/568165828/-2097022923?refcode=email_090725_story&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVkY2I5Mi0wZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8y7C4h9HAyFE3-1xs90hmNA5F33IfZumBKVVrGbEdLE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792632/568165830/-2097022923?refcode=email_090725_story&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzVkY2I5Mi0wZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8y7C4h9HAyFE3-1xs90hmNA5F33IfZumBKVVrGbEdLE=)

And that made GOP politicians furious. They think Kansas Democrats don’t deserve a single seat in Congress. Instead, they want to turn Kansas into a one-party state. So now, they’re coming back to try and finish the job. Make no mistake: The latest scheme Republican politicians are pushing in Topeka goes so much further than their last gerrymander. They want to make every Congressional district in Kansas a guaranteed win for the GOP. No more competitive elections anywhere. But we’ve overcome their gerrymandering schemes before. And I know we can do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Donald Trump wants to turn Kansas into a one-party state. With your help, that will never happen. Thank you for everything, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. I’m ready to fight for every family to have a chance to succeed — no matter where they come from.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792708/568166199/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.07_Family-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJhMGQ2NDUtMTA4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4KyRl-B7-s0EUYUJy-xMgST94aiX_bdFRi7BJOWi13Q=) Friend, 63 years ago yesterday, my parents risked _everything_ to escape a dictatorship and come to the United States — hoping they could build a better future for our family here than they could in Cuba. They left behind their community, and my dad abandoned his dream of becoming a lawyer. I grew up watching my dad work two jobs just to make ends meet. Their story isn’t unique — it’s the story of countless immigrants who have come to our country with the hope of achieving the American Dream. Now, we’re watching Donald Trump’s dictatorship unfold right here in the U.S. Arizonans are struggling to put food on the table or find a good-paying job, while David Schweikert rolls over for Trump’s destructive agenda. _I’m running for Congress to boot out Schweikert and fight for _every_ family to have a chance to succeed — no matter where they come from._ Folks in AZ-01 deserve a new leader — one who will go to the mat for them and fight the corruption plaguing our government today. **[_This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters who understand the urgency of this moment. If you’re ready to unseat Schweikert and flip the House in 2026, will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792709/568166208/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.07_Family-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJhMGQ2NDUtMTA4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4KyRl-B7-s0EUYUJy-xMgST94aiX_bdFRi7BJOWi13Q=)** | [If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114792710/568166212/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.07_Family-Story_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJhMGQ2NDUtMTA4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4KyRl-B7-s0EUYUJy-xMgST94aiX_bdFRi7BJOWi13Q=)

clean_body: I’m ready to fight for every family to have a chance to succeed — no matter where they come from. | | = = Friend, 63 years ago yesterday, my parents risked everything to escape a dictatorship and come to the United States — hoping they could build a better future for our family here than they could in Cuba. They left behind their community, and my dad abandoned his dream of becoming a lawyer. I grew up watching my dad work two jobs just to make ends meet. Their story isn’t unique — it’s the story of countless immigrants who have come to our country with the hope of achieving the American Dream. Now, we’re watching Donald Trump’s dictatorship unfold right here in the U.S. Arizonans are struggling to put food on the table or find a good-paying job, while David Schweikert rolls over for Trump’s destructive agenda. I’m running for Congress to boot out Schweikert and fight for every family to have a chance to succeed — no matter where they come from. Folks in AZ-01 deserve a new leader — one who will go to the mat for them and fight the corruption plaguing our government today. = | = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for helping me fight back, — Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. We need 4,000 local responses before 11:59 PM tonight to validate our data. Florida just became the first state to eliminate **ALL vaccine requirements,_including for schoolchildren._**

This is a break from a long-standing practice that public health experts say has helped control the spread of dangerous diseases for generations!

[**_This is straight up DANGEROUS, Team!!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68212?t=9&akid=23370%2E4449941%2Eaprpks)

And the worst part is, it doesn’t stop there. **Just look at what the former CDC immunizations chief said:**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68212?t=10&akid=23370%2E4449941%2Eaprpks)

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: Instead of doing their jobs, Republicans held a vote to punish me for doing mine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908-1?refcode=em20250907-2323&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)
Hi, it's LaMonica McIver. Sarah McBride and I serve together in Congress, and she told me I could reach out.
Republican Rep. Clay Higgins tried to censure me—to shame me on the House floor and strip me of my committee—all for doing my job.
And, you know what, he _FAILED._
I stood my ground. And we showed Republicans that when we stand together, we stand strong.
This is a victory, but the fight isn’t over. Not by a long shot.
**[Stand with us »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908-1?refcode=em20250907-2323&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)**
They will keep trying to silence me and attack me—**they have literally charged me with crimes for doing my job.** And I will keep standing up and fighting back. Because I know what’s right.
It’s not lost on me that Republicans tried to throw me off of the committee charged with doing oversight of DHS—all for _doing_ oversight of DHS. But this is about more than me. It is about how far the Republican Party will put themselves out on a limb to serve Donald Trump and his cruel agenda.
They tried to shame me. They failed, and they will keep failing because I won’t fold. Not now, not ever.
But I need you with me RIGHT NOW. This is just the beginning of the work we have ahead.
**We were able to fight back this time, but we know that the Trump administration won’t stop trying to punish me for doing my job to hold them accountable.** That’s why they’re continuing on with their baseless legal battle and charges against me.
[**They are taking me to court, and we need to amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this administration. Can I count on you to pitch in to Congresswoman Sarah McBride and me to help us keep fighting back? We need to raise $13,194 to reach our goal, so we can counter Republicans' latest attacks. Every gift is a huge help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908-1?refcode=em20250907-2323&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908-1?refcode=em20250907-2323&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)**
I'll never apologize for doing the people's work. Thank you for standing with me as the Trump administration and its allies try everything they can to silence my voice.
[**You can help me fight back by chipping in to Sarah McBride and me to help us close our $13,194 budget gap.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908-1?refcode=em20250907-2323&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)
We're in this together,
LaMonica
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250908-1&t=1&refcode2=2323_21716_M964bY&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2323%2E21716%2EM964bY)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

clean_body: This is the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House. | = | Peter, I know you probably don’t want to see another political email asking for money, especially during the weekend but... What if I told you Republicans have more than 5 times the money in the bank than Democrats? What if I told you Trump is amassing an unprecedented war chest to keep Republicans in control of Congress? What if I told you our September FEC deadline is just weeks away and we’re falling dramatically short of our grassroots goal? | = This is the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House. Every day we see the chaos Republicans are unleashing. Winning the House won’t fix everything. However, it will give us the power to block the next wave of cruelty, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption, and finally go on the offensive again. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me and helping keep this seat blue. —Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Candace Owens
subject: Candace Owens: This is why I chose PreBorn!
body:
I’ve spent years listening to the abortion debate. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/a5YwoUp4lDPUeI27xhaN2PYSID_aFwEMfLvN_T2BhVCMdap_BX-NdSFxh-4ltYmvrN3bgvWeulZg26Lc15KWY0nL2d2ninsBwQMeP_LslaEEgiKWBYLHlttEW8n1ZVVfJ-ApFHJXih8EmLCeBDYFa5TQxnm46uWTG0OsMgjk-qCc2x5du6o32U57/Mu8CRVYbNh9KN4y7m2-5vsbj8rWoDiww/12)_
| | Fellow American,

I've spent years listening to the abortion debate. I've heard the pro-choice arguments. And I've rejected them.
But I've also heard a lot of voices on the conservative side, loud voices that haven't sat right with me either. Too many are angry. Too many are performative. And too few are actually doing something to help women. That's why I chose to stand with PreBorn! _[**Because they are not just talking about life. They are showing up for it.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Kt_ja337y6hDcE8u0wAuxu6fDCeZN_WhCfEWSRa-IdzSTRi42THdsKWO9PxW39fz3FmRG1Yf_zymJhz_GcxKUf6O8nQlpK3kxmLPjJ6I4B_LFQRMMD4He6Yl2-3w8HyfdDsAaBnplf5tNwwh_gV82u_Gn_HyIlgeGHG9R86kyoAXJICwuFGyKzuJ5gTbVtWCk9K1pxVxH-DEFwxqNMmEEUq_sHWpKrzsmvg6NCdgdQHBOw2fILRq-L_ex0S3gxaG-oyxTCjcqiiwDU-GOpd77aNoKbR8aPxSR-Geuu8WRSdpHAVhurusdHZor7OJz-4f-W1aUVkoqNN74xpDnnD9LDZHFjm2nDUVfiNM-KO051bHCUTUYpOQ2ZjnEjcs4bcOeOMFl9b_aDBLVigQgRdRQ94RdGKN_DhRrh3xjAVxtC1hYpmhn2VKPCL7ccNLpBqE0K_l9adN88GuBARTox-3TlW-QDzrKeYZMJOCSRXyHbAm8QI_tkefhAaxuJe816mfIHAnSIVqA_2-3Sav-70DDUxEdo-qnRmhru2mo5MlYaQaTFrjQInK5P6SgfWglpBH5_igoypycc02obpgHPMVac1WOSfzRNo-_xqGJv6NwhI-hOVXtOZfy3Hh_cD5o6GibF9QUiKfxYfWalZ4hrDnyIG2ydtBKhaMQVnFzS10Lw7tbxI/N710aMqHRuB_UJG6MoWgIS8x5z0cQr4l/12)_ They meet women who are scared and alone. They offer them a free ultrasound. They help them see the truth . . . that there's a living child inside them. And they do it all with love, not shame. But they don't stop there.

PreBorn! stays.

They walk with that mother for up to two years, providing real support, material help, and a relationship grounded in dignity and faith.
---
**This is the kind of voice I 've been waiting to hear in the pro-life space.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ZOmkhnKikpx8xgp7I27m646Mqlc57_GDMkUeLRPD3V3sPiOXnXJshNdsxpDMtpukJiVXcNOujy3a7v9Fb6R611c9q_AkjLvlOBd_UTSezuFNHYg0Un3M6usSXNRpVtIFuWVq1rhj31fWFydbUie5xzW9t8b9iBx9MucSb91E0wv7PN1vb6OzD6IXbvJXjNqJZ8feGssR9k6m6ATK8_S6c0jkOpkf8JTTBW3C1-FOzI90yHjMhUZBVQYjklBwHlC2qVtqbUDjNICJgTDeL5crJdWesthqqACVJXExDmLn9j50NSdxAsOct01Rh2xyW4zYssD4Hl3AxQjoWGP_vE7BS1rC6WveKscT_S-6fli-fsaf5K-uhSvmwWf12OJa4Y8dpkjaBwce47AAlw0qtYg6VJ26Kt3yWz9iQXwrkRb_wwG3amkqL_cTiMABd-wnrBgnQj94urwTRnnhLS6pJJ2DCnft9MTSVdZ6L0QqECUzv0WqWdtk9r4gVb9MVXk1qoNSWXBPV0bV_7QFWZwvyslDLoZ2qYVx5NqqHzZhjtJuzNHMAE5mdLp3eKSSlmBgmYr6WbzTg0YDyTt3H6aYxUjIDTidOpbX6pqyRppumYdAjLq_e_-KQYQ8U5eSIYRr-Ihb7udg11o0oFa6WfCcmW3unKSaG03XG8b2PhYU-BvZqx1H9PU/K_0Wha2miNRknWkDBgTnsSfaZtT5ELaV/12)
---
And this is why I've partnered with them. Now I'm asking you to join me. Just $28 provides a life-saving ultrasound.
It could be the moment a mother chooses life for her baby and opens her heart to a new future.
---
[_**Give to PreBorn! Today >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/34GU2k4QsIscDxBJGytgk5DAmo_JiJVp38iN8GpUjR-_RnRulVxBxp1hMX4xPa4ZTLhxsg2uO1A5ek1b53Z9u0byWHcK6-VNyHJTpeWX5DazZdbqBusaU_C0h-K3LshatMXLPMsmLkgVDmeyQ32TSkdDgZCNMqHYZ_evHbfl6VYML9NjCNawbDVeX_X9O9WFRFTaOI3Disfl3EExxPS0ChPMoVYos8RkR-WiHMSQQLDE4mZ9Tlgi4UN8_eE3eCDi2h4N7Ah2QoL06YLaE4EavtjRO8vDqryp8cXG_1PcyMOE_giNUxF8nBNrWadv_uU04nrMMbTASiUBl8Eu5ebdlwI0s9CvW1_KqaL2GNNcVhv-xaGSQeptoj8Li3IC77kjradyXcrVVbNpV0RdRKRXAyRug6HKAqszvzl_ChiZMEBMM-VbhPzLiEc9XUl5EhmgQab7avRCkPX6bZ1dWIHF-ni3EovLT20TguwMjJ4xvruXRdkcN6wj8tnjZiPZ_XjYCR5Sl3ZWiV9xQxEz3TIOt_ELDiB9YRQobvBFuhSg9gUTqNXfaxPEdrwv9Kuxoa1hnZjeJuOcUfZOHxHcTwLWmldxVZzxG0LY4e2HTwQfPh13WPuJ5ClUbMwYzzZ_vdFyzZifSRDnIvdxw4QFCEL8Vo34mMqQQmAhrSHH80aJnY3OCGw/5SQ7C42VZ1JW0K1Q5hcQ0I7bGWzA38Cx/12)
---
I don't lend my voice lightly.
But I've seen what PreBorn! is doing.
They're saving babies. They're standing with mothers. They're doing the work that matters. And they are not stopping. Let's support the people who are actually making a difference. For Life,
Candace Owens
Supporting Partner of PreBorn!
---

subject: Republicans could call a constitutional convention without a single Democratic vote.
body:
This possibility is much, much closer than you'd imagine |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114793974/568170270/-877057620?sourceid=1056948&refcode=WUEFE910_20250907_ConConRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBmODA3Ni0xNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_Zc3Ynkc15nbhM28UpTfaA3CB79S5b1tDLyC6FgklQ=) Peter,

We know Republicans are working to destroy our fundamental freedoms from every angle. They're banning abortion, attacking IVF, and, based on rumblings from certain Republican-controlled legislatures, coming for birth control next. They're radically reshaping our courts and destroying our federal workforce. They're flouting foundational American ideals in order to fashion the current president into an unstoppable tyrant.

**They've made it clear, in other words, that their goal is to attack the very root of what defines America.**

And there's one plan of attack that doesn't get enough attention: **The Republican plot to rewrite the U.S. Constitution.** You read that right: If the GOP controls enough state legislatures, they can call a constitutional convention and _rewrite_ our country's founding document.

[**State races are ground zero in the fight for our freedoms. Please donate to EMILYs List today if you're ready to help Democratic pro-choice women WIN at every level of office, everywhere:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114793975/568170271/-877057620?sourceid=1056948&refcode=WUEFE910_20250907_ConConRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBmODA3Ni0xNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_Zc3Ynkc15nbhM28UpTfaA3CB79S5b1tDLyC6FgklQ=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114793976/568170272/-140265690?sourceid=1056948&refcode=WUEFE910_20250907_ConConRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBmODA3Ni0xNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_Zc3Ynkc15nbhM28UpTfaA3CB79S5b1tDLyC6FgklQ=)
---
Republicans have been working for decades to overwhelm state legislatures and rewrite the rules to ensure they stay in power at all costs. 28 states have already pledged to call for a constitutional convention, which means Republicans need to convince just SIX more to enshrine their anti-choice, anti-democracy ideas into our Constitution.

**I'm here to tell you we won't let that happen.** We've been working to build governing majorities in critical states for decades, because we know that state legislatures are vital in protecting our rights. This cycle is no different: we have strong Democratic pro-choice women running at the state level in both 2025 and 2026. **_Every win_ for a Democratic pro-choice woman means Republicans get further from their goal. **
[**That's why we need you, Peter. Take a stand for our freedoms by supporting our work to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. Join the movement by donating here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114793977/568170273/-877057620?sourceid=1056948&refcode=WUEFE910_20250907_ConConRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBmODA3Ni0xNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_Zc3Ynkc15nbhM28UpTfaA3CB79S5b1tDLyC6FgklQ=)
