clean_body: This possibility is much, much closer than you'd imagine | = Peter, We know Republicans are working to destroy our fundamental freedoms from every angle. They're banning abortion, attacking IVF, and, based on rumblings from certain Republican-controlled legislatures, coming for birth control next. They're radically reshaping our courts and destroying our federal workforce. They're flouting foundational American ideals in order to fashion the current president into an unstoppable tyrant. They've made it clear, in other words, that their goal is to attack the very root of what defines America. And there's one plan of attack that doesn't get enough attention: The Republican plot to rewrite the U.S. Constitution. You read that right: If the GOP controls enough state legislatures, they can call a constitutional convention and rewrite our country's founding document. = | = Republicans have been working for decades to overwhelm state legislatures and rewrite the rules to ensure they stay in power at all costs. 28 states have already pledged to call for a constitutional convention, which means Republicans need to convince just SIX more to enshrine their anti-choice, anti-democracy ideas into our Constitution. I'm here to tell you we won't let that happen. We've been working to build governing majorities in critical states for decades, because we know that state legislatures are vital in protecting our rights. This cycle is no different: we have strong Democratic pro-choice women running at the state level in both 2025 and 2026. Every win for a Democratic pro-choice woman means Republicans get further from their goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for taking a stand, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Tobias Read
subject: Catastrophic
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I recently published a major op-ed in MSNBC because I feel a responsibility to speak out as Oregon’s top elections official.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3]
President Trump says he may try to end vote-by-mail with an executive order before the midterms. Meanwhile, some Republicans in Congress are pushing legislation to make it harder for Americans to vote.
This would be catastrophic . In Oregon, we’ve proven for more than 25 years that vote-by-mail works. It’s secure, accurate, and accessible — and Oregonians of all political backgrounds overwhelmingly support it. Fraud is essentially nonexistent, participation is among the highest in the country, and our paper ballots provide a fully auditable trail.
However, rolling it back would mean tearing apart our entire election system and wasting taxpayer money we don’t have — money that should be allocated to schools, roads, and public safety, rather than fixing a system that isn’t broken.
I’ve pledged that Oregon will stand up to any unconstitutional attempt to take away our right to vote by mail. But to fight back, I need your support.
Will you chip in today to help defend Oregon’s vote-by-mail system and protect our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3]
Every dollar helps us build the legal, outreach, and organizing infrastructure to resist these attacks — and keep Oregon a leader in secure, accessible elections.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Tobias Read
P.S. You can read my op-ed here [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trump-vote-mail-executive-order-oregon-rcna226337] , and please share it with your friends and networks >>
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250907em-msnbc-tba3]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Portland, OR 97242

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Folks, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Seth Moulton and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114794135/568170866/473596456?refcode=250907_MFC_Sherrod_Launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTZiZjczZi0xNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkl9XiaFL8w9Y-w8CEwi7Gj6GnB7n0DCVEbIwsNTLGA=) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Folks, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $5 now, split between Seth Moulton and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114794136/568170867/473596456?refcode=250907_MFC_Sherrod_Launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTZiZjczZi0xNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkl9XiaFL8w9Y-w8CEwi7Gj6GnB7n0DCVEbIwsNTLGA=) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114794137/568170868/-619769051?refcode=250907_MFC_Sherrod_Launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTZiZjczZi0xNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkl9XiaFL8w9Y-w8CEwi7Gj6GnB7n0DCVEbIwsNTLGA=)

clean_body: | Folks, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Folks, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: David Hogg
subject: They told us to run, hide, and fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re fighting for a better future together.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250907-1&t=1&akid=2628%2E587540%2EChGK3A)
Let me tell you what I think, Peter.
Young people are smart. We pay attention to the issues. We’re showing up to vote.
But to me, this is only the first step for our generation. The second step? _Running._
**We need young people on the ballot. We need young people in elected office.**
That’s why I teamed up with Kevin Lata, the campaign manager who helped elect the first ever Gen-Z member of Congress in 2022, to launch Leaders We Deserve.
**[Peter, if you agree that we need more young, courageous leaders running for office, will you pitch in $5 to help Leaders We Deserve make it happen?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250907_1_secondstep?refcode=em20250907-2628&amount=5&refcode2=2628_587540_ChGK3A&akid=2628%2E587540%2EChGK3A)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250907_1_secondstep?amount=5&refcode=em20250907-2628&refcode2=2628_587540_ChGK3A&akid=2628%2E587540%2EChGK3A)**
As a generation, we grew up hearing that to survive a school shooting, we had to run, hide, and fight. I think our generation needs to reinterpret what that means.
* **We need to run — for office.** Representation won’t happen on its own.
* **We need to stop hiding** from our responsibility to our country and planet.
* **We need to fight** for a better government and a better future for everyone.

That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists. We’re helping young people run for office and win — like Nadarius Clark and Molly Cook, who we’ve already helped win. Next up, we’re supporting young progressive candidates on the ballot in the midterms.
**[Leaders We Deserve was founded to recruit and support the next generation of leaders. Will you help us take the second step and donate $5 right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250907_1_secondstep?refcode=em20250907-2628&amount=5&refcode2=2628_587540_ChGK3A&akid=2628%2E587540%2EChGK3A)**
Thanks for everything you do for this movement,
David Hogg
Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *

name: Team DLCC
subject: The Constitution is clear
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
State legislators play a direct role in shaping elections across the country. They make decisions around when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Donald Trump’s latest ploy to undermine democracy is to ban mail-in voting and voting machines ahead of next year’s midterms. **The Constitution is clear: individual states set voter laws. That means state legislatures and governors determine when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote – not Trump.** [Democratic candidates in state legislative races rely on grassroots donations to defeat their MAGA opponents, defend voting rights, and expand ballot access. Will you chip in $7 to elect pro-democracy state Democrats? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDFSMauhu6y669kwgxpsLsO35Cvv4GJZl5EB4Y9yaib8pMkDoomsq4RcsWxoyh_ktddPu6PPbcI6l7AnrBbFGjwOynmoCvg-cXTqe1UUn5Hp8TMYWVxKkR60HXg36OKVPlkZPELbnHYUJesj5a3YGtqnj-bEX-U-3icL5xbQOU7fdCUcMjEWLfrQ2smDmF6PkAr4VW6AiHzTgj48VX0F_J-_TlAFIq03_uMVm1_xi_y-e3tMYCFS4liRalqa9MNfBHuBQvXu-LlTn0RBuxbLlKVHgbmzE0MNDkpjQoA3UoruLwKpFzNsZe86-VumJ9KEHvmmReFpSrhxJaTWPXH15_AW2-7wYVRZiwJJoJHmxeA5kwcViQOvk6g2EsDPhXvPIotp1slvGR47Uy5aNIZeWtOJ5etcUjulEDNTjFIqrROzDKIckDGgi-xM9nbLAMxGYWcOM3S71ykqRmFcXodg9jfDyW1_BtMzi2-uzhiVaW5Fy_q1LHJCTyWJBPRuMpBxBUTNb3fs6yL_qlPougTkld4w/4jp/hEffawWDQam_Ao2pnpmh7A/h0/h001.aTh7k4FfZUyuPR_xtHhHOlEKu4ce78ms0R3Dm4IQN9o) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

State legislators play a direct role in shaping elections in places like your community. They make decisions around when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote.
But right now, Trump is strong-arming state Republicans to get rid of mail-in voting and voting machines altogether – _and his state-level cronies will push whatever MAGA agenda he wants._
**That leaves state Democrats as the last line of defense against right-wing attacks on the right to vote.**
The DLCC is the organization building Democratic power in America’s statehouses. With your support, our movement can stop MAGA Republicans from threatening our free and fair elections.
[Chip in $7 to help the DLCC elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism. clean_body: State legislators play a direct role in shaping elections across the country. They make decisions around when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote. | | | | | ---|--- Donald Trump’s latest ploy to undermine democracy is to ban mail-in voting and voting machines ahead of next year’s midterms. The Constitution is clear: individual states set voter laws. That means state legislatures and governors determine when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote – not Trump. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State legislators play a direct role in shaping elections in places like your community. They make decisions around when, where, and how you’re able to exercise your right to vote. But right now, Trump is strong-arming state Republicans to get rid of mail-in voting and voting machines altogether – and his state-level cronies will push whatever MAGA agenda he wants. That leaves state Democrats as the last line of defense against right-wing attacks on the right to vote. The DLCC is the organization building Democratic power in America’s statehouses. With your support, our movement can stop MAGA Republicans from threatening our free and fair elections. Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. Contributions or gifts to DLCC Victory Fund are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
I hope you'll have my back again today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114794166/568171071/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-07_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTczNGI5YTktMTg4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RtGxO6Il9fGJ7mhfFP9L8mxCwByzlXPorfLMpcvkJPs=)
Roanoke College released a new poll of our race for Governor.
In May, they claimed we were ahead by 17 points. _Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points._
Peter, I'll put it plainly: **This election will be really close.**
We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.
_But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support._
[_**Will you contribute a small amount to help us win big this November? clean_body: I hope you'll have my back again today. = Roanoke College released a new poll of our race for Governor. In May, they claimed we were ahead by 17 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points. Peter, I'll put it plainly: This election will be really close. We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025. But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support. = = = = = = = It's a point of pride that so many of you have invested in my campaign. I hope you'll have my back again today. Thank you so much, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Good lord, now we can't even BOO Trump?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friend, **[What the hell](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bb3aa30-1a81-4cd7-afe4-5d663308fc10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**?

_" The United States Tennis Association asked broadcasters of the U.S. Open to censor any protests or reaction to President Donald Trump's appearance at the men's singles final..._ _" 'We ask all broadcasters to refrain from showcasing any disruptions or reactions in response to the President's attendance in any capacity,' the USTA said in the memo.'" ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17345de4-88cd-4c1d-9f04-11b7eccd44ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): NYT/The Athletic)_ Are you kidding me? Presidents ALWAYS get a fan reaction at any sports event, tennis or otherwise. And it's usually met with a good natured laugh or smile. Is Trump's ego really so fragile that he can't do the same? And is the USTA so eager to appease Trump, that they have to try to squelch a few boos from being televised? Look, we get not showing protracted protests or streakers or whatever else might seriously cut into game time and take away attention from the athletes. But a few seconds of boos? It's the "**US** " Open, can't we at least pretend that we're still in America and have at least a little freedom left? [**Add your name: "We Denounce the US Open's Attempt to Censor anti-Trump Fan Response"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8af324b-2309-4c89-b44d-7755ee3340e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My plan to tackle our country’s housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
It’s Economics 101.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2634%2E4032634%2Eb3Z3E8)
---
You ever wondered how your grandparents were able to buy a home for what seems like a handful of peanuts, but you can barely afford the rent on a one-bedroom apartment? It’s not you. Our country is in a severe housing crisis. For decades, the government has stood by and been shocked at the rising cost of housing. I’m calling for us to take the steps to actually change that. **I’ve recently introduced a bipartisan bill with Republican Senator Tim Scott that would tackle this problem from every direction: boosting the country’s housing supply, improving affordability, reducing homelessness, expanding access to homeownership, and increasing oversight and efficiency of federal housing programs.** We can actually get this done: This plan became the first bipartisan housing legislation to move through the Banking Committee in over a decade. Now, we’ve got to show that this has public support. [**Add your name to be a grassroots co-sponsor of my ROAD to Housing Act of 2025. Help us show a groundswell of support for affordable housing so we can fight hard for real solutions in Congress.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-housingbill/?source=EMZ27J_ENG_E_20250907_V1S1&t=8&akid=2634%2E4032634%2Eb3Z3E8) | [**ADD MY NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-housingbill/?source=EMZ27J_ENG_E_20250907_V1S1&t=9&akid=2634%2E4032634%2Eb3Z3E8)
---
We’ve got to make it easier for people to find homes they can actually afford — without worrying about making their rent or mortgage payment every month.
Since 1990, the cost of housing is up 174% while wages have flatlined. To bring the cost of housing down, it’s a simple Economics 101 problem: We’ve got to increase the supply of available housing on the market.
We do that by cutting bureaucratic red tape, expanding access to homeownership, and making robust federal investments to build more housing that families want to live in.
Investing in our housing supply will have positive ripple effects throughout our economy and our communities.
A bigger housing supply means people can live closer to where they work, ending those two-hour commutes.
It means more people can buy their first home and build wealth.
And data show that homeowners are more likely to start small businesses and invest in their communities, which means greater productivity and prosperity for our whole economy.
[**If you agree that affordable housing is one of the most pressing issues of our time, add your name to be a grassroots co-sponsor of our bipartisan legislation.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-housingbill/?source=EMZ27J_ENG_E_20250907_V1S1&t=10&akid=2634%2E4032634%2Eb3Z3E8)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

subject: Trump’s big, ugly bill will raise your healthcare costs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The Olympian: Health insurance costs to soar 65% for some Washington families, lawmaker warns [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114794215/568171214/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI4OGI5Yy0xYThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RAInpY_kZKBm2AdLaTqkDvoFEu4Sc1jfCsZisai9Jtw=&emci=19b741e6-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=43288b9c-1a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
---
This is what we mean when we say everyone will feel the pain of Donald Trump’s big, ugly healthcare bill, Peter: **_The Olympian:_ Health insurance costs to soar 65% for some Washington families, lawmaker warns**
Kim went on record to explain just how bad this Trump tax bill is for our healthcare – and she needs everyone to understand it’s not just Medicaid cuts that we should expect.

Premiums will rise, insurance rates will skyrocket, and families across Washington State—and across the country—will be forced to ask themselves if they can even afford to keep their healthcare _at all._

Without access to affordable, preventive care, our communities will grow sicker, families will delay treatment until it’s too late, and our entire country will pay the price in lives lost and costs that keep climbing.

No one is immune from Trump’s big, ugly bill. It’s a disaster for working families, seniors, and children alike. That’s why Kim is fighting back. As a doctor, a mom, and your representative, she knows what’s at stake when families lose access to the care they need. And the truth is simple: **We need a Democratic House to undo the mess the GOP has created.**

[**With your support, Kim can help flip the House and continue fighting to protect and expand access to affordable, quality healthcare. clean_body: The Olympian: Health insurance costs to soar 65% for some Washington families, lawmaker warns This is what we mean when we say everyone will feel the pain of Donald Trump’s big, ugly healthcare bill, Peter: The Olympian: Health insurance costs to soar 65% for some Washington families, lawmaker warns Kim went on record to explain just how bad this Trump tax bill is for our healthcare – and she needs everyone to understand it’s not just Medicaid cuts that we should expect. Premiums will rise, insurance rates will skyrocket, and families across Washington State—and across the country—will be forced to ask themselves if they can even afford to keep their healthcare at all. Without access to affordable, preventive care, our communities will grow sicker, families will delay treatment until it’s too late, and our entire country will pay the price in lives lost and costs that keep climbing. No one is immune from Trump’s big, ugly bill. It’s a disaster for working families, seniors, and children alike. That’s why Kim is fighting back. As a doctor, a mom, and your representative, she knows what’s at stake when families lose access to the care they need. And the truth is simple: We need a Democratic House to undo the mess the GOP has created. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. We're building for 2026, and we need to bolster our conservative America First majority in the Senate, and my father, President Donald J. Trump, is counting on us to deliver. But I just got some troubling news: Our 2025 NRSC voter records are still incomplete in critical to protecting our Senate majority. We can't afford to leave any data on the table while the radical left is mounting a comeback for their complete and total socialist takeover of the federal government. I'm asking you personally, Fellow American: Nothing keeps me up at night more than the thought of Chuck Schumer and Democrats running the Senate again. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
More than ever, it’s important for everyone to have the facts.
Republican dark money organizations are spending MILLIONS to spread false information about Proposition 50 – Gov. Gavin Newsom’s Election Rigging Response Act.
Here’s the truth: Donald Trump and Texas Republicans are making an unprecedented power grab to steal congressional seats and rig the 2026 election before voting even begins.
They want to steal enough seats to control Congress even if voters overwhelmingly reject their agenda.
This isn’t politics as usual. It’s an emergency for our democracy – and Proposition 50 is the solution.
Will you rush a donation right now so that the California Democratic Party can combat lies and misinformation from MAGA dark money groups? We have just kicked off canvassing efforts, and we’re ready to talk to as many voters as possible about voting YES on Proposition 50 this November 4th. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]It’s scary but true : If Californians don’t act by passing Prop 50, Donald Trump will seize total power for two more years.
California has a duty to defend democracy. We can’t unilaterally disarm or fight with both hands tied behind our backs. When Trump tries to rig elections, we must fight back with every tool available.
Prop 50 draws fair maps that represent California’s diverse communities and ensure our voices aren’t silenced by partisan gerrymandering in other states. But far-right dark money groups are already on the attack. We need to get the facts out. Here are a few of them: ⬇️
✅ Prop 50 levels the playing field by making sure the 2026 mid-term elections are conducted without an unfair advantage for Republicans.
✅ Prop 50 commits to fair redistricting by reaffirming California’s commitment to independent redistricting and calls for a nationwide commitment to fair and impartial maps.
✅ Prop 50 gives voters the power, not backroom politicians , to approve emergency congressional district maps in response to Trump’s election rigging scheme.
✅ Prop 50 is fair and proportional , creating emergency maps only because Republicans moved forward with their power grab.
✅ Prop 50 is temporary , expiring in 2030 and preserving California’s award-winning redistricting reforms.
Will you please help us get these facts far and wide in response to MAGA Republican misinformation? You can forward this email to five friends, or rush a donation to our organizing efforts. With your support, our canvassers will be addressing misinformation with voters face-to-face! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

- CADEM

null: Donald Trump's chaos agenda has already inflicted so much harm on Michigan's working families and people all across the country.
Whether it's been his reckless tariffs, his cuts to Medicaid, or his constant abuses of power – like using the military against American citizens and deploying the National Guard to Washington, D.C. to take control of the city's police – the Trump administration has only hurt working families and benefited billionaires.
But we want to know where _YOU_ stand, null. We launched an urgent flash poll and need 30 more responses from Cresco before midnight tonight. Use your voice now:

# Why HODLers Matter
In the Bitcoin world, people like me are called HODLers. The word came from a typo on a forum back in 2013, but it stuck because it tells the truth: quit trying to outsmart every price move and hold a slice of hard money for the long run.
# What a HODLer Is (and Isn't)
A HODLer isn't a day-trader staring at candles. A HODLer buys what they understand, takes self-custody, and lets time do the work. We don't panic when the price drops or spike the football when it runs. We hold because we trust math over politicians and central bankers.
# Why We Hold
* **Scarcity you can count on.** There will only ever be 21 million Bitcoin. Washington can print dollars until your savings melt. Bitcoin doesn't play that game.
* **Property you actually control.** When you hold your own keys, you don't ask a bank's permission to use your money. No business-hours. No gatekeepers.
* **Protection from inflation and policy whiplash.** Politicians make promises; they pay for them by devaluing your paycheck. Bitcoin gives ordinary people a way out.
* **It works.** I've seen the banking system stall and second-guess honest transactions. Bitcoin settles in minutes.

# What HODLing Does to the Market
HODLers take supply off the table. Fewer coins trading hands means less weak-hand selling and a stronger floor over time. Volatility doesn't disappear--it's the price of admission for a new monetary network--but patient holders create stability the traders can't.
# The Strategy--Simple on Purpose
* **Buy what you can afford.** No leverage, no gambling with rent money.
* **Take self-custody.** "Not your keys, not your coins" isn't a slogan; it's the rule. Bitkey is my choice for an easy, secure way to store your Bitcoin. [www.Bitkey.world](https://substack.com/redirect/4c469b54-7fee-4fb1-ad47-db32f01098a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Think in years, not days.** Bitcoin moves in cycles. If you can't handle a 50% drop, you don't understand what you own.
* **Ignore the noise.** Politicians, pundits, and profiteers will always tell you Bitcoin is dead--until they quietly buy some.

# Answering the Critics
"Too volatile." Compared to what--Congressional spending? Bank failures? Currency devaluation? Freedom is bumpy. Over any serious stretch of time, disciplined holding has beaten most trading schemes and every promise from D.C.
"Backed by nothing." It's backed by energy, open-source code, and millions of nodes and miners verifying the same rules worldwide. That's sturdier than a committee meeting at the Federal Reserve.
# The Backbone of Bitcoin
HODLers are the spine of this network. We provide the patience that traders don't, the conviction that regulators can't manufacture, and the liquidity that keeps the system honest. As adoption grows--and as governments push surveillance money and more debt--HODLers will matter even more. We're not trying to get rich quick. We're trying to stay free.
If you want the short version: buy some, learn self-custody, and hold it. Bitcoin rewards discipline, not drama.

name: Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump's fascism enters a new phase -
body:
🚨 URGENT: Trump is unleashing the military against American cities.
Protesters beaten. Families torn apart. Governors taunted. Entire communities terrorized.
This is not a drill — it’s the rise of authoritarianism in real time.
Grassroots power is the only thing standing between democracy and Trump’s fascism. Donate $15 right now so we can help stop this power grab before it’s too late. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090725_2]
Peter, let’s not sugarcoat it: Trump is using the U.S. military to institute authoritarian rule city by city — and threatening to arrest anyone who stands in his way.
🔻 Calling up the Marines
🔻 Sending in the National Guard to 19 American cities
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
🔗 Mass arrests sweeping Washington, D.C.
🚨 Terrified mothers, fathers, and children, yanked off the streets and put into unmarked vans
❗ ❗ ❗ Now he's threatening SPECIFIC cities, TAUNTING governors that he doesn't like... this is TERRIFYING, and unless we act now, it is JUST THE BEGINNING ❗ ❗ ❗
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. If we let this stand, it will only get worse. Chip in $15 or more right now to help us crush this authoritarian power grab before it spreads further. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090725_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090725_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090725_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090725_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090725_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090725_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090725_2&amount=25]
Tomorrow, it could be your governor. Your mayor. Your city under military occupation. This is how it starts — and how democracy ends.
Stand up. Speak out. Fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090725_2]
Thanks for doing the right thing,
Real Texas PAC

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Elect Mamdani via Our Revolution
subject: Mamdani vs Trump

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1011&refcode=email-20250907_v&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump is in an all out push to stop Zoran Mamdani from becoming NYC’s next
mayor.

He’s trying to dictate who can run – and who can’t – demanding all
opponents other than Andrew Cuomo drop out THIS WEEK to clear the field to
focus on one thing: beating Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?source=email-20250907&t=1061&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]Headline: Trump's deadline to thin NYC mayoral race field in bid to
stop Mamdani

Let’s be clear – we CANNOT allow Trump to pick NYC’s next mayor. But as
polls tighten and the opposition begins to rally around Cuomo to take on
Mamdani, we need to fight back harder than ever to make sure the PEOPLE
decide this race, not the billionaires running scared from Mamdani’s
progressive platform.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250907nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]Can you make an urgent donation now to support Our Revolution’s grassroots
work to expand our ground game to hit the streets and help elect Zohran
Mamdani as NYC’s next mayor?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump is so terrified of a Mamdani win that he’s going so far as to bribe
other candidates to get out of the race – even offering disgraced current
NYC mayor Eric Adams a job in his administration!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?source=email-20250907&t=1060&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]Headline: Trump advisers make a push for Eric Adams to get
ambassadorship to exit NYC mayoral race: Sources

Trump and his Wall Street backers are terrified of a mayor who actually
stands up for the working class, and who is not afraid to take on the real
estate lobby or hedge fund billionaires.

And Mamdani runs on people power, not special interests. Which is why
Trump is desperately using backroom pressure to force out candidates and
try to fix the process before voters have a say.

Every dollar you chip in today helps us deploy more volunteers to hit the
streets and the subways to talk to voters where they are, expand our
canvassing to reach NEW neighborhoods, and train young activists to talk
to their neighbors at church events, barber shops, bodega counters, and
soccer fields.

Trump may be trying to silence our voices, but we are going to be ALL over
this city the next several weeks to GET OUT THE VOTE.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250907nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9348%2E5885482%2EZR86EB ]WE can help Mamdani win, but we have to grow this operation. Will you rush
a donation to mobilize massive numbers every day through November?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

[ ]Headline: Trump's deadline to thin NYC mayoral race field in bid to stop Mamdani Let’s be clear – we CANNOT allow Trump to pick NYC’s next mayor. But as polls tighten and the opposition begins to rally around Cuomo to take on Mamdani, we need to fight back harder than ever to make sure the PEOPLE decide this race, not the billionaires running scared from Mamdani’s progressive platform. [ ]Can you make an urgent donation now to support Our Revolution’s grassroots work to expand our ground game to hit the streets and help elect Zohran Mamdani as NYC’s next mayor? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Trump is so terrified of a Mamdani win that he’s going so far as to bribe other candidates to get out of the race – even offering disgraced current NYC mayor Eric Adams a job in his administration! [ ]Headline: Trump advisers make a push for Eric Adams to get ambassadorship to exit NYC mayoral race: Sources Trump and his Wall Street backers are terrified of a mayor who actually stands up for the working class, and who is not afraid to take on the real estate lobby or hedge fund billionaires. And Mamdani runs on people power, not special interests. Which is why Trump is desperately using backroom pressure to force out candidates and try to fix the process before voters have a say. Every dollar you chip in today helps us deploy more volunteers to hit the streets and the subways to talk to voters where they are, expand our canvassing to reach NEW neighborhoods, and train young activists to talk to their neighbors at church events, barber shops, bodega counters, and soccer fields. Trump may be trying to silence our voices, but we are going to be ALL over this city the next several weeks to GET OUT THE VOTE. [ ]WE can help Mamdani win, but we have to grow this operation. Will you rush a donation to mobilize massive numbers every day through November? When we organize, we win. body:

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/32b78055ac71/national-toddler-of-the-year-vote-happening-now-4935566?e=b749ec4ed8)

# [DOUBLE FREE VOTES](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=214b652296&e=b749ec4ed8) all weekend long for the National Toddler of the Year!
---
[|
---](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=b5c42f3fa8&e=b749ec4ed8)
| | The National Toddler of the Year is in the Quarterfinals & this weekend votes are automatically DOUBLED! You can [**vote for FREE**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=098e57c800&e=b749ec4ed8) once your vote will now count 2x. [Click here now to cast your FREE DOUBLE vote!](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=a01e355745&e=b749ec4ed8)[ ](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=43000dd753&e=b749ec4ed8)You get to pick which toddler will star in a national toy ad & be crowned TODDLER of the YEAR.
The **Quarterfinals end on Thursday September 11th** but _**2x (double) votes are happening through Sunday night Sep 7th**_. So make sure to [cast your **FREE DOUBLE VOTE**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=8bc7631c58&e=b749ec4ed8)[****](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=736afe1ace&e=b749ec4ed8) now. You can also click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=aafd07364a&e=b749ec4ed8) to add a [daily reminder](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=0070cf0100&e=b749ec4ed8) to your calendar as an easy reminder to [vote](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=48042e41ee&e=b749ec4ed8).
And if you want to cast even more extra votes, every [**$1 you donate = 2 extra votes**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=6af4b6b202&e=b749ec4ed8) this weekend. A**ll proceeds support Toys for Tots** & that means **your**[**donation**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=d3edb7411f&e=b749ec4ed8)**is TAX DEDUCTIBLE**. So your donation not only gives double votes but it also helps toys going to kids in need this holiday season in cooperation with the US Marines.
To [donate $10](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=a804e91fe6&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=ce91a0d5ef&e=b749ec4ed8) & double your vote for **20 votes.** To [donate $25](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=dd4f6f9218&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=4fd35bc38b&e=b749ec4ed8) & double your vote for **50 votes!** To [donate $50](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=e44d345ea8&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=8088962551&e=b749ec4ed8)& double your vote for **100 votes!!** To [donate $100](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=f6c95a347a&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=369b0be9ea&e=b749ec4ed8)& double your vote for **200 votes!!!** To [donate $250](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=86e972d7c2&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=c3a369d39c&e=b749ec4ed8)& double your vote for **500 votes!!!!****ALL donations are TAX DEDUCTIBLE** & go to benefit Toys for Tots.[](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=a46121407b&e=b749ec4ed8)
To cast a [FREE vote](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=19eb485bb7&e=b749ec4ed8) click [here](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=d60b65c0e1&e=b749ec4ed8) & have your vote doubled this weekend. ONLY the toddler who is ranked in 1st place on Thursday Sept. 11th will advance to the SemiFinals & can then move on to the Finals.
So make sure to [vote for Sophia](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=2fcd56eadd&e=b749ec4ed8) this weekend for 2X votes AND every day from now until next Thursday to advance to the semi-finals. You can [cast one FREE vote every 24 hours](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=c346b2c5e9&e=b749ec4ed8), or make a tax deductible donation with every $1 donated = 2 extra votes this weekend for Toy for Tots.
**Thank you for helping**[**select**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=a48e7500f5&e=b749ec4ed8)**the National Toddler of the Year & **[**supporting Toys for Tots**](https://toddleroftheyear.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b753463ba6b7f88fcc279ec77&id=00e1183a7c&e=b749ec4ed8)**in conjunction with the US Marines to benefit kids in need this holiday season.**

name: Team MTG
subject: FW: I missed my deadline. This could be very serious.
body:
Since the Congresswoman reached out we’ve only heard from a few folks.
| | | | Friend,
Since the Congresswoman reached out we’ve only heard from a few folks. If we keep up this pace we are in BIG trouble.
If we stay at this pace, the Democrats and RINOs who have been after Marjorie for years will be celebrating her defeat in just a few months time.
We can’t let that happen.
**_[Please, if you’re able, help us reach our goal and finish this quarter strong](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
For Freedom,
Team MTG
_\------------ Forwarded Message ------------_

---
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
Friend – This is the last thing I wanted to say.
But I have to be honest with you: **I missed my fundraising deadline.**
And in this game, deadlines aren’t just dates on a calendar: **They’re markers of strength.**
**When we miss a deadline, the Democrats and RINO elites smell blood in the water.**
They’ll twist this into a narrative that I’m slipping... _That I’ve lost support._ They’re already scanning the reports, looking for any sign of weakness. And right now, I’m fighting from behind.
**_[That’s why this is so serious, Friend](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
This campaign has never been about _playing it safe_ or _going along with the status quo._
I’m fighting every day for our values, for our freedom, and for the America we love.
But to keep fighting, I need to show strength, and I need to do it now.
**_[We have a narrow window to recover from this setback, and that means I urgently need your help](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
[RUSH URGENT DONATION >>>](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
You’ve been with me in the trenches before. You know what we’re up against. And I wouldn’t come to you like this if I wasn’t truly counting on you.
If we can rally in the next 24 hours and show a surge of grassroots support, we can flip this narrative. We can prove them wrong. **But I can’t do it without you.**
Please, help keep me in the fight.
For Our Nation,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

### **_[Unsubscribe from list](https://link.email.greene4congress.com/click/e4670738/VaHR0cHM6Ly9tdGcubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZ3JlZW5lRk9VUmNvbmdyZXNzX2NvbTI1MDkwNw/LbmNsd1hMRjVN/qP2hpZHM9bmNEWXppVzVTMDRNbWxz/gaL3hpw/s6jd8568f0c)_**

name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: Unpredictable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Justice Rebecca Bradley dropped out of the race, and now, right-wing special interests don’t have a candidate to bankroll.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250907-521&t=1&akid=541%2E294397%2EYmLCWG)
Folks,
Whoever wins this Wisconsin Supreme Court election will serve a 10-year term.
That’s 87,600 hours. It’s a _loooong_ time for someone to be making decisions that shape our daily lives.
Luckily, Judge Chris Taylor is a leader we can trust. She’s spent her career standing up for Wisconsinites, defending our freedoms, and ensuring our justice system treats everyone fairly.
**But we’re in an unpredictable stretch of this race.** Justice Rebecca Bradley dropped out of the race, and now, right-wing special interests don’t have a candidate to bankroll.
We don’t know who they’ll recruit or when, so we need to be ready for whatever comes next.
To build the momentum we need, we’re counting on you: [**Please, pitch in $10 now to support Judge Chris Taylor for Justice.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250907_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250907-521&refcode2=541_294397_YmLCWG&akid=541%2E294397%2EYmLCWG)

Thank you,
Team Taylor

# [District Round‐up 9.7.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F09%2F07%2Fdistrict-round-up-9-7-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=6aba4f6e705620eb00aa394295943610&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on September 7, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7e39c404d92fa9c2d4a647b58ca52f693c086e705be8c079054fb2e59994986e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5242e9bd17e2c2603f3f0c47ccd89c2e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
After a delicious breakfast at the 522 Grill in McConnellsburg, Fulton County on Sunday, I headed to the Hanover Chili Cook-Off in Hanover, PA.
Though technically, the cookoff happens in Pennsylvania's 11th Congressional District, many Adams Countians and fellow Pennsylvanians attend this event, not only for delicious chili and good music, but because it is the largest chil cookoff east of the Mississippi River. Moreover, local businesses attend, including Plainville Farms in New Oxford, Adams County.
If you don't know, Plainville Farms offers a variety of organic and non-organic Pre-sliced deli meat, bulk deli meat, ground turkey, turkey parts, whole turkeys, and pre-cooked whole turkeys. You can find out more about them on their website here: [https://www.plainvillefarms.com/](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f576273e8b0432abcbb1ba485f908bae2e5ab847277469a9a3f83d26560d60d5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2f4a4e2cc25aaec0836d8cf970aea507&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxhaW52aWxsZWZhcm1zLmNvbS8&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
The next day was Labor Day which I noted on Facebook:
Labor Day - Never underestimate the power of an organized people.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=cbf84bb6acfeaf164b6d5cf2101c08147ee119cf04edd73c4ae51fc32ad61b10&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=190fe984c32d58405d22f3e5dec44103&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)Prior to today's celebration, "People of all ages, particularly the very poor and recent immigrants, often faced extremely unsafe working conditions, with insufficient access to fresh air, sanitary facilities and breaks.
As manufacturing increasingly supplanted agriculture as the wellspring of American employment, labor unions, which had first appeared in the late 18th century, grew more prominent and vocal. They began organizing strikes and rallies to protest poor conditions and compel employers to renegotiate hours and pay." Labor Day 2025: Facts, Meaning & Founding | HISTORY [https://share.google/mFLeIsGvkfaEaPPgF](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e9c31ca9e03f70135cb1e57ecaa3c173341e2f04c0fc06bc6adb6c19516e7d3f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7cf306e7af69859ad93177c58334d290&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFyZS5nb29nbGUvbUZMZUlzR3ZrZmFFYVBQZ0Y/ZmJjbGlkPUl3WlhoMGJnTmhaVzBDTVRBQVluSnBaQkV4UkZSTlQyMU1VMWRwUmpVMGRUVmlXZ0Vlc1ZMbFBQZHVGcURDR0h0blFrMG9QTGZueWl1OTRZS1U3WGR0TTJwa0RzQks2Tk16cUR5cTdRa253LW9fYWVtX09sSlBkRnd3UGlFMTV5M2E0Ui1WZWc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
Our current working conditions were borne on the backs of union members who fought for 40 hour workweeks, federal minimum wage, paid time off, and FMLA. The employers never granted these things out of benevolence for their workers. The union members organized and sacrificed.
There is still much work to be done. For example, workers should be guaranteed healthcare, not handcuffed to a particular job to ensure they don't have to file for medical bankruptcy, our federal minimum wage should increase substantially since it was last raised in 2009 to $7.25/ hour, working families need guaranteed paid time for parental leave to ensure stability of their growing families who will contribute to American society later on, etc.
Please join your local union such as:
[AFL - CIO Greater Johnstown/Somerset Central Labor Council](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e5d7f308d68c17d882e76ff989224a6b6868283384a4883e3427dad0ff481c32&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=e58104d4cccd30377427d60deb34c141&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3Byb2ZpbGUucGhwP2lkPTEwMDA5MjM3NDk4NTIzOQ=&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[United Mine Workers of America](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f1f1f5bc649f4d1424c1fcfc6256b107f630ade42a0d9b55d012b9644ea839eb&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=68969f7b2ab7ede44dbe6d93eebb2a61&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3Vtd2Eub3Jn&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[United Steelworkers](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fcbe182dc39151be895efbca1fb069b18f37bcdb6ca8011056ebdef978fa7c99&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=669a3c1c50610f0689d00f3227b27e2a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3Vzdy5vcmc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[AFSCME](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1149a03d6bb5fa7ab7fd5e263084c221646b91284ba1b02890fe0436fdedc420&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f3509181ad251b0d4b061461b22670b5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL2Fmc2NtZS5vcmc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[SEIU](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d961a6966c3a27f465ad8548d321e797ffea09aa10e0d0197a4f7d5da50163e5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5dff1a30473f481fc8d69e3a973fc1ae&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL1NFSVUub3Jn&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[AFL-CIO](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9d62b024b907c3d986f1c92aac2672994fa4006c254da6762fd2db9aff8a03d3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=0ba3a96b6010b7f6cd0f29d935eebf64&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL2FmbGNpby5vcmc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[AFT](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5b5a9e2a93823510dac2ca6b89ef81656c53e36400e3aa8c8bb1d495c8fa8ab1&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=aec0a31388efbb20d7a6268464b0817b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL2FmdC5vcmc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
[SEIU Local 49](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=25ce8efb6eb3ec970e11927f4ec1e28dbc577bf92c780b7dff5b28f595b8bcf5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1a7ac79b115a839410ac93c7cc3049e1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3NlaXU0OS5vcmc&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d)
and fight for American worker rights.
I also attended the American Legion Fair in Ebensberg, Cambria County and listened to voters express what was on their hearts and minds. Thank you to the Cambria County Democratic Committee for hosting me at your booth!
On Wednesday, September 3rd, victims of Jeffrey Epstein and his crony, President Trump, gathered in front of the Capitol for a news conference and US Representatives urged Americans to call our US Representative to sign the petition that would force to the floor a vote on [H.R. 581, the Epstein Files Transparency Act. ](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4f886836a457ad74a19cde6106031afe9f6476059a148333a60e5377accc1e89&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5120&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=05ce8e0351d6abc9881b9d11d798ef26&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=85a718e62d311d93dccc906aca34ba8d) As of today, our own Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, has not signed it, but he has taken a picture of himself with President Trump.
Yesterday, I participated in the demonstration, held by Franklin County Democratic Committee in Shippensburg, Cumberland County for Democracy. It was a beautiful day and I was proud to stand with my fellow patriots against fascism.
Together, we #ChooseDemocracy!
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: War just sounds better?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBLuQnRWt0QPOSpcIjE4FEq_KSVUIxC_JoV35KfGAqVKodODW1ppup7DtI2zT-81wZ26CcGWLSxCWV7Khlby9BOo/4jp/ddONWdg9RTqIbRsxcFjm5A/h0/h001.wss3X4qe3Ke3NCSVd5BEl5ZSadhXmAubzRrbqPiCFGE)
---
Peter, If you haven't heard about Trump's latest EO, the "peace president" wants to rename the Department of Defense back to its old name, the Department of War. His reason? _It just sounds better._ George Washington created the first Department of War for our ARMY. Our nation and military branches naturally evolved, and after WWII the department was renamed Department of Defense, which is when we included the Air Force, Coast Guard, and Navy under the same umbrella of National Defense. What does Trump's name change signal? I present Exhibit A:
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDrf2x_FvHo5ASOwVYftKjBM1ejIcSFpQm6aYAIK3E4E7Z72jTHKEkDlu04igwurB2PotQyldpRp4S6bO3cYlT6BwLXT3ZWoIgNV99vNVT-M0UgBaBh6WvkWWqLYgoFjFHftAjcUkm0RMLI4OFcfpAXpRhTckEtOBVaJ06HHr4PzGGQ6aV0hUxJTQpbFgnJ11AAgOQB3kVI6gjnuKa_Zo4UjZKu4Y0Dl1NzOjzuK5WCUxoilh29sKb71D2NNAJZh-s/4jp/ddONWdg9RTqIbRsxcFjm5A/h1/h001.0bnmaJFc-QemVVrbJHsji-2Fb6fg3Btjlo1JGgtoW58)
---
Trump is promising - threatening - to use even more military force, not just abroad, but here at home against Americans. I guess we're also in for more "dictator birthday party" military parades. **Alarm bells should be ringing across Congress and the country as he becomes increasingly unhinged.** [**So much is at stake in this next election, Peter****. Help me win this seat so I can get to Congress and fight for our democracy. Can I count on you right now to keep our momentum going?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDrf2x_FvHo5ASOwVYftKjBM1ejIcSFpQm6aYAIK3E4Ez0Zwux6KpeGvw9V3x6haUXtDWjo2uuNPtVHdB09CGqyaE7hCktvTYwHkWV8aSuwxIBk_hn7FKEuPvXFDpg14kaHmfJnFw3sg_xDdsb6JL_sN-_aeuybAsbHyER05pUO1Qi8Isggr5PE3wmECk6nNPrIkfKW4rxuXydVgGE6d6wOUdhtmaoZVRY6k_6dTPBvvqhq0xQEh6SplYtMu16PFRM/4jp/ddONWdg9RTqIbRsxcFjm5A/h2/h001.aU1nPCqCcRQS97EasiKdGUjyFrNCVWDWQow1K_FI6gM) **Trump is not just posting inflammatory memes. About this name change, DoD head Pete Hegseth said, "The War Department is going to fight to win, not not to lose. We're going to go on offense, not just defense. Maximum lethality. Not tepid legality. Violent effect, not politically correct. We're gonna raise up warriors, not just defenders."** We _must_ elect representatives who will do everything in their power to enforce checks and balances against this rogue executive branch. Last year, we were served a plate of nonsense: Trump was going to end all the wars, the nation has had it with wars. I happen to agree. But there is no sound reason to revert to the Department of War unless you plan on continuing aggression. I hope his followers are starting to understand that Trump has no intention of being a "peace president." But we can't wait for them to see the light. We must take back the House and elect representatives who will actually stand up to this lawless president. [**It 's up to we, the people, to elect members of Congress who understand the threat we're facing and are willing to fight. Can I count on you today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDrf2x_FvHo5ASOwVYftKjBM1ejIcSFpQm6aYAIK3E4E9fRG4ZE_H344Qz7r_6JeHhRHZ69jHrAKLMZhdS2xrXWKUpnYZuxNiTtZhC9pzYvwn6833as1dJN3cKlDYesoQSm0YITrNYJuuBnLKEtXljG1QX55msIDZD_mkGhnViyuIFv_yhGOptmByKkG0Ilp0ma2ahKqJ590Ga8tjex_u5MHWQHhBlF2yy9aOzGJxUX20FIs48M0U6eQg_lVpCcI6Y/4jp/ddONWdg9RTqIbRsxcFjm5A/h3/h001.M3I2HBpcjgYdgJIlycCevyciPtAj1yo1jt3odpBk0GU) Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich
---
[ **SUPPORT BRENT TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDrf2x_FvHo5ASOwVYftKjBM1ejIcSFpQm6aYAIK3E4Ey0Wn7CmKpt9pDTIXUTN-9f-omfKhsIe-Nsy8_dn-EnJgZO6rPPmx4jL8ioKgBjpGdaWS6J3bKkxe8-g_MzTs8s6iToAMA4RqWCMbcLSU7RVFVCDrsoNroUb53XyZsYCRj-G3xAbj2w9Aj58kLBQKNEOXtcKhcWSM_ZgzLirs0w5nkJXdGP6j_qN4dc-MWnY6A4zoSucdtMdYT5N4oulF6I/4jp/ddONWdg9RTqIbRsxcFjm5A/h4/h001.QNmgXogtTk6rFxmwQyU4lCup3f9ZwqRpdebJlpOf1mk)

clean_body: | | Peter, If you haven't heard about Trump's latest EO, the "peace president" wants to rename the Department of Defense back to its old name, the Department of War. His reason? It just sounds better. George Washington created the first Department of War for our ARMY. Our nation and military branches naturally evolved, and after WWII the department was renamed Department of Defense, which is when we included the Air Force, Coast Guard, and Navy under the same umbrella of National Defense. What does Trump's name change signal? I present Exhibit A: | Trump is promising - threatening - to use even more military force, not just abroad, but here at home against Americans. I guess we're also in for more "dictator birthday party" military parades. Alarm bells should be ringing across Congress and the country as he becomes increasingly unhinged. Trump is not just posting inflammatory memes. About this name change, DoD head Pete Hegseth said, "The War Department is going to fight to win, not not to lose. We're going to go on offense, not just defense. Maximum lethality. Not tepid legality. Violent effect, not politically correct. We're gonna raise up warriors, not just defenders." We must elect representatives who will do everything in their power to enforce checks and balances against this rogue executive branch. Last year, we were served a plate of nonsense: Trump was going to end all the wars, the nation has had it with wars. I happen to agree. But there is no sound reason to revert to the Department of War unless you plan on continuing aggression. I hope his followers are starting to understand that Trump has no intention of being a "peace president." But we can't wait for them to see the light. We must take back the House and elect representatives who will actually stand up to this lawless president. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. body:

Peter,

Lately, some folks have started calling Abdul the “Democratic bro
whisperer.”

[ UnHerd: ]UnHerd: Abdul El-Sayed: Democratic bro whisperer - The Michigan doctor
is Bernie’s true heir

It’s because Abdul has a way of connecting with people, especially young
men, who feel left behind.

Not with pandering.

Not with culture-war nonsense.

But with honesty, empathy, and a clear-eyed understanding of what’s really
going on.

We know that too many corporations are cashing in by targeting people’s
pain and profiting from their struggles. Sports betting, gaming
microtransactions, Big Pharma — they’re all in the business of monetizing
our dopamine circuits.

And when people feel small and broken, the Andrew Tates and Donald Trumps
of the world swoop in with toxic, empty answers.

But Abdul offers something different. A vision of politics that lifts
people up, rather than tearing them down.

That’s what our campaign is fighting for, and with your support, we’ll
take our message straight to the voters who need to hear it most.

name: James Carville
subject: If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a really rough road ahead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94535?refcode=em20250907-9388&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9388%2E614464%2EY6Xfdz)
Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you:
_This one is as important as it gets._
The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. _If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead._

clean_body: | | | | | Did you see this, Peter? Just as Greg Abbott signed Donald Trump’s gerrymandered redistricting maps into law in Texas, Trump is now threatening to sue California for fighting back against his attempt to rig the 2026 midterms and steal five Democratic seats. Governor Gavin Newsom has led the charge to stop Trump’s election-rigging scheme, but he’s now facing relentless attacks for his efforts to defend the democracy that Trump is trying to destroy. As Trump’s pressure on California continues to intensify, we all need to stand with Gavin Newsom and stand up against Donald Trump’s midterm power grab. When Donald Trump announced his plan to gerrymander Texas’ maps to steal five seats from Democrats, Gavin Newsom took action immediately, bravely leading the charge to ensure fair midterm elections in 2026. Backed by leaders like Zoe Lofgren, Gavin Newsom used Donald Trump’s playbook against him. The proposed maps give California residents a chance to fight back against Trump’s anti-democratic scheme, balancing the scales for voters across America. But now, Trump is attacking Gavin Newsom, threatening him with lawsuits and even arrest , all because Newsom refused to stay silent. | | Thank you,Friends of Lofgren | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. = | | | Paid for by Lofgren for Congress Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please .

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Total capitulation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

_See this:_
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250907-1-subs&t=1&akid=735%2E5691347%2EBB2tWL)
This is yet more evidence that putting a quack like Bobby Kennedy in charge of public health was a grave error. The Trump Administration has been engaged for months in a campaign to destroy the CDC, America’s preeminent disease-fighting agency. The Administration’s extremism and incompetence are putting lives at risk.
During the Senate floor debate on RFK earlier this year, I argued:
_"If the Senate weren’t gripped in this soon-to-be infamous period of total capitulation, I don’t think this nominee would have made it as far as a hearing."_
Hours later, Senate Republicans totally capitulated and confirmed to lead American public health a man famous only for his name and his embrace of conspiracist pseudoscience.
_Total capitulation._
Historians will fill books about this moment in history.
They’ll write about the destruction of America’s public health institutions — the firing of scientists, the silencing of experts, the gutting of the CDC.
They’ll write about their dereliction of duty during an unprecedented attack on the role of Congress as a co-equal branch of government.
As Trump elevated utterly unqualified zealots and loyalists to the nation's most powerful offices, Republican Senators suspend their judgement, march onto the Senate floor, and vote AYE.
Some knew better. You saw it in their faces. They looked ashamed. They still voted AYE.
That brings me to the 2026 election.
_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._
And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.
I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago._
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us.
[**Please consider contributing to my campaign straight away.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250907-1-subs&t=2&akid=735%2E5691347%2EBB2tWL)
With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=735%2E5691347%2EBB2tWL) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=735%2E5691347%2EBB2tWL) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

That brings me to the 2026 election. 2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule. And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago. So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us. With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
