President Donald Trump **[defended Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.](https://substack.com/redirect/610d4355-1d42-417f-9f22-b933474e5eae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after his contentious Senate hearing, telling reporters "I like the fact that he's different" and praising Kennedy as "a very good person" with "little different ideas" that deserve consideration.
### WATCH Trump defend RFK when pressed by reporters:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7af7535a-3356-46a3-991b-750a0499335b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Senate Grilling:** Kennedy faced intense criticism from Democratic senators during a Senate Finance Committee hearing, with Sen. Ron Wyden accusing him of putting children in "harm's way" and asking how many "preventable child deaths are an acceptable sacrifice" for Kennedy's health policies.
* **Kennedy's Defense:** Kennedy countered criticism by pointing to rising chronic disease rates during senators' tenure, stating that infant mortality increased during the Biden administration and arguing that critics "never asked the question of why it's happening" regarding health problems.
* **Vice Presidential Backup:** Vice President JD Vance strongly defended Kennedy on social media, calling senators who criticized him "full of s--- and everyone knows it" and accusing them of supporting "untested" hormonal therapies for children while attacking Kennedy's policies.

* * *
# RFK Jr. says doctors push vaccines for financial gain - Big Pharma disagrees
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ccb1169-91f6-4a59-896a-4ce8c522b317?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
HHS Sec. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told Tucker Carlson during an interview that **[there are"perverse incentives" for doctors](https://substack.com/redirect/41ef7075-8f4e-451f-bd62-452e057e4962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to push vaccines on American children.
## What did Kennedy share with Tucker Carlson?
* **Kennedy** said that research shows "50 percent of revenues to most pediatricians come from vaccines." He has long argued that vaccines generate patient visits that can boost business. He also shared how this leads to "huge bonuses" from insurance companies for physicians who maintain high immunization rates among their patients.
* **Medical experts strongly dispute Kennedy's financial claims** \- Healthcare professionals and researchers say that Kennedy's statements are "misleading and dangerous," noting that actual data shows most doctors either break even or lose money on vaccines.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/611b6238-ed52-4771-bd91-170fecbe2798?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Is it corrupt or not?
The doctors responding to his claim broke down in detail how their system works in a way that makes us think there is no way it could ever be corrupt. All I know is this, I've had to change doctors for myself and my children many times because the doctors we were seeing loved to push medication first, before any discussion about other options to try. So I'm glad that Kennedy is looking into this to confirm whether there is or is no corruption.
* * *
# Connecticut Democrat calls for RFK Jr. to be FIRED for terminating CDC Director Monarez!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dfaa499e-a417-41e1-ae7e-8cebbb734da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
WASHINGTON -- Democrat congresswoman Rosa DeLauro demanded the dismissal of HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr, for enacting what she is calling dangerous health policies.
## What did the statement say?
* **[CDC Leadership Changes](https://substack.com/redirect/9ad04510-24dc-426c-8867-21bc31e2bb6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** : DeLauro accused Kennedy firing former CDC Director Dr. Susan Monarez for her refusal to approve his anti-vaccine policies. Three other top CDC experts resigned after expressing disaproval with Kennedy's policies.
* **Disease Resurgence Concerns** : DeLauro claimed that Kennedy's policies have already led to a resurgence of measles and resulted in deaths, despite the the fact that the measles outbreak began in late January 2025 in Texas, and Kennedy wasn't sworn in until February 2025.

## **Unproven claims**
For Rosa DeLauro to say that Kennedy has set us back decades of progress in public health - shows her eagerness to defame Kennedy. Kennedy has been very transparent in sharing his replacements for those he has fired and progress in our public health system will absolutely continue.
Rosa DeLauro's statement was filled with accusations and no evidence. All it demonstrates is her hatred for Kennedy and how she is doing everything she can to get him fired. In a nut shell, there has not been enough time to see the effects from the policies Kennedy is trying to implemented or plans to implement.
* * *
# RFK Jr. evokes his father to justify Trump's CDC overhaul during senate hearing
RFK Jr. cited his late father, former Attorney General Robert Kennedy, **[while defending his reforms to the CDC](https://substack.com/redirect/6a069a3b-adf5-487e-91a0-96cd8c533260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during congressional testimony last week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a069a3b-adf5-487e-91a0-96cd8c533260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## What did Kennedy share in his testimony?
**[RFK Jr. defended CDC reforms](https://substack.com/redirect/5cebc536-feca-42bd-a41e-d93a761eb5f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/5cebc536-feca-42bd-a41e-d93a761eb5f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)by citing his father's quote from 1963pertaining to economic issues and youth unemployment at a U.S. Conference of Mayors. His father said: "Progress is a nice word, but change is its motivator. And change has its enemies." RFK Jr. added, "That's why we need new blood at the CDC."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6a069a3b-adf5-487e-91a0-96cd8c533260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## "And change has it's enemies"
The quote he shared from his father was right on point, especially this part: "and change has its enemies." Democrats seem to be more focused on resisting than on being a part of the changes toward Making America Healthy Again.
Our leaders in Washington have done nothing for decades to address the root causes of our illnesses in America. If Washington really cared about Americans' health, they would welcome Kennedy's leadership and give him time to implement change, instead of spending taxpayers' dollars organizing to sign a ridiculous letter for his resignation. Heck, he's only been in office for about 6 months.
| | POLL
---
Do you agree that Democrats are the enemies of change in the effort to make America healthy?
| [Yes](https://substack..T9Rd5PSaxMmysAGapmPRJdJHnLeutuUbHrJ34b03Ei0?)

| [Julie's Notebook](https://substack.com/redirect/b1a56a15-108c-4be2-a256-b130a59562eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[Supporting your journey to better nutrition, fitness, and a healthier mindset.](https://substack.com/redirect/b1a56a15-108c-4be2-a256-b130a59562eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[By Julie A Miller](https://substack.com/redirect/b1a56a15-108c-4be2-a256-b130a59562eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: "I like that he's different!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "I like that he's different!" | | | Sep 7| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | President Donald Trump after his contentious Senate hearing, telling reporters "I like the fact that he's different" and praising Kennedy as "a very good person" with "little different ideas" that deserve consideration. WATCH Trump defend RFK when pressed by reporters: Senate Grilling: Kennedy faced intense criticism from Democratic senators during a Senate Finance Committee hearing, with Sen. Ron Wyden accusing him of putting children in "harm's way" and asking how many "preventable child deaths are an acceptable sacrifice" for Kennedy's health policies. Kennedy's Defense: Kennedy countered criticism by pointing to rising chronic disease rates during senators' tenure, stating that infant mortality increased during the Biden administration and arguing that critics "never asked the question of why it's happening" regarding health problems. Vice Presidential Backup: Vice President JD Vance strongly defended Kennedy on social media, calling senators who criticized him "full of s--- and everyone knows it" and accusing them of supporting "untested" hormonal therapies for children while attacking Kennedy's policies. RFK Jr. says doctors push vaccines for financial gain - Big Pharma disagrees | | ---|---|--- HHS Sec. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told Tucker Carlson during an interview that to push vaccines on American children. What did Kennedy share with Tucker Carlson? Kennedy said that research shows "50 percent of revenues to most pediatricians come from vaccines." He has long argued that vaccines generate patient visits that can boost business. He also shared how this leads to "huge bonuses" from insurance companies for physicians who maintain high immunization rates among their patients. Medical experts strongly dispute Kennedy's financial claims \- Healthcare professionals and researchers say that Kennedy's statements are "misleading and dangerous," noting that actual data shows most doctors either break even or lose money on vaccines. Is it corrupt or not? The doctors responding to his claim broke down in detail how their system works in a way that makes us think there is no way it could ever be corrupt. All I know is this, I've had to change doctors for myself and my children many times because the doctors we were seeing loved to push medication first, before any discussion about other options to try. So I'm glad that Kennedy is looking into this to confirm whether there is or is no corruption. Connecticut Democrat calls for RFK Jr. to be FIRED for terminating CDC Director Monarez! | | ---|---|--- WASHINGTON -- Democrat congresswoman Rosa DeLauro demanded the dismissal of HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr, for enacting what she is calling dangerous health policies. What did the statement say? : DeLauro accused Kennedy firing former CDC Director Dr. Susan Monarez for her refusal to approve his anti-vaccine policies. Three other top CDC experts resigned after expressing disaproval with Kennedy's policies. Disease Resurgence Concerns : DeLauro claimed that Kennedy's policies have already led to a resurgence of measles and resulted in deaths, despite the the fact that the measles outbreak began in late January 2025 in Texas, and Kennedy wasn't sworn in until February 2025. Unproven claims For Rosa DeLauro to say that Kennedy has set us back decades of progress in public health - shows her eagerness to defame Kennedy. Kennedy has been very transparent in sharing his replacements for those he has fired and progress in our public health system will absolutely continue. Rosa DeLauro's statement was filled with accusations and no evidence. All it demonstrates is her hatred for Kennedy and how she is doing everything she can to get him fired. In a nut shell, there has not been enough time to see the effects from the policies Kennedy is trying to implemented or plans to implement. RFK Jr. evokes his father to justify Trump's CDC overhaul during senate hearing RFK Jr. cited his late father, former Attorney General Robert Kennedy, during congressional testimony last week. | | ---|---|--- What did Kennedy share in his testimony? citing his father's quote from 1963pertaining to economic issues and youth unemployment at a U.S. Conference of Mayors. His father said: "Progress is a nice word, but change is its motivator. And change has its enemies." RFK Jr. added, "That's why we need new blood at the CDC." "And change has it's enemies" The quote he shared from his father was right on point, especially this part: "and change has its enemies." Democrats seem to be more focused on resisting than on being a part of the changes toward Making America Healthy Again. Our leaders in Washington have done nothing for decades to address the root causes of our illnesses in America. If Washington really cared about Americans' health, they would welcome Kennedy's leadership and give him time to implement change, instead of spending taxpayers' dollars organizing to sign a ridiculous letter for his resignation. Heck, he's only been in office for about 6 months. | | POLL Do you agree that Democrats are the enemies of change in the effort to make America healthy? | ? ? ? | ---|--- | A guest post by| well today means aging well tomorrow. body:
Hear me out. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114798321/568183828/823540626?refcode=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk4MjA3Yi0zYThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiyS1hVCoxPl9NlvUQtl3rGDEy0zHOZ6wJ4yvnPwSB8=&emci=f1c0ea72-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
Peter, **[I love North Carolina and I’ve served the people here for most of my life. I would like to tell you a bit about why it’s time for me to serve in Washington, but first, I have to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114798322/568183829/-1743631236?refcode=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk4MjA3Yi0zYThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiyS1hVCoxPl9NlvUQtl3rGDEy0zHOZ6wJ4yvnPwSB8=)** I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. **I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians._That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate._** I’m running because **every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the **right to reproductive freedom is fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. **Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support.** **We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. But together, we can take them on.** **[Will you join our fight with a donation of any size today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114798323/568183830/-1743631236?refcode=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk4MjA3Yi0zYThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiyS1hVCoxPl9NlvUQtl3rGDEy0zHOZ6wJ4yvnPwSB8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114798324/568183831/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.3598207b-3a8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk4MjA3Yi0zYThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiyS1hVCoxPl9NlvUQtl3rGDEy0zHOZ6wJ4yvnPwSB8=)**

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

clean_body: Hear me out. | Peter, = I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians.That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. I’m running because every American deserves access to health care — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the right to reproductive freedom is fundamental — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because our planet is in jeopardy — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support. We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. But together, we can take them on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I know that we can do this together. Thank you for being with me, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**
That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.
_And when we say small donations, we mean it._
This month, our average gift is around $40. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.
But now, with early voting kicking off in less than two weeks, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election.

clean_body: Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. = 👋 To all of our supporters, We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end. Here's the key point: Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate. That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. And that's precisely what they've done. Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. And when we say small donations, we mean it. This month, our average gift is around $40. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion. But now, with early voting kicking off in less than two weeks, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election. = = = = = = = We appreciate your support! 💙 The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Flash poll via StateDemocrats.com
subject: Do you support mail-in voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Millions of Americans rely on mail-in voting to cast their ballot each election.
#

**Donald Trump is openly threatening to END mail-in voting.** Millions of Americans — seniors, working parents, and military families — rely on mail-in voting to cast their ballot. It’s a method that’s safe, secure, and overwhelmingly popular. Today, we want to know what YOU think, Peter. **Do you support mail-in voting?** **[YES, I SUPPORT MAIL-IN VOTING](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94385?t=1&akid=9360%2E614464%2EUoGR-T)** **[NO, I DON’T SUPPORT MAIL-IN VOTING](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94385?t=2&akid=9360%2E614464%2EUoGR-T)** **[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94385?t=3&akid=9360%2E614464%2EUoGR-T)**

name: Scott Brown HQ
subject: Heads up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
This could change the course of our future

---
| | | | | | Something **_BIG_** is happening, friend: In August alone, President Trump’s tariffs delivered more than **$31 BILLION** in savings for America.

That money could change the course of our future, but the question is **how**.

**[Should it be used to shrink our crushing national debt?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7F6/?__vbtrk=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**** **
**[Or should it be sent back to hardworking Americans like you?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7F6/?__vbtrk=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
We’re running a quick grassroots poll to get your input before the deadline.
**[ADD YOUR VOICE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7F6/?__vbtrk=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE3MDQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Your response today will show Washington that the American people deserve a say.

|

subject: It's Pat Harrigan.

body:
My back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.
I'm a little unsure about opening up to you

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=0cbd3d4ccc01411a9b1783c476804e53&_e=NtatXrQkADbqCWvECdXPjHLHWRikwXvJ9NefcKkMIGQPQrK5oDYl4JOTU_tOe5CP75FO3fI5Jsu_-faumU64UTNhaCK0VLD7jh9vv0DQBpT1Cg8gliLh5CDw49fhmw5Ya_x6ViDFmiuvhNAgmrInm0M2fO0eJ3D7NNyPUN22Mi8LDtHMZ37ghjkJ-GKbG4aXd1ATJ2whMKcc1ucMnizL8h2gvv1qtvtu8hyTShJAegdl7xJ9b8mH0-421vxPGhKCCXgb4TL9IEiph5HHO6gwRivrtgsDDSxra50L9M4hBCd6DoCovRVeVIgeBK4PI7A4HYAnb-OtRG-f8RN3DJJMyYWGabpuLrz3kGpeMcovCXX1b2lUkqaFKrQzGt3xEVXCuNvpdt8ukj-3L3WnQV3sm_X5I0oZevnligUPCySjj2gDtcELpliDdR4n8rio3mgbqL5IfTiYa9XC5Xjdx1fK8pPxGfX9nX4nGfkkBB3GAzAl1jp5B3uDVoKAT7x1jp8j-Q7IG7v9_zAmkMk103Xuj8-xYN6FnZpDTPP6kUsUt8YHbk8xgvv2lAc7he6uXk44WjYmULn4r__kBz9k8ewGWQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District in 2024, and I'm proud to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **

With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=0cbd3d4ccc01411a9b1783c476804e53&_e=NtatXrQkADbqCWvECdXPjHLHWRikwXvJ9NefcKkMIGQPQrK5oDYl4JOTU_tOe5CP75FO3fI5Jsu_-faumU64UTNhaCK0VLD7jh9vv0DQBpT1Cg8gliLh5CDw49fhmw5Ya_x6ViDFmiuvhNAgmrInm_uVie12m_AhTCbXJAJAXDsKVAIJclmFGc4YC9eU2WOfq_hY0141LFFNWdXAc8EgcURH-Zxh7rmtVeJrw6KvDHkM8FtvjPOwMV3J-XJep7OhIPLi5dpQ55FftLSef7na2y6vKK9jYi8013RfbF28E0QpMZYLDeRav2fYteRRnp4dur3g1tQAfqnhO4MPVXGedvlLljIIBQnxaz4fLDp5hovMYdfRi7fh9gZ2QTxgX-JiSLCTOP-nX57cOH6Ot1Vto7r4Mz29I2tC7hwOIblPAtmvuidyf-1nDvs_BYljlGSgwFjH-21hBqptkbSW1TuXFuFcA8SQ3WdoqAshOuKQ-36Mf9F-F3oEiaDt6UU8FtManyV--t-4Hsfn_xA0DAyN6kARflCWJXD4Xd-oaO3wU_s%3D)**

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but running a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

_Please have my back on this one:_ | [**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=0cbd3d4ccc01411a9b1783c476804e53&_e=NtatXrQkADbqCWvECdXPjHLHWRikwXvJ9NefcKkMIGQPQrK5oDYl4JOTU_tOe5CP75FO3fI5Jsu_-faumU64UTNhaCK0VLD7jh9vv0DQBpT1Cg8gliLh5CDw49fhmw5Ya_x6ViDFmiuvhNAgmrInm0M2fO0eJ3D7NNyPUN22Mi8LDtHMZ37ghjkJ-GKbG4aXcY2WgKUaB1GYThus42rK7-i9CmZZQe6Z-h7-whVsoROWDE_vznxCNRNXwcwjViZg_Vno6vD9Zekqx1NW5G2EyF93FNGV14pjtSB4e_nAVFWDWoJ3PwKzXlRSURP1KEcJq-8QUmoVqehEy0wyYyGySmbXDC7vD69WBD1qHaO35mcw3fEx41Ag5lRkSoqeQzUnZnZN9Ue_KDeDV1ur_cqVxsKEmPyOChvR9HubjHOPaq9OwWekEgmRVspLZoSyhXkzPJpqPwDVKKaBIH48TxpRED0SzukL7jOEI8ITC06rPSETHyJ-IdHyb3nk9E4xaeOpohhGmEjl6z_wVA92vNP97ltmGSJH8aSL9DCtK53ffU24xLWxWL7D7d92jM2-AtWxy5iTXN_1NKbu3SA5CdgHiA%3D%3D)

clean_body: My back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. I'm a little unsure about opening up to you | Fellow American, You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I 'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District in 2024, and I'm proud to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but running a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799181/568186950/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098) | Instead of doing the bare minimum to hold sexual predators accountable, Republicans tucked their tails and blocked the release of the Epstein files (which coincidentally names Donald Trump over a dozen times)...

Bonnie Watson Coleman has been a leading voice in Congress for accountability and transparency, but we want her to know that you’ve got her back.

**[That’s why today we’re asking: Do you think the Epstein files should be released to the American public?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799182/568186951/-354076056?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)** | [YES, I DO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799183/568186952/-354076056?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098) | [NO, I DON'T](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799184/568186953/-354076056?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)
---|---
After Trump’s claims that this is a hoax, Republicans are bending over backwards to shield Trump. We can’t allow the GOP to continue and destroy the trust of the American people.

They’re putting Trump’s reputation not only above the victims and survivors of Epstein’s heinous crimes, but also above the American people’s right to know the truth.

**[That’s why today we’re asking: If you agree it’s time for transparency – and that the Epstein files should be released– will you take our short survey today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799185/568186954/-354076056?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)**
| [RELEASE THE FILES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114799186/568186955/-354076056?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJkY2U0Zi00MjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9M_4FoU2otWtB-rWUEvnDr4pJKp3DGn4Dcqx7WAS2A=&emci=7daa1249-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=58bdce4f-428c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)

Team Bonnie

subject: Trump lies, but numbers don’t.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
The numbers don’t lie.
The August jobs report was grim: only 22,000 new jobs were added – far below the 80,000 economists predicted. Unemployment has climbed to 4.3%, the highest in four years. That’s 3 million more people out of work compared to last year, and nearly 2 million Americans have been unemployed for more than six months.
Donald Trump’s response? He fired the Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics and claimed the numbers were “rigged.”
Trump inherited one of the strongest economies in the world, and he’s tearing it apart.
At GOTV PAC, we know this fight to take back our country and economy won’t be won in press releases or cable news hits. It will be won in the trenches of our democracy: by talking directly to voters in races where control of Congress will be decided.
That’s why we’re powering the texting and phone banking operations that make sure every Democrat gets the facts – and gets to the polls. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email0972025&amount=25]

body:
The voter registration deadline for the TN-07 special election is TOMORROW. That means it’s time to put the pedal to the metal.

| [|

| | | | Peter, The voter registration deadline for the TN-07 special election is **TOMORROW,** so make sure to****[check your voter registration](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/51wHaemFcZ7sdZ-yaNZSKg~~/AAUS1hA~/U1KqQWbQVrdu71XusbAEjPt6xU2JZqzwT3QHL1ln7C56fCk5Dk6s_CAQiLKwIBoArWgWxgIJYlyiqCWZiK1qx-SNfomBDrENSUg2Cc4Rsn2sWjbkoSb1VUqYwkOfHhWI) ASAP! _Now, it’s time to put the pedal to the metal._ [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qd_L4qFRSYS0xkP2euO0tw~~/AAUS1hA~/YH92m6z_gMnDp0dG4lOqv4XW6qL_O5cEqtL30mFER6lG12ZQW_q31YWgV8-n2U722K089NJuyVwAB4MPTnY-rlNJZoOK7_q9zKNVXUF5zJYs14npKR1I5TqgdTwjB7CNSHkb3bleA3vFFA5Xvv3pir0cBPZCqKjvNSeJyqN7-8rFctovQsMAGrg8fpXCbmjUnvS9MJ6LLPv3JM66zU6g1nx1AK7IxybxzsVXTwClIme3Ov7pf3VfH4X8G7Y12IzNteJd1x0T6KyxGX3bj2dGcw~~) Just like behind the wheel of my dump truck, there’s no stopping once we’re rolling. We’ve got the momentum, but we need fuel to keep this campaign **trucking toward victory.** That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $8,000 by Wednesday, September 10th so we can power up canvassing, phone banking, and every tool our volunteers need to reach voters this weekend. **[Help us reach out to every voter in TN-07 now by donating $7 or $37 toward Vincent's GOTV Fund ASAP.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/osV3oY3it74g7Reg7UtO6g~~/AAUS1hA~/YH92m6z_gMnDp0dG4lOqv4XW6qL_O5cEqtL30mFER6lG12ZQW_q31YWgV8-n2U722K089NJuyVwAB4MPTnY-rlNJZoOK7_q9zKNVXUF5zJYs14npKR1I5TqgdTwjB7CNSHkb3bleA3vFFA5Xvv3pir0cBPZCqKjvNSeJyqN7-8rFctovQsMAGrg8fpXCbmjUm8hadj5PzUCf8XPU7WM32_B9Ly2ImpKHlQyZGIUZCbpLb7YqFATmmrqcb3ShlFKJvshviVZfN2gBv5ShYvfvZw~~)** **[**DONATE $37**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ZQOT8MIFS8j9naqfnfXNeA~~/AAUS1hA~/Gvg3SnhCoYU_5MpM6BZixAwTmAlnRqdApXQe1chotsPCqF2bYwk3NDDYAN4_2wJvtlmSYSaqAngo6uyEUdQ3lZ5j5WlvXWQMkztZWhRIaObD3Gx3Bq_xfksH1k4q_GTogqva6Rl7QnWKerqugGz5WMddWW_1qEVXd53XAMVYXONZ-yewa0aZbf-zWXmYlPyw8CwU9K23vr2BNj98wI2Yw55tlv1JS9vieowmGiVkKkAl8L51e4oSST0YNHDAmaxctGMhxIzH3oeV-Z6R0x1AJSk_zeri0VuYTvOiuZ7jF14~) ** We’re in the driver’s seat, Peter, but victory only happens if we’ve got the resources to cross the finish line. Let’s win this! _Vincent_

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: A special session in Missouri
body:
Donald Trump and his Republican lapdogs are on a mission to silence our voices.
---
Derek, Texas was only the beginning. In Missouri, Republican Governor Mike Kehoe and state lawmakers just started a special session to support Donald Trump’s gerrymandering power grab scheme — giving themselves _another_ congressional seat. Donald Trump and his Republican lapdogs are on a mission to silence our voices. They know their agenda is unpopular, and they’re doing everything they can to hang onto their congressional majority by rigging the maps in their favor. We can’t — and won’t — let them get away with it. The DNC is all in to support Missouri Democrats in fighting for our democracy. We’re activating supporters to pressure Republicans in person and online — and _if_ the maps pass the state legislature, we will be all hands on deck to overturn them. This work could make the difference between a Congress that can check Trump’s power — or another four years of Trump with zero guardrails. And Derek, donations that we receive from emails just like this one allow us to continue funding efforts to stop Republican gerrymandering. **[So we’re asking: Can you chip in $3 to help Democrats stop Republicans from getting away with this undemocratic power grab? Your donation will help us contact more voters, mobilize more volunteers, and stop Republicans’ mission to silence voices like ours across the country:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250907_4535_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4535_22930333_UGAgof&akid=4535%2E22930333%2EUGAgof)**
